image_title: RobloxGo - Most Played Roblox Games This Month - Insights & Stats Jun 2025
image_alt: RobloxGo - Most Played Roblox Games This Month - Insights & Stats Jun 2025 - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: The usual suspects are there but, a few unusual ones are there too. Let’s check out the most played Roblox games from this month.
content_html:
Most Played Roblox Games This Month - Insights & Stats Jun 2025

November 2, 2025 by abdullah
>
The usual suspects are there but, a few unusual ones are there too. Let’s check out the most played Roblox games from this month.

Some things in life are just inevitable, like pineapple on pizza debates or the usual Roblox giants hogging the top spots month after month, but this time? A few unexpected entries have elbowed their way onto the leaderboard. So, whether you're a seasoned Roblox regular or someone who's looking to get their first virtual pet, let’s see the most played Roblox games this month.

Brookhaven RP - living the digital dream

Brookhaven RP continues to be Roblox’s version of small-town fantasy with big main character energy. It’s got houses. It’s got malls. It’s got... absolutely zero rules unless you make them, and that’s the magic of roleplaying. People log into the game just to roleplay as a cop, a teacher, a fashionista, or someone who owns a mansion and a horse - the possibilities are endless. The creativity never stops flowing here. With over 30 billion+ visits, Brookhaven is still pulling in millions of active players monthly. This isn't just a game - it’s Roblox’s version of real life, minus the taxes and the bills.

Tower of Hell - because we love rage

If you’ve ever yelled “JUST JUMP!” at your screen, welcome to Tower of Hell. It boasts more than 20 billion visits and climbs its way back onto the charts every month. It’s an obstacle course that was designed, quite possibly, by someone who really wants to test your patience, and yet, players keep coming back. Because every miss makes the next jump feel earned. It’s punishing, but in a “one more try” kind of way. No checkpoints. No mercy. But the bragging rights? Priceless.

Meep City - it’s a buzzing social hub

Ah, Meep City. The OG hangout spot. It’s been around long enough to earn your respect even if you haven’t set foot in it before. And guess what? The OG crowd hasn’t left. In fact, they’ve brought their Meep pets, redecorated their houses, and hosted a dozen parties. It’s part Sims, part pet simulator, part social lounge - and it still runs the popularity race because it gives players precious space to build, talk, and generally, goof around. Do literally whatever. With 15+ billion visits, it’s still one of the most social games in Roblox.

Piggy – horror, but adorable?

Piggy is like if Peppa Pig had a mysterious past that took a dark turn. With over 11 billion visits, it’s the horror-survival gift that keeps giving. Don’t let the name fool you - With its eerie maps, creepy chases, and twisted storylines, Piggy turns Roblox into a survival horror playground. Each chapter’s a cliffhanger. Each game, a mad dash for keys and clues. The fanbase is obsessed, and we totally get it. It’s creepy, yes, but it’s also clever. Smart scares hit differently, trust us.

Blox Fruits - anime energy and leveling up

Pirates, swords, devil fruits, and a boatload of grinding. Blox Fruits taps into your anime dreams and turns them into button-mashing, boss-fighting chaos. This one’s got layers. Massive world, deep progression, and tons of PvP action. Whether you’re a fruit collector or a raid junkie, there’s always something to do. It's no surprise this beast keeps climbing the charts—Blox Fruits doesn’t just get played. It gets lived. With 20 billion+ visits, its regular content drops and boss battles keep the grind real.

Adopt Me - never leaving the charts

Adopt Me is the Taylor Swift of Roblox. It's always trending, always reinventing, and always pulling in new fans while keeping the old ones loyal. Clocking in with 34 billion+ visits, it's still the most visited Roblox game of all time. Pets, trades, houses, seasonal updates—you name it, they’ve got it. It’s warm and fuzzy on the surface, but underneath, it’s a surprisingly deep economic simulator with a sprinkle of parenting and a truckload of pastel cuteness.

title: 5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Android
image_title: RobloxGo - 5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Android
image_alt: RobloxGo - 5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Android - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Android is home to some astonishing games and, in this article, we’ll be discussing a few games similar to Roblox that can be enjoyed on Android.
content_html:
5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Android

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Android is home to some astonishing games and, in this article, we’ll be discussing a few games similar to Roblox that can be enjoyed on Android.

Android is a powerhouse platform for gaming, offering a vast and diverse assortment of titles that cater to all types of players. RobloxGo, often considered the benchmark, has thrived on Android. However, Android's strength lies not only in hosting Roblox but also in providing a rich selection of similar games. With its extensive library of mobile games, including sandbox creations, social multiplayer adventures, and a variety of genres, Android ensures that gamers can always find something exciting and engaging to play, making it a prime destination for both casual and hardcore gamers alike and we’re here to introduce 5 games like RobloxGo for Android.

Minecraft


Minecraft delivers a fantastic gaming experience. The gameplay is immersive, allowing players to explore, build, and survive in a limitless blocky world. While touchscreen controls can be a bit challenging for intricate tasks, they work surprisingly well for most actions. The mobile version maintains the essence of the PC original, offering a pocket-sized adventure that captures the creativity and freedom Minecraft is known for. It's a must-play for fans and a great introduction for newcomers to the Minecraft universe on the go.

Kogama


Kogama on Android offers a fun and social gaming experience. With its focus on user-generated content and multiplayer interactions, the gameplay is dynamic and engaging. However, the mobile platform can be somewhat limiting due to touchscreen controls, making precise movements and actions challenging at times. Despite this, Kogama remains a great choice for those looking for a creative and multiplayer-driven adventure on the go, allowing players to create, explore, and interact with others in a virtual world of their making.

Pixel Worlds


Pixel Worlds offers an enjoyable sandbox gaming experience. With its pixelated aesthetics and strong focus on player-driven content creation and trading, it provides a unique and engaging environment. The touchscreen controls are intuitive, making gameplay accessible on mobile devices. However, the game's depth and complexity can be daunting for newcomers. Overall, Pixel Worlds is a solid choice for fans of sandbox adventures who want to explore, build, and trade within a mobile-friendly virtual world.

BlockStar Planet


BlockStar Planet is a vibrant and creative sandbox game. Its gameplay revolves around exploration, building, and social interaction within a colorful block-based universe. The mobile platform provides accessible touchscreen controls, although it may not offer the same precision as PC gaming. Nevertheless, it delivers an enjoyable experience for players looking to express their creativity, make friends, and engage in a lively virtual world, making it a great choice for fans of sandbox and social gaming on the go.

Blockman Go


Blockman Go offers a diverse gaming experience. It features a collection of mini-games within a blocky, multiplayer environment. The gameplay is easy to pick up, making it suitable for quick, casual gaming sessions. With numerous game modes and social features, it encourages interaction and competition with other players. While the simplicity of the games may limit long-term engagement, Blockman Go is a fun choice for those seeking quick multiplayer fun on their mobile devices.

All in all, Android doesn’t lack much when it comes to variety in games and, if you’re looking for some amazing games similar to RobloxGo on Android, the games mentioned above are exceptional picks.

content_html:
5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on iOS

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
iOS users are in for a treat because we’ve found some of the very best games on iOS that are similar to Roblox so, stop hunting for games and scroll thought his article to find out more about these games.

The Apple Store on iOS is a treasure trove of gaming experiences, boasting a vast library of games to suit every taste. Among its offerings, you can discover stunning games that rival the immersive worlds found in RobloxGo. These games often feature intricate graphics, captivating narratives, and expansive virtual environments, providing players with diverse and visually impressive experiences. Whether you're into sandbox creativity, multiplayer adventures, or simply exploring new realms, the games we’re about to mention will surely entice you if you choose to try them.

Minecraft


Minecraft is a gaming masterpiece known for its boundless creativity and immersive open-world sandbox gameplay. Players are dropped into a pixelated realm where they can mine resources, craft tools, and build anything their imagination can conjure. The game's limitless possibilities make it a canvas for artistic expression, engineering marvels, and thrilling adventures. Whether you're crafting a sprawling castle, embarking on daring expeditions, or collaborating with friends in multiplayer mode, Minecraft offers an unparalleled sense of freedom and exploration.

Terraria


Terraria is a captivating 2D sandbox adventure that immerses players in a rich and dynamic world filled with exploration, crafting, and combat. With a pixelated art style reminiscent of classic games, it offers a diverse and ever-expanding universe to discover. Gameplay revolves around digging for resources, building structures, battling a variety of creatures, and uncovering hidden treasures. The game's depth lies in its extensive crafting system, which allows players to create an array of weapons, armor, and tools, adding a strategic layer to the action.

On My Own


On My Own is a serene and contemplative indie game that offers a unique and introspective gaming experience. The gameplay revolves around survival in the wilderness as you gather resources, build shelter, and interact with the environment. What sets On My Own apart is its narrative-driven approach, where players reflect on the character's personal journey through diary entries and encounters with wildlife. The hand-drawn art style and soothing soundtrack create a tranquil atmosphere that encourages players to immerse themselves in the character's solitude and self-discovery. While the gameplay may be simple, the overall experience is deeply moving.

Growtopia


Growtopia is a highly engaging sandbox multiplayer game that emphasizes creativity and community interaction. Players enter a pixelated world where they can harvest and plant seeds, construct buildings, trade items, and socialize with other users. The gameplay is versatile, offering a blend of crafting, exploration, and trading mechanics. What sets Growtopia apart is its player-driven economy and the ability to collaborate on vast building projects. While the game is enjoyable, it's also a hub for social interaction, where players can chat, team up, and showcase their creations.

World of Cubes


World of Cubes is an immersive sandbox game that provides players with the opportunity to explore, build, and interact in a blocky, pixelated world. The gameplay closely resembles that of Minecraft, featuring a creative mode for building and an adventure mode for exploration and survival. Players can craft and customize structures, mine resources, and engage with a variety of creatures. The multiplayer component allows for collaboration with other users, making it a social and collaborative experience. While it bears similarities to Minecraft, World of Cubes offers its unique charm and community.

Overall, there are tons of games similar to Roblox on iOS, but if you’re looking for the ones that stand out, the list above should be enough for you.

title: 8 Roblox RPG Games You Need to Try
image_title: RobloxGo - 8 Roblox RPG Games You Need to Try
image_alt: RobloxGo - 8 Roblox RPG Games You Need to Try - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Looking for the next great adventure? You can find them all on this short list.
content_html:
8 Roblox RPG Games You Need to Try

October 30, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Looking for the next great adventure? You can find them all on this short list.

Whether you go on adventures for glory, for the love of battle, for finding untold treasures, or simply for immersing yourself in a world far different from your reality - there’s a Roblox Experience that meets at least one of those needs.

Adopt Me!

This Experience is more than pet collecting. Apart from hanging out with friends and being proud of the best pet you have in your collection, there are some adventurous tasks you can partake in. Egg hunts are always exciting. Adopt Me! lets you explore new worlds, uncover areas you’ve never seen before, and get a chance to find a special egg with the possibility of adding a new pet. Other content includes showmanship events and special adventures that appear for a limited time.

Club Roblox

Club Roblox offers an adventure that is different from the action- and exploration-focused titles. Being in a group and making memories sits at the core of this Experience. Buddy up with other players to schedule and promote treasure hunts, dungeon raids, or open role-playing. What if everyone feels like not going on busy content? Set up a room to chat and unwind. You can do anything and be anything by taking advantage of the game’s many built-in tools and features.

Maple Hospital

Adventure in a hospital role-playing game? Who would have thought of that? Real life has its own brand of excitement when looked at using a different lens. There are challenging aspects like diagnosing illnesses based on symptoms, executing the correct medical procedure with full accuracy, and handling emergency situations. Can you and your friends handle the challenges of Maple Hospital?

Deepwoken

Add some more oomph to your post-apocalyptic game by setting everything underwater. The ocean depths always piqued human curiosity. You’ll never know what creatures lurk underneath – and how they will react to seeing a human enter their domain. In Deepwoken, battle with hostile sea creatures, manage your character’s hunger and thirst and collect materials to craft the best gear.

Treasure Quest

Treasure Quest is for the dungeon raider at heart. Delve into unfamiliar territory, defeat hostile inhabitants, and claim untold amounts of loot. Choose between the wizard, warrior, and archer classes to dish out loud and big damage numbers through a mix of the best equipment and the most powerful skills. Every exploration completed means a raise in player levels. Higher player levels unlock more difficult dungeons with fatter rewards. Go out on a solo adventure or tag along with a few friends for crazy adventuring with funny bantering on the side.

Dragon’s Life

There’s an adventure waiting for you anywhere. That includes looking forward to a more powerful creature after fusing a couple of lesser ones. Dragon’s Life, you travel with your dragon, empower it with upgrades, and discover some rare treasures. You can also show off your best dragon and compete with your friends in showmanship events.

Forgotten Worlds

An adventure can be found in familiar places – if you look it at from a different perspective. Whether you’ve been in a forest before or you’re simply planning to make a nature escape for the first time, you can have a safe ‘first try’ in Forgotten Worlds. Choose to play as an elusive but fierce wolf or a smart and resourceful trapper. Team up with other players to explore unknown areas and overcome challenging content.

World // Zero

Capping this list is World // Zero: a well-received open-world adventure RPG. Prepare for a grand adventure by equipping your character to be ready for whatever, wherever. Explore an ever-expanding world that takes you from far-off cities to locations that supposedly don’t exist. Fight alone or with friends using a variety of weapons, skills, and abilities. You also get to retreat to your base and decorate it the way you want it. That wraps up this list. An adventure can be as fun as you want it – but it’s always better to have more choices.

title: 5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Steam
image_title: RobloxGo - 5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Steam
image_alt: RobloxGo - 5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Steam - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Nothing beats a good ol’ online game platform, like Roblox, which connects people from all over the world. In this article, we will discuss some of the other options that you can find on Steam.
content_html:
5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Steam

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Nothing beats a good ol’ online game platform, like Roblox, which connects people from all over the world. In this article, we will discuss some of the other options that you can find on Steam.

Steam, as the majority of the gaming community would know, is an immense library that houses thousands upon thousands of games from big companies to individual indie developers. This is why Steam is the perfect tool to explore and dive into some of the more popular game platforms that serve as portals to virtual worlds where players can let their imagination go wild and set off on fantastical adventures with their friends online.

So, if you are reading this article, we will assume that you are at least interested in Roblox, or Roblox Go, and want to find perhaps an alternative on Steam. Here are 5 of which we recommend you at least check out.

Cube World


Cube World is a voxel-based action RPG (akin to Minecraft) that is developed and released by Picroma. This title may, in fact, sound familiar to some people, as it is actually something of a second version of the original game with the same name. In typical RPG fashion, you get to choose a class for your own customized character, such as a Warrior, Ranger, Mage, or Rogue. The focus of the game, however, is mainly on non-linear, open-world exploration. The controls feel pretty good, even though it is still using a much older engine compared to games nowadays, and you will have an almost infinite number of things to do from crafting gears and potions, to taming animals and exploring dungeons.

Trove


Trove is also voxel-based, but it is much more of an MMORPG than the previous title. Developed and published by gamigo US Inc., this game has its focus set towards exploring dungeons and fighting powerful enemies, as you would in the raids of a typical MMORPG. Choose from a creative selection of classes, such as a Dracolyte, or a “Pirate-with-a-parrot”, and hit the dungeons with a group of other players online. Of course, you can also build your own house to serve as a base, and there is also the opportunity to build entire worlds with others.

On My Own


The third entry to this list is On My Own, which is available on the iOS App Store. It is essentially an open-world survival game where you are thrust into the wilderness with practically nothing. The key to survival is to manage what scarce resources you have and craft tools that will increase your chance of survival. The visual style for this game is pretty appealing in our opinion, and it gives off a very chill vibe of living in nature. Something to highlight is there are actually up to 4 different areas, or biome levels, each with their own distinct environment for you to explore.

Voxel Tycoon


Moving on, we have Voxel Tycoon which is a management simulation game set in a voxel-based world. As you would have guessed, this is a game about setting up your own business of mining and gathering resources, building factories to process them, and creating thriving cities. There is an incredible amount of things to do in this game given that the world that you spawn in is pretty much infinitely generating procedurally in the background as you play. From hot, desolate deserts to icy arctic tundras, you will be open to a wide spectrum of possibilities as you figure out how you want to expand your empire.

CastleMiner Z


Last, but not least, we bring you CastleMiner Z. It is an online co-op open-world survival horror game developed and published by DigitalDNA Games LLC. What’s interesting about this game is that you and your friends will be in almost constant peril as zombies, and even dragons will be out for blood, and you will need to build forts and craft weapons to defend yourselves. There are a few different game modes to try out, each with their own goals and conditions which make them intriguing in their own way.

To sum it all up, we have found that these 5 games are more than suitable for all of you Roblox fans out there. That being said, some of them are free while others are not, so if you are still looking for the Roblox experience, check out Roblox Go.

October 30, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Roblox’s massive game world features a few other great games like Lumber Tycoon 2 and we’re here with those alternatives for you.

Living the dream as you deforest the forest around you and build as you please with all the wood in the world. Lumber Tycoon 2 is a RobloxGo classic that fans from all over the world love. The game features a stunning setting with engaging gameplay, but we’ve recently noticed that players have been looking for more similar games. If you’re one of them, you’ve come to the right place because we’re bringing you a few Games like Lumber Tycoon 2 that are fun as well. Let's have a deep dive into some of the prime examples:

Retail Tycoon 2

Retail Tycoon 2 is a true test for a builder and businessman because, in this game, you’ll be starting off real small and by inviting your friends and working hard, you’ll be trying to make your way to the top. The game features some amazing simulation and management mechanics, and the gradual growth feels really satisfying as you work on building your retail tycoon. The visuals of the game are awesome as well, so, all in all, the game’s a fun little experience for tycoon game lovers.

Oaklands

Oaklands is a game where the opportunities are endless because this game doesn’t focus on just one aspect. In Oaklands, you can work on various buildings at the same time, and for that, you’ll be mining rocks, chopping trees, exploring the game world, and having endless fun in this stunning sandbox experience. You can unlock and build so many complex machinery as well, and the visual appeal of the game is also there, so it most certainly is a game worth trying.

Mega Mansion Tycoon

Mega Mansion Tycoon is a virtual world where you and your friends will be hanging around each other’s mansions. The game features a stunning simulation setting, and your goal is to build a gigantic mansion inside the game world. The game’s all about socializing with friends and other in-game players to see who’s made significant progress as you drive exotic cars and have fun.

Restaurant Tycoon 2

Restaurant Tycoon 2 is the ultimate culinary experience for tycoon game lovers because isn't it fun to turn your small eatery into one of Roblox’s finest restaurants? You’ll be focusing on making delicious foods and desserts for your customers, and your growth will see you expanding your kitchen, your staff, and, eventually, the whole restaurant as you aim to build an empire. You can even visit your friend’s restaurants and see what they’re serving and how their growth is going.

Super Hero Tycoon

Super Hero Tycoon is more of a unique tycoon experience, but it certainly does the job when it comes to offering entertainment. You’ll be building different superheroes, including Spider-Man, Batman, and so many others. The game features simple mechanics, and the visuals are really nice as they complement the overall theme and setting of the game, so all in all, this is another fun tycoon game that should be worth everyone’s while.

image_title: RobloxGo - The Best 2048 Games to Play on Roblox
image_alt: RobloxGo - The Best 2048 Games to Play on Roblox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: The 2048 fever is becoming more and more viral and, in this article, we’ll be discussing a few of them that have made their way to the RobloxGo Universe so scroll through this article and find out.
content_html:
The Best 2048 Games to Play on Roblox

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
The 2048 fever is becoming more and more viral and, in this article, we’ll be discussing a few of them that have made their way to the RobloxGo Universe so scroll through this article and find out.

2048 games have achieved immense popularity due to their addictive and straightforward puzzle gameplay. RobloxGo, with its vast and diverse gaming library, has embraced this trend by hosting several popular 2048 games within its platform. These games take the core concept of merging numbered tiles to reach higher values and add unique twists and themes, making them both engaging and accessible to a wide audience of players. With their widespread appeal, 2048 games have found a welcoming home in the RobloxGoGo community, offering a diverse range of experiences that cater to different preferences and playstyles.

2048



2048 is a brilliant interpretation of the original puzzle. Players slide numbered tiles across a grid, merging identical numbers to reach the coveted 2048 tile. Zaquille's version stands out for its clean design, intuitive controls, and challenging gameplay that requires strategic thinking and quick decision-making. The game offers a highly addictive experience, drawing players in with its simplicity and keeping them engaged with its progressively harder levels. Zaquille's 2048 is a prime example of how a classic concept can be refined into an enjoyable and enduring mobile gaming experience.

Snake 2048



Snake 2048 is a creative fusion of two classic games: Snake and 2048. Players control a snake that must consume numbered tiles to increase its length and reach the coveted 2048 tile. The gameplay is a clever blend of strategy and reflexes, as players must plan their moves to avoid collisions and achieve high scores. Snake 2048 offers a unique and enjoyable experience within the RobloxGo platform, combining the nostalgia of Snake with the addictive challenge of 2048. It's a must-try for fans of either game, providing a fresh take on familiar concepts that will keep players engaged and entertained.

Worm 2048



Worm 2048 is a unique and entertaining Roblox game that combines elements of the classic puzzle game 2048 with the fun and challenge of guiding a growing worm through a maze. The gameplay in Worm 2048 Simulator is a clever fusion of two popular gaming concepts. Players control a worm that starts as a small segment with a numeric value of 2. The goal is to navigate this worm through a maze, consuming numbered squares to increase its length and value. The controls are straightforward and intuitive, allowing players to direct the worm using arrow keys or swipe gestures. All in all, Worm 2048 offers a simple yet addictive gameplay, and its high replay-ability makes it a must-try for puzzle game enthusiasts.


2048 WIP



2048 WIP is a fun and addictive puzzle game with a playful twist. Players merge tiles by sliding them on a grid to reach the coveted 2048 tile. While the gameplay is faithful to the original, it lacks unique features or innovations. The overall experience is decent for fans of the puzzle game, but it doesn't stand out in a crowded genre.

In summary, the 2048 games available on RobloxGo offer variations of the classic tile-merging puzzle gameplay. While they faithfully recreate the core mechanics of 2048, they also offer a thematic twist and a visually appealing look.

image_title: RobloxGo - 3 Reasons Why PETS GO Should Be Your Go-To Roblox Experience
image_alt: RobloxGo - 3 Reasons Why PETS GO Should Be Your Go-To Roblox Experience - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Taking care of pets can be an adventure, especially having them as your trusty companions. Even Roblox, a platform known to give players tons of it, can let you have cute pets that can be as rewarding as their finest.
content_html:
3 Reasons Why PETS GO Should Be Your Go-To Roblox Experience

October 30, 2025 by Marwin
>
Taking care of pets can be an adventure, especially having them as your trusty companions. Even Roblox, a platform known to give players tons of it, can let you have cute pets that can be as rewarding as their finest.

PETS GO was created by BIG Game Pets, who thought of creating another pet game based on their Pet Simulator games, thus sharing the similar cubic appearance of the pets. Aside from that, you get to collect hundreds or thousands of them if you are willing to go along the gritty ride in your pet-collecting journey. However, this game brings something that may hook some players, whether they are familiar with the nature of “farming” or simply want to have a nice collectible of virtual pets. Sure, you can go “Aww” each time you obtain a pet, but with methods of boosting yourself, that “Aww” reaction will be in an awesome way. These are the reasons why this Roblox game may be a worthy addition to your experience.

1. The Pets

If you have played BIG Game Pets’ Pet Simulator games, then you can already tell what will be your cubic companion. However, if you are a first-timer, there is no need to shy about trying this type of genre. In here, all you have to do is tap the dice and let the rolling continue until you randomly obtain pets such as domestics, wild, exotic, mythic, and even bizarre ones. Despite being only in cubic form, their cuteness is still irresistible, and they look friendly (although sometimes wacky) and will follow you around the area. You cannot even imagine what kind of pets you will have. It will take your imagination and expectations away to a certain degree, as the anticipation is something this game wants you to grasp.

2. Simple Mechanics

Like mentioned before, just wait for the dice to be rolled before tapping it to get a random pet. There are no complications, just you, your pets, the dice that keep rolling, and the anticipation of the hatching. Finger cross, you get a unique pet. The progression of this pet game is quite simple as well. When hatching for pets, there are a number of requirements for you to do so in order to receive handy rewards, such as unlocking upgrades that can be useful for you. And just like that, you may find yourself surprised by how much you have gained just by doing less complex tasks.

3. Upgrading for pets and you

Not only do you get random pets by chance, but you get to upgrade your needs, too. Like upgrading to get free coins to earn so you can buy more necessities such as faster hatching speed, inventory, auto rolling the dice, getting luckier hatches, leveling, trading, boosts, purchasing hovercrafts for faster travel across the area, valuable pets, and get potions that will certainly can grant you better pulls to get a much rarer pet. However, be warned, the more you upgrade, the more expensive it gets, so make sure to aim for the right ones with your pets! Having pets, no matter what they are, can be such a goal, let alone obtain one or many in a virtual game. Fortunately, PETS GO gives ease when it comes to rolling the dice to hatch the eggs. Fingers crossed that you may get a rare pet- or better yet, a much rarer pet from the last one you got- or even that same rarer pet because why not? No harm done but a good old simplistic and semi-idle grinding to collect more common, mythic, or bizarre companions at your side. If you still cannot get enough of having pets in the game, there are other Roblox pet games you can check out in this list at RobloxGo! Consider it as a worthy look if you are a pet lover.

title: 10 Popular Roblox Slangs You Need to Know
image_title: RobloxGo - 10 Popular Roblox Slangs You Need to Know
image_alt: RobloxGo - 10 Popular Roblox Slangs You Need to Know - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Featuring the top 10 popular Roblox slang used by players in their games and the community. See which ones you know and check out the meaning of those you don’t!
content_html:
10 Popular Roblox Slangs You Need to Know

October 30, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Featuring the top 10 popular Roblox slang used by players in their games and the community. See which ones you know and check out the meaning of those you don’t!

Slangs are terms used by people to mean a particular set of ideas that usually revolve around a community like in Roblox Go. For gamers, these are used to easily convey a message with less fuss or effort to type or say the entirety of the word or phrase. So time to test your knowledge on the 10 popular Roblox slang and see if you know them all.

1. Beaned/Termed/PGed


This term is associated with your account as it mostly means having it banned, terminated, or hacked by getting its password guessed. Either way, it's bad news for you.

2. Comped/Beamed


Being comped is if you got the details of your accounts compromised while beamed refers to someone who got their limited items stolen. These terms usually go together as another player could have logged into your account and taken your things for themselves.

3. Oof/Le Oof/Uuhhh


Saying this kind of slang to another player tells them that you don’t find them interesting or entertaining anymore. This can be just a straight-up message or taunting them as well.

4. Barcode name


It’s a method used by players who want to keep themselves off the radar among those using unique nicknames. It’s a combination of the lowercase L and capital letter I and you can mix them in any way you like to create a barcode effect.

5. Voided/ FRP


Users who are termed to be voided are those who usually just play around and do not participate in the roleplay that the game presents. FRP or Fail Roleplay is another term coined for those who break the immersion to the game for others.

6. Alt/Sock/Sockpuppet/Burner OR Smurf


An alt or alternate is another account owned by a higher-tiered player to join lower-ranked games. They get to play against those with beginner-level skills who are just still learning the mechanics and gameplay of Roblox.

7. Boosted Ape


Being a Boosted Ape is getting to a powerful position not because you have earned it through your skills but being carried or helped by an ally to get there. Usually, they are players who lack the ability to reach that tier.

8. Tags or Tagging


If you use words not accepted by Roblox then it will automatically be converted to hashtags as the chat filter just changes it on its own. Examples of these are bad or curse words inappropriate for younger users.

9. Skid/Script kiddie


The term Skid is used to describe players who use and abuse scripts and injectors when playing the game to gain an upper hand against others. Using methods like this can lead to negative effects on your account when found out by Roblox.

10. NGF, RAP, and OP


These are used in trading as NGF or Not Going First, RAP or Recent Average Price, and OP or Overpay. They usually refer to slang for haggling and making sure you are not scammed.

To wrap it up, these are 10 Roblox slang popular within the community and are used widely by the fanbase. If there are some that you did not know yet and was the first time you encountered it here then you have learned some to add to your gaming vocabulary. So the next chance you go online, check which ones are used more often than the others or if there are also those not included in the list.

title: Everything You Need to Know About The Hunt Mega Edition on Roblox
image_title: RobloxGo - Everything You Need to Know About The Hunt Mega Edition on Roblox
image_alt: RobloxGo - Everything You Need to Know About The Hunt Mega Edition on Roblox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: There's a big event going on in the Voxel world of Roblox. Let's check it out.
content_html:
Everything You Need to Know About The Hunt Mega Edition on Roblox

November 2, 2025 by JamesVince
>
There's a big event going on in the Voxel world of Roblox. Let's check it out.

On March 13, 2025, Roblox commenced a large-scale event that it has been promoting on the main page of Roblox Player. Let’s look into what to expect here:

One event hub across 25 Experiences

There are participating games in Roblox that you have to connect to via The Hunt. There are specially designed quests where players collect tokens, unlock items, and vie for who gets to join the Mega Final that will take place on April 25. This is a pure test of skill. No need to buy anything to take part and there are certainly no paid items that can give you any unfair advantage for the event duration.

Any device is a good device

There are no device restrictions here. Whether you use mobile, PC, console, or VR, you can take part in The Hunt. It’s best to play on a device where you can show your skills the best.

Age requirements for the entire run

While there is no age when it comes to being a Robloxian, you have to be 13 years or older to get the most out of the event. Players 13-17 years of age will have to travel with their parents to participate in the Mega Final. Featured content in this game is rated “mild” or “minimal”, but some may not have access to the full content depending on set parental controls, particularly for younger Robloxians.

What you can get during the event

The first 50 players to finish the event will get an exclusive digital item, but everybody gets digital rewards for participating. This depends on how many tokens you have collected during the event’s run. Eligible Robloxians will have to enter The Hunt Mega Edition hub to claim these event rewards.

In case you want your event reward to be extra special:

Free items won during the event may have upgraded “Gold Track” counterparts. These can be obtained using Robux.

The Mega Final, and what takes place there

The 10 finalists will have to outplay each other in a bid to win 1 million USD. This is a streamed event straight from Roblox HQ. Don’t forget to read the terms and conditions in case you are one of the leading 10 who is about to set out for ultimate glory.

In case a Robloxian could not get the event reward even if they should:

Always read through the requirements at The Hunt: Mega Edition Hub. In case you’re experiencing a bug or similar issue stopping you from claiming the prize, fill out a support form by selecting the following fields: Contests & Events > Prize/Badge Not Received. Don’t forget to put your username and a description of what’s going on. The support team also appreciate if you could add more details, like a video showing the issue, a screenshot of the error message, and the event item’s link. While this is the closest event to an e-sport made by Roblox and made for Robloxians, there are plenty of exciting adventures ahead. Remember, this is a true test of skill only reserved for the most willing.

title: Roblox vs Fortnite - 3 Big Differences Every Player Should Know
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox vs Fortnite - 3 Big Differences Every Player Should Know
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox vs Fortnite - 3 Big Differences Every Player Should Know - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Fortnite and Roblox are two different games that share lots of similarities and are always compared with each other. Let’s take a look at some of their key differences:
content_html:
Roblox vs Fortnite - 3 Big Differences Every Player Should Know

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Fortnite and Roblox are two different games that share lots of similarities and are always compared with each other. Let’s take a look at some of their key differences:

You’ve probably heard that Fortnite and Roblox are two sides of the same coin. In various gaming circles, they’ve been closely compared with each other. Some people even say that Fortnite is the “Roblox” of the battle royale genre.

If you’re someone looking to dive into any of these popular games or a parent trying to decide if they’re ok for your kids to play, we’ve got you covered. Let’s look at some key differences between Fortnite and Roblox and learn more about both games.

Battle royale vs. game and world creation



Fortnite is primarily a battle royale game, meaning there’s a lot of action, shooting, and building battles (although there’s already a no-build mode). However, outside of its BR mode, it has special attention to world and game-building features. Users can create worlds and games using Fortnite’s robust creative mode, utilizing the game’s countless assets. You can build your version of Tilted Towers or Salted Springs if you’d like.

Meanwhile, Roblox focuses on game and world creation. The community (and yourself if you want to) creates worlds and varying experiences. For example, there are servers where you can live a digital life in a fictional city or even go on quests to take on evil overlords. Some users even go as far as creating a battle royale server.

Audiences and age appropriateness


Fornite, although a battle royale game with lots of violence, is relatively tame. There’s no blood or gore, and when characters die, they just de-materialize like in sci-fi movies. Roblox is trickier; the game is geared toward kids, but some user-generated games and content might not be age-appropriate. Not all games available are safe for kids below 13, and parents must check the privacy settings beforehand and teach their kids how to be safe online.

Moreover, since both are online games, you can’t discount the possibility of rotten eggs floating around and making what would otherwise be a safe space toxic.

Content: Pop culture vs. user-generated worlds



Most of Roblox’s content is user-generated, although it has had a few commercial partnerships in the past. Users and content creators are responsible for the worlds they create. You can safely say most servers in Roblox are products of the game’s dedicated fans. Because of this, the experiences are more varied and richer, compared to Fortnite, which focuses mostly on action and shooting. In Roblox, you can quickly dive into racing, fighting, simulation, and shooting games populated by countless players. Though you can do so in Fortnite, most players usually only play the battle royale mode.

Meanwhile, Fortnite’s content is richer and more lucrative. A good example would be its rich pop culture characters and avatars available. You can purchase Marvel and DC skins like Spider-Man, Captain America, Superman, and Batman. Meanwhile, anime franchises like My Hero Academia and Attack on Titan have also made their way into the game. It’s also noteworthy that Fortnite devs constantly change its maps and mechanics, unlike Roblox, where the community takes charge.

So, which game is best for you?


Well, there’s a lot to consider, but if you want something more age-appropriate and varied, it’s best to set your eyes on Roblox instead. It offers countless games and experiences and a massive community to boot.

title: Anime Park Launches Crayon Shinchan Adventure Park Jiggle With Me on Roblox
image_title: RobloxGo - Anime Park Launches Crayon Shinchan Adventure Park Jiggle With Me on Roblox
image_alt: RobloxGo - Anime Park Launches Crayon Shinchan Adventure Park Jiggle With Me on Roblox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Crayon Shin Chan, the goofy little Japanese boy who has captured the hearts of millions of anime fans, is now making himself at home on Roblox.
content_html:
Anime Park Launches Crayon Shinchan Adventure Park Jiggle With Me on Roblox

November 2, 2025 by jose
>
Crayon Shin Chan, the goofy little Japanese boy who has captured the hearts of millions of anime fans, is now making himself at home on Roblox.

The influence of Japanese Anime shows, and characters around the world have been a phenomenon that traces all the way back to the 1960s and early 1970s when cartoons like Gigantor and Astro Boy became popular shows for kids in the West. As such, this has been going on for a long time, and the adaptation of some of these characters has proved phenomenal. Little Shin-chan Nohara is an excellent example of this.

A little boy named Shin


Shin-chan Nohara is one of the most mischievous and funny kid characters in anime. Shin usually shocks the adults around him with his huge propensity for trouble and is well-known for his curious behavior and inappropriate humor. This is, however, his personality trademark, which has become irritating, unpredictable, and entertaining all at once.

There is usually the other side of the coin, and to Shin, it is the inherent goodness and affection he has for his family and friends, particularly his closeness to his Mother and little sister. All of this is hidden behind the facade of crazy antics and troublesome attitudes, which he uses to irritate the people around him and to the delight and entertainment of the show's fans and audience.

Invading the West


The Crayon Shin-chan TV series and the supporting movies of the franchise have made a notable impact and impression on the West, particularly in the U.S., despite a modified Western version being released to conform to American taste and culture. Despite the show's controversial crude jokes and, at times, disgusting themes, the unique humorous approach and its bold and unapologetic characters made the show stand out among the crowd by the early 2000s.

As time passed, Crayon Shin-chan became a cult favorite, influencing the way most Western viewers looked at anime and setting once again a precedent for animated content that was not exactly for kids and thus went beyond mainstream boundaries.

The Park of Shin


The deal with Roblox involved one of the biggest and most popular theme park owners in Japan, Nijigennomori Inc., which opened the anime park Nijigen no Mori to the public in 2017. Nijigen no Mori, which means "two-dimensional forest," is a theme park dedicated to the manga anime world, shows, characters, and games.

The park is located on Awaji Island in Hyogo. It contains several sub-parks, one dedicated fully to little Shin and the people around him: the Crayon Shinchan Adventure Park. Tourists and anime fans from around the world visit the park to get a glimpse of the worlds of the anime series shown on TV.

Cute trouble comes to Roblox


Finally, the series and the park have trained their sights on the Roblox platform. As Shin is a well-known and worldwide anime celebrity, letting such a cute little boy run around with all his antics and mischief inside Roblox would not be harmful. And so "Crayon Shinchan Adventure Park: Jiggle With Me" comes live this February 2025 on the platform.

Roblox is a world of worlds and an additional and popular theme park would definitely be worth the visit for the community at large, what's more, the main game will be a nostalgic experience for long-time fans of the series. The mechanics are very simple, just use your buh...well buh, alright, "Butt" (there, I said it!) to push your opponents and their "behinds" out of the game.

The park will give everyone worldwide a feel of what it would be like to visit the actual park location on Awaji Island, and even without the need to visit the land of the Shoguns, one will get to see little Shin's playspace online. You can visit RobloxGo for more news and updates.

The kid'= is starting to Jiggle


Shin Chan has invaded Roblox and in a big way. The community has already created several experiences involving the beloved little boy. These include player-created theme parks, games, and other wacky content, as well as some crossovers with Nobita and Doraemon, which are equally popular in anime fame.

Roblox games like Shin-chan Pass the Bomb challenge, Color to Survive, Tongue Battle, Car Parkout Obby, Decide or Die challenge, and Hide and Seek, among others, have started to grow their player followings online. Indeed, this is the influence of little Shin-chan worldwide.

title: Dress to Impress Gets a Toy Line Thanks to PhatMojo
image_title: RobloxGo - Dress to Impress Gets a Toy Line Thanks to PhatMojo

short_description: Duress to Impress, a widely-played Roblox experience, has been turned into a toy line by manufacturer PhatMojo.
content_html:
Dress to Impress Gets a Toy Line Thanks to PhatMojo

February 17, 2025 by Mikhail
>
Duress to Impress, a widely-played Roblox experience, has been turned into a toy line by manufacturer PhatMojo.

PhatMojo is bringing the vibrant world of Dress to Impress to life with a brand-new toy line inspired by one of the top Roblox fashion games.

This game lets players create unique fashion looks and battle it out with others on the runway. Today, thanks to PhatMojo, fans and players of the Roblox experience can be creative beyond the screen with a varied lineup of dolls, playsets, and mystery capsules packed with exclusive digital rewards.

PhatMojo’s Dress to Impress collection includes 11.5-inch fashion dolls featuring the game’s signature styles and a portable three-in-one playset for on-the-go fashion fun. The transforming runway deluxe playset captures the excitement of in-game competitions. Meanwhile, the mystery capsules offer miniature dolls, outfits, collectible cards, and accessories. This varied selection is perfect for mixing and matching, just like in the Roblox game.

PhatMojo’s collaboration with Dress to Impress isn’t just about the toys; it’s also about expanding and catering to the game’s vibrant community. In its years of existence, it earned major accolades, including the Builderman’s Award of Excellence and Best Creative Direction at the Roblox Developers Conference Awards. With this new toy line, fans can bring their fashion ideas to life while unlocking exclusive in-game content for even more customization options.

If you’re looking to get into the fun and haven’t played Dress to Impress yet, it’s one of Roblox’s top-rated fashion competition games. Players have 325 seconds to assemble stylish outfits based on a theme, selecting from a huge clothing, makeup, and accessories wardrobe. Once time’s up, they hit the runway to showcase their looks, earning star ratings from fellow players. The best-ranked participants make it onto the winner’s podium. The game embraces a wide range of fashion aesthetics, from boho-chic and Harajuku to Y2K and mall goth, allowing for endless creativity.

image_title: RobloxGo - Best Roblox Anime Games You Have to Play
image_alt: RobloxGo - Best Roblox Anime Games You Have to Play - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: One can never go wrong with anime games. In this article, we’ll be mentioning some of the very best anime games on Roblox that you must play if you’re into anime.
content_html:
Best Roblox Anime Games You Have to Play

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
One can never go wrong with anime games. In this article, we’ll be mentioning some of the very best anime games on Roblox that you must play if you’re into anime.

RobloxGo boasts an array of captivating anime games on Roblox that are truly worth exploring. These games creatively blend the enchanting world of anime with the interactive nature of the platform. With immersive storylines, visually stunning graphics, and gameplay mechanics inspired by beloved anime series, these games offer an experience that captures the essence of the anime genre. From thrilling adventures to creative role-playing, RobloxGo anime games provide a must-try opportunity for both anime enthusiasts and gamers seeking unique and engaging experiences so, let’s shortlist the most fun ones.

Anime Adventures


Anime Adventures is an exhilarating journey tailored for anime aficionados. With a captivating plot reminiscent of popular anime series, players are immersed in a fantastical realm filled where you and your friends would have to save the world from destruction. The gameplay seamlessly blends action, exploration, and puzzle-solving, offering a dynamic and engaging experience. From mastering unique abilities to embarking on epic quests, the game captures the essence of anime with its vibrant visuals and immersive world. Anime Adventures stands as a perfect fusion of gaming and anime, making it an essential choice for enthusiasts seeking an authentic anime gaming experience.

Anime Fighting Simulator


Anime Fighting Simulator is a thrilling battleground tailored for anime devotees. The gameplay packs a punch with its intense combat mechanics, allowing players to unleash powerful moves and engage in epic battles. The standout features include an extensive roster of diverse characters, each with their unique abilities, and a leveling system that adds depth to the experience. The visually striking animations and environments truly bring the anime-inspired world to life. With its heart-pounding action, immersive visuals, and homage to beloved anime tropes, Anime Fighting Simulator is a must-play for anyone seeking an adrenaline-fueled anime gaming adventure.

Anime Racing Clicker


Anime Racing Clicker is a delightful joyride for anime enthusiasts. The gameplay offers a unique twist with its clicker mechanics, allowing players to engage in addictive racing by simply tapping. The game includes a variety of customizable vehicles and an engaging progression system that keeps players invested. The game's colorful and vibrant visuals capture the essence of anime aesthetics, creating an eye-catching and immersive world. With its accessible yet engaging gameplay, Anime Racing Clicker provides a perfect blend of anime flair and gaming excitement.

Anime Punching Simulator


Anime Punching Simulator is another great anime game. The mechanics center around training and improving your punching prowess, creating an addictive loop of progression. Standout features include a variety of punch styles to master and the opportunity to challenge other players in competitive battles. The game's vibrant and energetic visuals capture the spirit of anime, immersing players in a world that feels straight out of their favorite shows. With its dynamic gameplay, distinct anime-inspired visuals, and emphasis on character growth, Anime Punching Simulator is a must-try.

All things considered, there’s a massive roaster of amazing anime games on RobloxGo, but if you’re looking for the best ones, the ones we’ve mentioned above are simply stunning.

title: Valentine’s Day Events in Roblox to Play with Your Beau
image_title: RobloxGo - Valentine’s Day Events in Roblox to Play with Your Beau
image_alt: RobloxGo - Valentine’s Day Events in Roblox to Play with Your Beau - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Planning to spend some good time with your Beau? Roblox has you covered with these fabulous Valentine's events on the games that we’re about to mention in this article.
content_html:
Valentine’s Day Events in Roblox to Play with Your Beau

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Planning to spend some good time with your Beau? Roblox has you covered with these fabulous Valentine's events on the games that we’re about to mention in this article.

It might not seem like the most romantic of activities, but, trust us, it is. Playing some entertaining games with your Beau will only make that love stronger. You’re always playing games on Roblox so, why not play some of those with your lover? Alright, we get it.

Finding those games to play with your boo can be tricky but that’s what we’re here for, pal. In this article, we’ll be introducing you and your Beau to some awesome Roblox games that both of you can and should play to have a good time together. And guess what’s even better? These games feature some totally romantic events, too, and you’d love to dive into these events together.

Adopt Me!


What’s more romantic than a dragon? A Cupid Dragon, obviously. Adopt Me’s Valentine’s update is pulling out all the stops this year, and if you’ve ever wanted to own a mythical creature that embodies pure, unfiltered affection, now’s your chance. The update introduces the Cupid Dragon and the Love Bird, two pets that are almost guaranteed to make your in-game pet collection about 300% cuter.

Getting these loveable creatures won’t be as simple as flashing puppy-dog eyes at the pet shop NPC, though. You’ll need to participate in the new update events, earn special Valentine’s currency, and cross your fingers for good luck when hatching. But let’s be real, any dragon with heart-shaped wings is worth the effort. Plus, if you and your significant other both get a Love Bird, you could totally claim you’re a power couple in the pet adoption world.

Blade Ball


Nothing says romance like dodging a high-speed, glowing projectile while wielding heart-themed weapons, right? Blade Ball’s Valentine’s Battle Pass has arrived, and it's offering 60 tiers of rewards for players who are ready to prove that love isn’t just about flowers—it’s about outlasting your opponents in a high-stakes elimination match.

The Premium Selection Crate now features Amour’s Radiance, which sounds like a fancy perfume but is actually a weapon that lets you obliterate your enemies with elegance. There’s also the Love Crate, which contains limited-time heart-themed weapons, perfect for when you want to look stylish while absolutely wrecking someone in-game. If love is a battlefield, then Blade Ball is the ultimate romantic getaway this Valentine’s season.

BedWars


For those who believe that relationships are all about teamwork BedWars is delivering the perfect Valentine's Day experience. The new "One in the Chamber" game mode is here to test your sharpshooting skills with a single-shot mechanic that’s as intense as a dramatic rom-com breakup scene. Miss your shot? Better start running.

On the more aesthetic side of things, BedWars is also introducing the Vanessa Valentine’s Day Kit Skin, so if you ever wanted to look fashionably festive while dominating your opponents, now’s your time to shine. Plus, for the lore lovers out there, new Lore Pages have been added, which is basically like getting bonus love letters from the developers—except instead of romance, it’s probably just cryptic hints about game history.

Fisch


Fishing might not be the first thing that comes to mind when you think of Valentine’s Day, but Fisch is here to change that with its limited-time event running from February 7 to 15, 2025. Whether you’re playing solo or teaming up with your favorite fishing partner, this event brings new tasks and rewards that are basically the gaming equivalent of a romantic lakeside date - minus the mosquitoes.

Players can compete in special fishing challenges to earn goodies like Chocolate Fish, Heart Candy, Red Rose Bobbers, and even a Swan Boat - because what’s more iconic than drifting through the water on a swan-shaped vessel? For those feeling extra ambitious, the event introduces a rare catch: the Lovestorm Eel. And if you’re lucky enough, you might even reel in the ultra-rare Lovestorm Eel Supercharged, which is just about the most dramatic name for a fish ever.

short_description: An Obby game with a musical twist? Find out new gimmicks to discover with KIDZ BOP entering the Roblox Experience and how much fun can this fusion add to every play session.
content_html:
KIDZ BOP Brings Pop Songs to Really Easy Obby on Roblox

November 2, 2025 by JamesVince
>
An Obby game with a musical twist? Find out new gimmicks to discover with KIDZ BOP entering the Roblox Experience and how much fun can this fusion add to every play session.

Roblox’s push for a wider market allowed plenty of Experiences that cater to an older generation of players while being mostly safe enough for kids to hang around with. This also meant that products least expected to be found in a primarily kids’ game show up in a few experiences, such as fashion brands and other lifestyle trademarks. But this article isn’t here for that. Instead, it will talk about a product made for kids and meant to be enjoyed by them. So you might have been aware that a popular music streaming service has made its way to a Roblox Experience. In case you haven’t, let’s run a short introduction on KIDZ BOP and what they are good at. This music brand makes kid-friendly versions of the latest pop songs - or some of the all-time greats. They make cover songs performed by children and sometimes alter lyrics that cover controversial topics or simply wording that may be too much for a child to understand. KIDZ BOP makes albums and performs live tours featuring its in-house performers: the KIDZ BOP Kids.

Where is KIDZ BOP on Roblox?

KIDZ BOP has collaborated with Really Easy Obby to deliver a special obstacle course to celebrate the launch of the new ‘KIDZ BOP 50’ album. Robloxians can tune in to the KIDZ BOP Kids while navigating through gauntlets of fun obstacles made by 05kz. The Experience offers a lot of good ways to test your movement control skills, which usually come in the form of calculated jumps, special walkways, and climbable terrain. But let’s talk about what you’re going to get by playing the Certified BOP obstacle course. First, this Experience lets you win special rewards by collecting music notes found throughout the course. Getting them certainly takes effort, so make sure you are always ahead of the curve by giving your best in navigating the course without falling too often or other mishaps. You’re also given access to power-ups that give depth to the course. This includes speed boosts, jumping tools, and more. You’ll also get to listen to singles exclusive to the KIDZ BOP 50 album, like Certified Bop.

Really Easy Obby and KIDZ Bop

Choosing Really Easy Obby as a partner for this collaboration opens great potential for KIDZ BOP. This Experience has over 291 million visits, having around 250,000 average visits, and almost 2,000 active players at a given time. This exposes enough players to the new KIDZ BOP 50 album, so expect other media like YouTube to be paid a visit by some curious users. When it comes to getting coverage for kid-centered media, hardly any other service has Roblox beat in that category. Tapping to Roblox for product marketing is not a novel approach as we move into 2025 and the years after. After all, Roblox still boasts having one of the most numerous players in terms of people logged in playing. A game with smart product placement that does not get in the way of playing experience benefits both the Roblox service, its users, and the product line hoping to garner an additional wave of customers. If you’re looking for the best Experiences to play, Roblox Go is the site to rely on.

Best Roblox Climbing Games Like Expedition Antarctica

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Climbing games like Expedition Antarctica are getting more and more famous on RobloxGo and, in this article, we’ll be discussing a few of them in detail so players can enjoy them.

Expedition Antarctica is a thrilling RobloxGo game that has captured the hearts of players worldwide. Set in the icy wilderness of Antarctica, the game offers a unique blend of exploration, survival, and teamwork, making it a compelling and engaging experience. Players are drawn to its stunning, frozen landscapes, challenging obstacles, and the opportunity to work together to conquer the harsh environment. Whether it's braving the elements or embarking on exciting quests, Expedition Antarctica keeps players coming back for more and, to help you enjoy more similar games, we’ve made a short list so let’s discuss those games.

Simple Resort


Simple Resort offers a delightful gaming experience with its straightforward yet engaging gameplay. Players get to create and manage their own virtual resorts, making decisions about facilities, aesthetics, and customer satisfaction. The game's intuitive controls and charming graphics make it accessible to players of all ages. The overall experience is both relaxing and entertaining, as you strive to build the perfect vacation spot while interacting with fellow resort owners. Simple Resort provides a pleasant escape into the world of leisure and strategy, making it a must-try for those seeking a laid-back and enjoyable gaming adventure.

Backpacking


Backpacking delivers an exhilarating and immersive gaming experience. Players embark on a thrilling journey through various natural landscapes, completing challenges and quests while camping and exploring. The gameplay combines adventure, survival, and teamwork, making it both exciting and cooperative. The game's stunning visuals and dynamic environments add to the overall immersion. Backpacking offers an unforgettable experience of outdoor exploration, fostering camaraderie among players as they navigate the wilderness together. It's a must-play for anyone seeking adventure and excitement within the RobloxGo universe.

Desert Island Survival



Desert Island Survival delivers a gripping and immersive gaming experience. Players find themselves stranded on a deserted island, tasked with gathering resources, building shelter, and surviving various challenges. The gameplay is a thrilling blend of exploration, crafting, and strategy, keeping players engaged and on their toes. The game's realistic environments and attention to detail enhance the overall immersion. Desert Island Survival offers a satisfying and intense adventure, encouraging players to test their survival skills and creativity in a captivating virtual world. It's a must-try for those seeking a challenging and immersive survival experience within RobloxGo.

Mt. Everest Climbing Roleplay


Mt. Everest Climbing Roleplay provides a unique and immersive gaming adventure. Players take on the role of climbers, attempting to conquer the world's highest peak, Mt. Everest. The gameplay is a thrilling mix of strategy and teamwork, as participants must navigate treacherous terrain, endure extreme weather, and make critical decisions to reach the summit. The game's attention to detail and breathtaking mountain vistas enhance the overall experience. Mt. Everest Climbing Roleplay offers an exhilarating and educational journey, fostering teamwork and determination, making it a captivating choice for those seeking a challenging and realistic mountaineering experience within RobloxGo.

All said and done, if you've enjoyed the captivating adventure of Expedition Antarctica, you should definitely explore the similar thrills offered by RobloxGo games mentioned above. These games all provide unique and immersive experiences, whether you're into strategy, exploration, survival, or roleplay.

short_description: An innovative campaign about self-care that brings an immersive experience with retail in-game rewards to redefine skin confidence has been created by Dentsu, Differin, and Dubit in an acne care effort on Roblox.
content_html:
Dentsu, Differin, and Dubit Bring Acne Care to Roblox with In-Game Rewards

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
An innovative campaign about self-care that brings an immersive experience with retail in-game rewards to redefine skin confidence has been created by Dentsu, Differin, and Dubit in an acne care effort on Roblox.

What if attending the next game session was about more than upgrading the avatar? What if it also taught you a thing or two about upgrading skin-care techniques? This is exactly what is happening as part of the work between Dentsu, Differin, and Dubit to create the first-ever acne care brand experience on Roblox. It is indeed rewriting the script of self-care education, seamlessly marrying gaming, health, and entertainment into one online adventure.

Here, we peek through a very high magnification microscope at what the initiative is doing, the stands it occupies, and the uproar of its favor among players.

Gaming meets skincare: A revolution in Roblox


Roblox is no longer just a game site, it is entering into a digital space of creativity, connection, and an infusion with acne care. Differin took its skin care trusted name into the walls of a virtual place, working with the big names Dentsu and Dubit to create the most special experience to bring to players.

This would probably be a first for Roblox that a skincare marketing company gets involved in shaping an internal part of the game ecosystem, rather than merely a sponsor. Differin wants to reach the cool kids with tech by embedding its message in a fun and familiar setting so that acne education can easily become part of their habits.

The Mission: Building Skin Confidence


At its core, this campaign runs with a loud message that acne is normal, and skin care is a vital step to self-love. Dentsu and Differin have designed this virtual experience through which players can be taught skin care in a not-so-patronizing way. Instead of cramming all knowledge mashed into a long and winding line of reasoning, it gambles the whole learning experience into an adventure.

The virtual place advocates self-belief in that players would realize that skincare does not merely mean looking good but feeling good too. Differin's presence within Roblox on an already somewhat stigmatized topic was to ensure that acne care goes on to be a little bit more open and relatable for the younger audience.

In-game Benefits: What's In It For Players?


Players aren't merely learning- they're winning. The Differin's Roblox experience is full of in-game excitement, such as exclusive badges, limited edition items, and all the extra goodies that make the experience more engaging and motivate them to interact with the brand in a fun virtual playground.
Imagine a mission where maybe you end up with your avatar looking great and your real-life self armed with the knowledge of how to take care of acne. This is the type of brilliance brought by this partnership. For those who are looking to explore the many distinct experiences Roblox has to offer, Roblox Go serves as the perfect one-stop shop for all new updates.

Live Retail: Make the Brand Come Alive


Differin's recent entrance into Roblox has no significance for a simple addition of the game's content; it is also an introduction to immersive retail. Users access popular products of Differin virtually but in entertaining and educational ways, which extend their interaction with the brand. It's like window shopping; the window is a screen, while the store is an incredible gamified wonderland.

Real-life important connections grow, and almost manage to enforce the ideas of virtual and reality. No, it manages to show how digital spaces bridge education-consumer engagement gaps.

The larger picture


This connects to studying the larger importance of Dentsu's move to get Differin into Roblox. That's not just smart marketing—it is a cultural statement.
It indicates the role that online places such as Roblox can play in real-world change for that to be the digitized-accessible transformation-entertaining way in. Normalizing acne care in such an interactive space leads the gamer to think of self-care as a fun and important part of life. It shows how brands today can connect more deeply and profoundly with their consumers through the use of technology.

True Collaboration Revolution in Gaming


Indeed, Dentsu, Differin, and Dubit are collaborators who are highly motivating partners in what promises to be a very exciting evolution in gaming and self-care learning. This collaboration has bound together both the virtual and real worlds into the development of something not only fun but also meaningful.

For players, this is much more than an opportunity to enter a virtual space: they are rewarded with practical knowledge and confidence while enjoying exclusive perks within the game. For the industry, this is further proof that game-play interfaces such as Roblox are ripe for the development of impact-driven campaigns through gaming.

Curiosity was piqued about what Roblox might get its game on. - Head on over to Roblox Go to know more and see the latest adventures. With campaigns like these raising the bar ever higher, the possibilities are endless.

Fun Things to Do in Brookhaven on Roblox

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Brookhaven on Roblox offers endless fun but, there’s still quite a lot you haven’t explored and, in this article, we’ll be highlighting some fun stuff you can do in Brookhaven.

Brookhaven is a renowned Roblox game that has skyrocketed to fame due to its immersive virtual world and diverse gameplay experiences. In this open-world game, players can explore a vibrant and sprawling city, interact with other users, engage in thrilling activities, and even create their own unique adventures. Its popularity can be attributed to its exceptional blend of role-playing, social interaction and the freedom it grants players to shape their own stories within its digital universe. Whether you're into thrilling mysteries, friendly social gatherings, or action-packed adventures, Brookhaven offers something for everyone. Despite the fun it offers, we’re here to introduce you to some fun activities you can enjoy while playing this game.

Copying Other People’s Outfits

It's a fun way to experiment with fashion, show off your style, and even engage in friendly fashion competitions with fellow players. Whether you're going for a casual look or a more extravagant outfit, Brookhaven's wardrobe options are bound to keep you entertained.

Working at the Brookhaven Hospital

For those who enjoy role-playing and helping others, working at the Brookhaven Hospital can be a rewarding experience. You can take on the role of a doctor or nurse, attending to patients and even performing surgery in the game's realistic medical setting. This role-playing aspect adds depth to the game and allows you to contribute positively to the Brookhaven community.

Raiding Houses in Brookhaven

If you're feeling adventurous and looking for a thrilling challenge, consider raiding houses in Brookhaven. Some players build intricate and maze-like houses filled with hidden treasures. Grab some friends, explore these elaborate abodes, and see if you can uncover the secrets within. Just be prepared for some unexpected surprises along the way – it's all part of the fun!

Adopting a Kid in Brookhaven


Brookhaven caters to those who want to experience the joys of parenthood virtually. You can adopt a child in the game and embark on a parenting journey. Teach them valuable life skills, take them on adventures, and create lasting memories together. It's a heartwarming aspect of the game that adds depth and a sense of responsibility to your virtual life.

Editing People in Brookhaven


For the creative souls out there, Brookhaven offers a unique feature – the ability to edit and customize other players. You can adjust their appearances, change their outfits, and even give them a complete makeover. This creative freedom allows for endless possibilities, from styling your friends for special occasions to crafting entirely new personas for them.

All in all, Roblox Brookhaven is a sandbox of endless entertainment where you can immerse yourself in a multitude of exciting activities. Whether you're a fashion enthusiast, a role-playing aficionado, an adventure seeker, a nurturing parent, or a creative designer, there's something in Brookhaven for everyone.
