title: 5 Best Roblox FPS Games for Shooter Fans
image_title: RobloxGo - 5 Best Roblox FPS Games for Shooter Fans
image_alt: RobloxGo - 5 Best Roblox FPS Games for Shooter Fans - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Enter the world of RobloxGo as we’re here to familiarize FPS-lovers to some stellar games that they simply cannot miss out on.
content_html:
5 Best Roblox FPS Games for Shooter Fans

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Enter the world of RobloxGo as we’re here to familiarize FPS-lovers to some stellar games that they simply cannot miss out on.

RobloxGo offers a diverse and exciting range of FPS games that cater to a wide audience of gamers. These games vary in style and gameplay, providing players with an array of experiences to enjoy. From fast-paced action-packed shooters to tactical and strategy-based games, Roblox has it all. What makes these FPS games on Roblox even more enjoyable is the ability for players to customize their characters and weapons, as well as the opportunity to collaborate with friends or compete against other players in thrilling virtual battles.

Big Paintball


Big Paintball on RobloxGo is a delightful blend of action and creativity. The gameplay revolves around engaging in paintball battles within various vibrant and well-designed arenas. The shooting mechanics are intuitive, making it easy for players to pick up and enjoy. The overall experience is a blast, with intense firefights, strategic positioning, and the satisfying splatter of paint as you hit your targets. The game offers a perfect balance of casual fun and competitive action, making it a must-try for anyone looking for an enjoyable and colorful FPS experience within the Roblox universe.

Phantom Forces PC


Phantom Forces is a standout FPS game, offering an immersive and exhilarating experience. The gameplay is fast-paced and strategic, with a variety of maps and modes to keep players engaged. The shooting mechanics are polished, providing a realistic and satisfying feel to every firefight. The overall experience is top-notch, as Phantom Forces delivers intense battles, teamwork opportunities, and a skill-based progression system that keeps players coming back for more. It's a remarkable example of what Roblox can offer in terms of high-quality, competitive gaming, making it a must-play for FPS enthusiasts.

Counter Blox


Counter Blox offers a thrilling FPS experience reminiscent of the popular Counter-Strike series. The gameplay is both competitive and engaging, with players navigating various maps to complete objectives or eliminate opponents. The shooting mechanics are precise and satisfying, demanding accuracy and teamwork. The overall experience is exceptional, as Counter Blox delivers the classic Counter-Strike gameplay within Roblox's creative environment. It's a testament to the platform's versatility, providing fans of tactical shooters with an enjoyable and well-crafted experience that captures the essence of its inspiration. Counter Blox is a must-try for FPS enthusiasts on RobloxGo.

Strucid


Strucid is a fast-paced and exciting battle royale game that offers a fantastic gameplay experience. The shooting mechanics are smooth and responsive, allowing players to engage in intense gunfights with precision. With its emphasis on building, strategy, and quick reflexes, Strucid provides an overall thrilling experience that keeps players coming back for more. It's a compelling alternative to popular battle royale titles and showcases the potential of Roblox in delivering enjoyable and competitive gaming experiences. For those seeking a dynamic and action-packed battle royale game within the Roblox platform, Strucid is a must-play.

Bad Business


Bad Business offers an exhilarating FPS experience that stands out with its polished gameplay. The mechanics are precise and responsive, making gunfights intense and satisfying. The game's fast-paced action, combined with its customizable loadouts and diverse maps, creates an engaging overall experience. title: IKEA Launches The Co-Worker Game on Roblox
image_title: RobloxGo - IKEA Launches The Co-Worker Game on Roblox
image_alt: RobloxGo - IKEA Launches The Co-Worker Game on Roblox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: As if the furniture wasn’t fascinating enough, IKEA is now here with their very own game and, we’ll be discussing it in detail in this article.
content_html:
IKEA Launches The Co-Worker Game on Roblox

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
As if the furniture wasn’t fascinating enough, IKEA is now here with their very own game and, we’ll be discussing it in detail in this article.

Forget tiny plastic bricks and trips to the Swedish meatball haven – IKEA is taking a digital leap into the world of RobloxGo with The Co-Worker Game! Launching on June 24th, this innovative experience lets players ditch the couch and step into a virtual IKEA, offering a unique blend of exploration, creative expression, and, wait for it, paid work. Buckle up as we unpack the features, gameplay, and what this all means for the ever-evolving Roblox landscape.

Building More Than Just Furniture: Exploring the IKEAverse


The Co-Worker Game transports you to a meticulously crafted virtual IKEA store. Think of it as a digital playground where you can roam expansive showrooms, brimming with everyone's favorite homeware. Just like a real IKEA, you can get lost (virtually, of course) amidst towering shelves of KALLAXes and BILLY bookcases. Feel free to experiment with different furniture combinations and design your dream living room or kitchen right there in the digital realm.

But unlike a real IKEA trip, you won't get lost with an Allen wrench in one hand and a vague instruction manual in the other. The Co-Worker Game boasts intuitive controls, letting you effortlessly pick up, move, and arrange virtual furniture to your heart's content. It's the perfect platform to unleash your inner interior designer, experimenting with different styles and layouts without the hassle (or expense) of real-life furniture shopping.

Working for the Weekend (Virtually): The Pioneering Work System


Here's where IKEA takes things to a whole new level. The Co-Worker Game introduces a groundbreaking "work" element, allowing players to take on actual jobs within the virtual IKEA. Ten lucky individuals (applications closed on June 16th) will be selected as paid virtual co-workers. These chosen few will earn the same hourly rate as a real IKEA employee in London, performing tasks inspired by real-life IKEA roles.

Imagine greeting virtual customers, guiding them through the digital aisles, and even recommending the perfect rug for their pixelated living room. Food enthusiasts can put their virtual culinary skills to the test by serving up everyone's favorite Swedish meatballs at the in-game Bistro. Just like a real job, there's room for growth too. Players can climb the virtual career ladder, transitioning from the showroom floor to different departments, mirroring the diverse career paths available at IKEA in the real world.

This innovative work system isn't just about earning some Robux (Roblox's virtual currency). It's a chance to experience the dynamic and rewarding world of IKEA careers firsthand. Players get a taste of the teamwork, customer interaction, and problem-solving skills that come with working in this global retail giant.

Furnishing the Future of Roblox: A Bold Move


The Co-Worker Game is a bold experiment that pushes the boundaries of the Roblox experience. While other brands within the platform offer virtual storefronts and product placements, IKEA's unique approach goes a step further. It seamlessly blends play with work, providing a platform for both entertainment and exploration of potential career paths.

This innovative approach has the potential to attract a new generation of players to the Roblox community. It caters not just to those who love building and decorating but also to those curious about the world of work. It's a win-win for IKEA, allowing them to connect with a younger demographic and showcase their unique work culture in a fun and interactive way.

Whether you crave the thrill of virtual interior design or the satisfaction of a virtual paycheck, The Co-Worker Game promises a one-of-a-kind IKEA experience. So, mark your calendars for June 24th and get ready to dive into the IKEAverse – who knows, you might just discover your dream job (or living room layout) along the way!

As always, RobloxGo is here with some more bangers for players to enjoy in 2024 so scroll through this article and get familiar with these games you have to play in 2024.

RobloxGo is set to unveil an array of incredible games in 2024, igniting excitement within its player community. With the platform's ever-expanding developer talent and innovative tools, players can anticipate an assortment of captivating and diverse experiences. From immersive role-playing adventures to cutting-edge simulations and thrilling action games, Roblox is continuously pushing the boundaries of what's possible. In this article, we’re bringing 4 fantastic games that you’ll have to play in 2024.

Anime Champions Simulator


Anime Champions Simulator offers a unique and entertaining gameplay experience. Players can immerse themselves in the world of their favorite anime characters and battle it out with others in epic showdowns. The game's mechanics are easy to grasp, making it accessible to a wide audience. The overall experience is enjoyable, particularly for anime enthusiasts who can relish the opportunity to see their favorite characters in action. Anime Champions Simulator provides a fun and competitive environment within the Roblox platform, offering a refreshing and entertaining twist on the typical simulator genre.

Blade Ball


Blade Ball is a captivating blend of strategy and action. The gameplay involves players controlling a spinning blade to knock opponents off a platform, akin to a thrilling game of "king of the hill." The mechanics are intuitive, allowing for strategic movement and tactical maneuvers. The overall experience is both exciting and competitive, with matches often leading to intense showdowns. Blade Ball's unique concept and engaging gameplay make it a standout choice for those seeking quick and enjoyable multiplayer battles on the Roblox platform.

All Star Tower Defense


All Star Tower Defense offers an engaging and addictive gameplay experience. Players assemble a team of anime characters with unique abilities to defend against waves of enemies. The strategic elements and tower placement mechanics are easy to grasp yet offer depth for those seeking a challenge. The game's overall experience is both enjoyable and rewarding, with frequent updates introducing new characters and content. All-Star Tower Defense's fusion of strategy and anime fandom makes it a standout title in the Roblox library, appealing to both tower defense enthusiasts and anime fans alike.

Natural Disaster Survival


Natural Disaster Survival delivers a thrilling and unique gameplay experience. Players find themselves in various disaster scenarios, from earthquakes to floods, and must navigate the terrain and obstacles to stay alive. The mechanics are simple yet challenging, promoting quick thinking and adaptability. The overall experience is a rollercoaster of excitement, as each round brings unpredictable disasters and an opportunity to test your survival skills. Natural Disaster Survival fosters a sense of camaraderie as players work together to endure the chaos, making it a consistently enjoyable and cooperative multiplayer game on the Roblox platform.

title: Roblox Christmas Ideas - Fun Ways to Celebrate with Friends
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox Christmas Ideas - Fun Ways to Celebrate with Friends

short_description: Merge the fun of Christmas with Roblox as we’re here with some amazing ideas to help you celebrate Christmas with friends through Roblox.
content_html:
Roblox Christmas Ideas - Fun Ways to Celebrate with Friends

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Merge the fun of Christmas with Roblox as we’re here with some amazing ideas to help you celebrate Christmas with friends through Roblox.

Celebrating Christmas on Roblox becomes an extraordinary and immersive experience through the inclusion of special festive events in various games on the platform. Players can dive into winter wonderlands, where virtual snowflakes gently fall and vibrant holiday decorations adorn the landscapes. From sleigh rides and snowball fights to virtual gift exchanges, Roblox games amplify the joy of the season by fostering a sense of community and shared celebration.

The creativity of game developers shines through in the intricate design of holiday-themed worlds, making Christmas on Roblox a truly magical and memorable experience for players of all ages.

1. Immersing in the fun-filled in-game Events


RobloxGo offers a plethora of games with special Christmas events, and two standouts are Adopt Me and BedWars. In Adopt Me players can partake in a winter wonderland filled with festive activities like building snowmen, decorating homes with twinkling lights, and even adopting holiday-themed pets. The sense of community is amplified as players collaborate to complete tasks and spread joy together.

Similarly, BedWars transforms its gameplay during the holiday season, introducing snowy maps, seasonal challenges, and special rewards. Playing these games with friends not only enhances the enjoyment but also creates lasting memories of shared virtual festivities.

2. The Joy of Sharing Gifts


Take the Roblox celebration beyond the screen by incorporating the spirit of the platform into real-life gift-giving. Consider gifting Roblox-themed merchandise, such as clothing, accessories, or even virtual item codes, to fellow Roblox enthusiasts. This not only spreads holiday cheer but also strengthens the connection between the virtual and physical worlds. Whether it's a stylish Roblox hoodie or a plush toy inspired by popular in-game characters, these gifts serve as tangible reminders of the joyous Roblox community during the festive season.

3. Trying out new Games


One of the best ways to embrace the holiday spirit on Roblox is by exploring new games and experiences tailored for the season. Developers often release limited-time Christmas-themed games that introduce players to innovative gameplay mechanics and captivating narratives. Whether it's a winter obstacle course, a festive scavenger hunt, or a virtual holiday party, these experiences offer a refreshing twist to the traditional gaming routine. Trying out these new games not only adds excitement to the holiday season but also supports the creativity of the Roblox developer community.

To help you get your hands on some truly incredible games, we’re here to help. You can try Arsenal, a game that delivers fast-paced action with a diverse arsenal of weapons and intense gameplay. Its dynamic maps and thrilling gunfights make it a must-play for fans of the action arcade genre, offering a satisfying and adrenaline-pumping experience in a virtual battleground.

You can also try MeepCity, a vibrant virtual world that captivates players with its social features and entertaining activities. From customizable avatars to interactive games and virtual pets, MeepCity offers a delightful and engaging experience for those seeking a lively and social gaming environment on the platform.

All in all, Christmas can be made fun in many ways, and merging Roblox with the festive holiday takes thing to a whole new level.

image_title: RobloxGo - 5 Uncopylocked Roblox Games Worth Playing
image_alt: RobloxGo - 5 Uncopylocked Roblox Games Worth Playing - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Roblox features an impressive collection of Uncopylocked games and they sure are worth trying so, read through this article and find out which games have made our list.
content_html:
5 Uncopylocked Roblox Games Worth Playing

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Roblox features an impressive collection of Uncopylocked games and they sure are worth trying so, read through this article and find out which games have made our list.

Uncopylocked games in RobloxGo refer to games that have intentionally been left open for users to access and modify. Unlike typical RobloxGo games where the source code and assets are usually protected, uncopylocked games allow users to view and edit the game's components freely. This openness provides an opportunity for aspiring game developers to learn from and experiment with existing games, gaining insights into scripting, building, and game design. Uncopylocked games contribute to the collaborative and educational nature of the RobloxGo platform, fostering a community where users can share knowledge and creativity in game development.

The Laser Tag Arena


The Laser Tag Arena a standout in the realm of RobloxGo Uncopylocked games, delivers an exhilarating gameplay experience. With its well-designed arena and immersive laser tag battles, the game captivates players with fast-paced action and strategic intensity. The standout features include dynamic lighting effects that enhance the futuristic ambiance, coupled with a user-friendly interface for an accessible gaming experience. The Laser Tag Arena stands out among Uncopylocked games on RobloxGo, offering a thrilling virtual battleground where players can engage in adrenaline-pumping laser tag matches.

Zombie Tower


Zombie Tower immerses players in a thrilling survival experience. The gameplay seamlessly blends strategic tower defense with intense zombie encounters, keeping players on their toes. The tower-building mechanics allow for creative defense strategies, while the relentless waves of zombies provide a challenging and engaging experience. The game's best features include a diverse arsenal of weapons, dynamic environments, and cooperative play options. Zombie Tower excels in delivering an adrenaline-fueled adventure, making it a top choice for those seeking an immersive and action-packed Roblox gaming experience.

Football Legends


Football Legends delivers an immersive football experience. The gameplay captures the essence of the sport with fluid controls, realistic animations, and dynamic matches. Its best features include a variety of teams and players, each with unique skills, fostering strategic and competitive gameplay. The game's attention to detail, from the stadium design to the ball physics, enhances the overall realism. Football Legends stands out for its ability to recreate the excitement of football within the Roblox universe, making it a must-play for sports gaming enthusiasts.

The Impossible Obby


The Impossible Obby offers a thrilling challenge for obstacle course enthusiasts. The gameplay is a test of agility and precision, featuring a series of increasingly difficult obstacles. Its best features lie in the meticulously designed courses, pushing players' skills to the limit while maintaining an addictive quality. The visually striking and diverse environments enhance the overall experience. The Impossible Obby is a testament to creative level design and offers a rewarding yet demanding journey, making it a favorite among players seeking a challenging and visually captivating Roblox adventure.

Space Frontier


Space Frontier stands out among Roblox Uncopylocked games, offering an exceptional galactic adventure. The gameplay revolves around interstellar exploration and strategic decision-making, allowing players to build and manage their space colonies. The exceptional aspect lies in the game's seamless integration of resource management, space exploration, and cooperative play. The visually stunning cosmic landscapes and diverse celestial bodies enhance the immersive experience. Space Frontier excels in providing a unique blend of simulation and strategy, making it an outstanding choice.

Overall, the collection is quite big. If you're looking to explore more uncopylocked Roblox games, RobloxGo is the place to be. Feel free to checkout what uncopylocked Roblox games we have to offer!

image_alt: RobloxGo - RobloxGo Charts - The Top Games Everyone’s Playing Right Now - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Almost everyone is aware of the gazillion games available to be played on Roblox. However, there are games that stand out among the rest. Let's take a look at the top chart categories and an example game from each.
content_html:
RobloxGo Charts - The Top Games Everyone’s Playing Right Now

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Almost everyone is aware of the gazillion games available to be played on Roblox. However, there are games that stand out among the rest. Let's take a look at the top chart categories and an example game from each.

With the continual growth of Roblox through the years, the platform has become inundated with a myriad of content. Regardless, this is precisely what the platform was intended to do, be a mega database of online games and experiences that both Roblox users and community members can enjoy. With that, we list down the top different game categories in the Top 100 game charts of the best Roblox games to give both gamers and users an idea of the ever-growing number of games available on the platform today.



Most Played Roblox Games


The Most Played Roblox Games category is just that. These are the games with the most number of visits and players playing them. Not all games uploaded to Roblox become so popular and interesting as to warrant a huge number of online users playing them, and these games stand out among the crowd.

An example game of this category is Brookhaven RP. Though the game is practically a version of the original Brookhaven game intended for Roblox players in the Philippines, the game has currently overrun the most visited Roblox game, which is Adopt Me. Brookhaven RP currently has a running total of 40,053,384,504 visits. Incidentally, the Philippines is also currently the biggest player base of Roblox today.


Most Thumbed Up Roblox Games


As there are games with the most number of visits, there are games with the most number of likes. Although some games have many people playing them, the thumbs-up icon is still an important means of measuring the likeability of a game. The Most Thumbed Up Roblox Games charts show just that.

An example of this is naturally Adopt Me. This game happens to be also one of the top earning games on the platform. Somehow, the idea of adopting a variety of pets (or kids) and taking care of them also seems to be at the top of the list of interesting activities for the young and the young at heart. Adopt Me has around 34,853,760,895 player visits.


Top Players Favorite Roblox Games


These are the top games for favorites (the heart icon). Again, a game may have a gazillion players but not a favorite game, and likewise, a game may not have a huge player base, but those who play it do click the heart icon. These are the Top Players Favorite Roblox Games.

An example is Jailbreak. This game is not only popular but a real favorite as well. Kids (and even adults) have been playing cops and robbers for a long long time and playing this in Roblox gives one the thrill of the good old days. The game has around 6,619,429,036 visits.


Top Roblox 2 Player Games


There are games in Roblox that require at least 2 players to play. Not all games on the platform are a solo or competitive experience. There are times when co-op gaming can provide lots of fun and interesting activities to do. These are the Top Roblox 2 Player Games.

A good example would be Altitorture, a 2-player-Obby game where you really have to team up with a friend to climb out of the deep pit you are both in. In this kind of game, teamwork is the key, and it will take more than an elastic rope to get you both to the top. So far, around 145,817,070 players have accepted the challenge.

Top Roblox Adventure Games


Adventure games have always been a top genre in the gaming world. Ever since people started using home computers for gaming, adventures were always on top of the gaming list. Roblox has its gargantuan share of adventure games in the Top Roblox Adventure Games".Almost any kind of adventure can be found on Roblox.

An example is Hide and Seek Extreme. We all played hide and seek at one time or another in our lives. 2,552,766,772 Roblox players did. Whether you're the "It" or the one who has to hide, the game never fails to provide one with a mini-adventure of a lifetime. So, I'll start counting now, 10,9,8...

These categories are but a few in the very long list of Roblox Charts game categories. You can check them all out at the Best Roblox Games-Top 100 Chart.

title: Roblox vs Fortnite - The Hidden Battle for Players and Creativity
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox vs Fortnite - The Hidden Battle for Players and Creativity
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox vs Fortnite - The Hidden Battle for Players and Creativity - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: There's a lot of talk about the competition between Roblox and Fortnite these days. There's an unseen contest between the two online gaming platforms, and the battle between their popularity and user-created content may just be the icing on the cake.
content_html:
Roblox vs Fortnite - The Hidden Battle for Players and Creativity

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
There's a lot of talk about the competition between Roblox and Fortnite these days. There's an unseen contest between the two online gaming platforms, and the battle between their popularity and user-created content may just be the icing on the cake.

We must consider that there is a vast difference between Fortnite and Roblox. We cannot just compare these two in a way one compares CounterStrike to Unreal Tournament and other similar shooter/FPS games. Roblox was created from the very start as a platform for presenting simple educational game experiences. The venue was an experimental endeavor when it first publicly came out in 2004, with voxel-type blocky graphics to boot, which kids were likely to gravitate to.

Fortnite, which came out in 2017, was (and still is) an MMO shooter online game competing against similar Battle Royale type MMO shooters like PUBG and maybe Apex Legends. Although Roblox and Fortnite have attracted crowds in the millions, people play them for entirely different reasons. However, due to the variety of games and genres that populate the "Roblox library of games" (so to speak), even FPS battle royale fans can be seen playing such genre-oriented games on the platform.

The Roblox Initiative


Most Roblox players (and even creators) are the child at heart. Of course, even in the most supposedly child-safe environment, predators can exist. However, this is another topic, and Roblox has updated its security features to counteract such things. Roblox was created to provide fun, educational, and immersive experiences within its platform. Thus, the concept and the character of Roblox's beloved Builderman. Building was the platform's primary goal, and as the years went by, Roblox started attracting a growing crowd of both those who wanted to make and those who just wanted to play.

Roblox aimed to generate user-created content from the get-go, and when the company began to monetize the activity, the crowd at Roblox exponentially grew. Giving the builders, asset creators, and even players the option to earn by contributing uniquely to Roblox and its ever-growing community while having fun with the same community made it a trendy and fun place to be.


Roblox approaches growth in a slower and more profoundly gradual way. The platform's priority is its users' creativity via the Roblox Studio, LUA game programming, and asset and resource creation. Roblox (whether we like it or not) is also a platform for children. Although the platform developer/company rates it for 13 and up, Roblox is a game library for children as young as 3 or 5. Roblox maintains strict guidelines for games available to both the young and the young at heart, although several games on the platform have been restricted to older users.

Regardless, Roblox is probably the most extensive online data resource community for building games. The platform is a one-stop shop where you will find all the tools and resources you may need to craft your unique game experiences and upload them for the entire community to peruse, enjoy, and see. Although you may only get about 25-30 percent of your game’s total earnings from the Roblox premium players, that will still be a considerable sum, considering millions are surfing the platform on any given day.

As mentioned, Roblox is a bit slow-paced regarding game-spanning and consumer activity. However, building up through the years with a mountain of resources, creativity, user content, and earnings piling up from year to year, Roblox has become one of the most formidable multi-media gaming sites on the Internet today. Roblox has turned its platform into a way of life where community members can go to relax and spend their time (to socialize and play), and this looks like it's going to continue, provided the company provides more opportunity and equitability to its creator-users, as well as maintaining its growth. Also, regarding providing resources for game building within the platform, Roblox is probably the most significant source of online information and tools a would-be developer may ever need to start their game development career.

Online Battle Royale


On the other hand, Fortnite was released online in 2017 as an MMO shooter game initially under the battle royale genre. We all know how popular FPS/TPS games are and how they have practically ruled the game scenes in concurrence with real-time strategy tactics and role-playing. Fortnite is foremost a shooter game with a thrilling and hilarious deathmatch orientation. This has led to the game’s success and the exponential growth in online players desiring to experience the game. Fortnite has accumulated millions of daily active players, surpassing even that of Roblox (although a straight comparison would not be practical as they both have different markets).

First- and third-person battle royales have become so popular in recent years, and with many competitions, tournaments, and events surrounding these games, their popularity has skyrocketed. Recently, Epic Games, which has developed and owns Fortnite, has implemented a monetized user-creator feature to its online MMO shooter game to turn Fortnite into a User Generated Content (UGC) platform similar to Roblox. Epic provides players and users the tools and resources to make their content, like assets, maps, and even fully functional games within the Fortnite platform.

Like Roblox, Epic will give its users access to the Unreal game engine via a Fortnite creator studio to let them generate their creations (in multiple genres) and upload them to a Fortnite experience library. Also, Epic will be providing a more significant initiative to its creators, around 40% of the creator game's total earnings. With the vast number of players visiting the Fortnite platform today, this will ensure stiff competition in terms of numbers and earnings to platforms like Roblox and others that are user-monetized.


The potential for a Fortnite and Unreal game engine games library platform is massive. However, it will not be as easy as it looks because there will be a lot of work needed on the side of Epic Games, the Fortnite platform, and its users in the coming days. The Unreal game engine is not as easy to program and use as Roblox Studio and LUA language programming. Unreal uses a proprietary programming language like C++, so yeah, good luck to everyone. Also,

Despite having a sizeable resource and asset base available for its (up-and-coming) experience creators, Fortnite still has a long way to go to catch up with the gazillion resources that Roblox has. The only thing Fortnite has against Roblox (although, as stated, it is not a practical comparison) would be the much more realistic graphics. After all, it's hard to have serious gameplay when an opponent looks like a smiling block-like cartoon chasing you.


Roblox is vastly different from Fortnite; although we can somewhat compare the amount of engagement and user content they have against each other, there is still no comparison in all practicality. With EA announcing that they also plan to upload The Sims 4 or rather an online version of the game with its user-creation platform to go after both Roblox and Fortnite, we have to

title: The Future of Roblox - What’s Coming Next for Players and Creators
image_title: RobloxGo - The Future of Roblox - What’s Coming Next for Players and Creators
image_alt: RobloxGo - The Future of Roblox - What’s Coming Next for Players and Creators - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: As Roblox continues to evolve as a platform, one can't help to wonder what the platform will be like in the near future. Let's take a look at what Roblox is currently working on that will give us a glimpse of what lies ahead.
content_html:
The Future of Roblox - What’s Coming Next for Players and Creators

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
As Roblox continues to evolve as a platform, one can't help to wonder what the platform will be like in the near future. Let's take a look at what Roblox is currently working on that will give us a glimpse of what lies ahead.

When Roblox was first released in 2004, no one would have believed that an educational online platform with block-style graphics would become the global giant it is today with thousands of games and experiences, as seen in the RobloxGo charts. As the platform grew and advanced through the years, gaining millions of users from around the globe, Roblox has always made it a point to deliver a user-friendly and creative environment to every single person of whatever age, race, or ethnicity in a single substantial online global community where everyone can have fun, make friends, play games and express one's talent and creativity.

Today, the platform has around 58.5 million daily active users and gamers from more than 180 countries worldwide. The potential for profit and development due to the number of users logging in is massively staggering. These facts have prompted Roblox to continue evolving its platform to the best it can be to give its patrons a better and more fruitful experience, as well as reasons to continue with its usage.

With this, the company has outlined what it intends to do and where it will be directing the platform in the days to come during its most recent meetings of the RDC (Roblox Developers Conference), where Roblox game, asset, and content developers, as well as users, are encouraged to attend to keep abreast of the latest updates that the platform has to offer. With that, let's take a look at some of Roblox's development and updates that lie ahead.


Looking Good in Roblox


Almost everyone who plays and creates on Roblox wants to look as good as the guys and gals of Roblox. Looking good (at least in Avatar mode) has always been a priority to almost anyone, and the ability to customize the little computer person who represents you (to make you stand out from the rest) is a significant part of one's self-expression. Thus, Roblox will be introducing updates and has already begun implementing features such as Layered Clothing and avatar facial expressions, among others, in the platform's store. Animation capture tools to work in Studio have been included in the updates to customize both faces and bodies and have been made easy by using the user's device camera to create fantastic animations for your custom avatars.

Additional Development Tools


Roblox Creator Studio has been updated to make it easier for developers to access coordination and support. Studio's look, feel, and interface have been updated so the creator can customize it easily. This will make things much more user-friendly in the days to come. New features have been added to the creator's online data storage, place publishing, cross-server messaging, and access to assets and resources during development and programming via new application programming interfaces. To simplify, Roblox will continue to make it much easier for creators to create more content.

Communication is the Key



One of the limitations that Roblox suffered through the years was the lack of voiced communication support. Even if you were saying something out loud, there was no mic feature to let the other players hear what you were hollering at them. Roblox has taken steps to change this in the future by slowly implementing natural chat into experience and game development. New games can make talking into a mic and being heard a part of the overall experience. The fun thing with Roblox is the surround effect, where others can listen to you better as your avatar gets nearer to them. Chatting with others will become as natural as meeting them in person.

Likewise, your desktop or device camera will be able to capture your facial expression, so be careful with your looks, as others will see the same face from your avatar.

A Better 3D Engine


Roblox continually updates the creator Studio and its game engine to provide a smoother and higher-quality gaming experience. The Roblox game engine is no doubt way behind if compared to the likes of Unity or Unreal. Although Roblox is Roblox and will always have the blocky trademark Voxel-based cuteness of its residents, a lot more can be done to improve the performance of its software game machine. One is parallel scripting (running codes simultaneously) for LUA to make things much faster than running run processes one at a time. Speeding things up without sacrificing framerate or stability sums things up.

As mentioned earlier, faster access to resources using unique interfaces while developing the app will make productivity easier. It would be best if you had something and, with a quick search, click add it right then and there to your map easily. Additional features in asset manipulation will add and create more exciting experiences with the use of Constructive Solid Geometry that lets you create objects that make other things—something to look forward to.

The Robux Will Continue to Rule


The game's name is “Earn,” not only for Roblox but anyone who wants to do so. The almighty Robux and the platform's economy are continually going strong. In 2022 alone, an estimated 2.7 million users were earning Robux, and over 580 Million USD have been paid to Roblox experience creators through the Developer Exchange Program. Aside from these, earnings via Ads and the Marketplace are also ongoing. Regarding ads, Roblox has considered the potential of ad-generated income (which YouTube has been soaking in for quite a while now), so the platform will include ad experiences in the coming days. Finally, trading within Roblox will be encouraged for user-created items and those that will be a bit hard to find.

The Roblox Community



Roblox today exists for people. The community is everything in Roblox. People bring life, creativity, and fun to the platform and will continue to be Roblox's priority. Roblox will continue to upgrade and update its “Discovery” feature. The more and faster new experiences are created, the better. Roblox is determined, however, to make sure each new game is classified accordingly for the appropriate audience and done in an up-to-date manner. Experiences organized for the youngest players and those they should never have access to will be strictly monitored and maintained. The foremost objective is for the community (both Young and Old) to enjoy and be immersed in these experiences by preserving the quality of the community. Roblox has come a long way and will have a long way to go with continued growth and development.

title: Why Roblox Belongs on Nintendo Switch
image_title: RobloxGo - Why Roblox Belongs on Nintendo Switch
image_alt: RobloxGo - Why Roblox Belongs on Nintendo Switch - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Let's take a look as to why Roblox and the Nintendo Switch could be a match made in heaven.
content_html:
Why Roblox Belongs on Nintendo Switch

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Let's take a look as to why Roblox and the Nintendo Switch could be a match made in heaven.

Roblox is one of the top gaming and social media platforms today. Online users and gamers of all ages visit the site just to meet and play with cute and blocky characters of all shapes and sizes. Likewise, The Nintendo Switch is considered the dream handheld gaming console of today. As to whether Roblox should be officially available on Switch, let's take a look as to why these two could be a match made in heaven.

One of the foremost features that make gaming an excellent activity today is convenience. While some of us would rather play seated in front of a desktop computer or a TV and a gamebox, others would instead appreciate the ability to play on the go using portable or handheld gaming devices. Of these mobile gaming consoles available today (aside from the variety of everyday Android devices), the Nintendo Switch has become the foremost handheld gaming device in today's gaming market.

Nintendo, being a leader in the gaming world since time immemorial, has provided players worldwide with a formidable and flexible handheld gaming device that can act as a game box and controller that can be connected to a desktop screen or TV or just as it was made for, a self-contained-handheld super version of the Gameboy. Nintendo outdid itself with this one.

Le Switch



The Nintendo Switch, or "Switch" as commonly called in the industry, is one of the more successful products Nintendo has put out today. This is not to mention the games themselves, like Mario or Zelda, but from the earliest Gameboy to the DS and the Switch, Nintendo has been selling handheld consoles for as long as one can remember. This console, to date, has sold around 130 million units since its release in 2017.

More than a hundred million gamers are playing and consuming games from the Nintendo Switch market. Market-wise, this is already a vast, lucrative, and immensely profitable area of consumer spending. The Switch is like no other handheld device due to its practically all-in-one feature. It's like a tablet with the shape and looks of a gaming controller. You can play games and surf the Net, watch movies, and even solve your math homework with it. You can even attach it to a gun device and play virtual paintball with your neighbors (no matter how old they are). So, to simplify things without more explanation, the Switch is today's handheld dream gaming console.

Roblox


Conversely, Roblox is a gaming platform populated by a gazillion list of user-created games. The games range from the simplest to the most complex; not all are deemed appropriate for young kids. However, because Roblox was created using blocky voxel-style graphics and almost all the characters look like children (thanks to the Minecraftian influence), most of the platform’s patrons are kids. This is not to say that Roblox caters specifically to the young since so many adults are young.

This has led Roblox and its multi-world environment to the phenomenal success it has garnered since it first released in 2004 and officially in 2006. Also, despite all the years of being online with a gazillion online players daily, Roblox continues to grow, expand, and advance not only in gaming, graphics, technology, and all but in the areas of online social interaction as well. Roblox is one of the foremost social media and gaming sites today, with the most decisive influence on the young and upcoming generation of gamers.


Roblox is Everywhere


Due to its worldwide popularity, Roblox has been made available on home PCs, consoles, and mobile platforms. You can play Roblox on multiple PC operating systems, be it Mac, Unix, Windows, or even on an Xbox (if you need to). Phones and tablets are not exempted, as Roblox is widely available for Apple iOS and Android operating systems.

If you can run an online browser and surf over to the Roblox homepage, you can play the games listed and shown there. If you have an Oculus VR headset, you can also enjoy Roblox. There are many ways to run Roblox, although some will need a lot of tweaking and technical research to get Roblox to run on your machine or device. Regardless, Roblox is there for everyone to visit, peruse, and enjoy if one ever gets interested in walking around a variety of worlds populated by cute, blocky, and funny-looking people of all ages looking for a fun-filled experience.

Roblox and the Switch



As to whether the Roblox platform should be available to the Switch, the answer is a resounding "Yes!" The potential of having Roblox open and accessible to Switch players is enormous for both RobloX and Nintendo.

It is also well known that, to date, many Switch players can visit the Roblox site and play using a browser running online on the Switch. Just an Android smartphone owner can access Roblox via the Google Play store and enjoy its voxel experiences; the Switch can also access the site. However, regarding Roblox being legally and officially available to the Nintendo Switch, the answer is no (not yet, at least). The Switch is unlike a desktop or laptop computer or a home console like a Sony or Microsoft gaming system. Switch is Nintendo, and Nintendo is probably the most stringent company regarding intellectual property rights over its characters and devices.

Things will have to be worked out first before Roblox can officially run on their devices, as there will always be overlaps regarding the IPs of both companies. Suffice it to say that they will have to sit down and iron things together (so to speak) to get the ball rolling. Hopefully, things have already started, and we can soon see an industry-wide agreement set between Roblox and Nintendo. Said, rules have to be made on how characters like Mario can be used within Roblox running on a Nintendo machine and the software running on the Switch itself. Nevertheless, the answer would still be a definite "Yes". Roblox should be officially available on Nintendo Switch.

title: LensCrafters Launches Its Own Roblox Experience

content_html:
LensCrafters Launches Its Own Roblox Experience

October 27, 2023 by Mikhail
>
LensCrafters, one of the largest optical retail brands in America, launched its first Roblox experience.

With the goal of promoting proper vision health, LensCrafters launched its own experience on the popular gaming platform, Roblox.

Called LensCrafters Eye Odyssey, it's an online edutainment Roblox game that offers educational content to raise awareness towards healthy eye habits.

"By engaging with the millions of people on Roblox, we have the capability to highlight our vision care efforts in a very creative way," said Alfonso Cerullo, President & GM of LensCrafters.

The Eye Odyssey lets players help Blinky, a character suffering from prolonged exposure to screens, overcome various challenges by adopting healthy eye care habits. Players can then redeem various items and UGCs after this experience, which is just one out of two planned seasons.

short_description: Roblox has been around for almost two decades. In that span of time, it has changed the lives of many of its users and how the online-based gaming industry is today. Let's take a close look at how it has and is doing so.
content_html:
How Roblox Is Redefining the Gaming Industry

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Roblox has been around for almost two decades. In that span of time, it has changed the lives of many of its users and how the online-based gaming industry is today. Let's take a close look at how it has and is doing so.

Roblox, the sandbox gaming online platform, is well-known for its massive role in evolving the computer and video gaming industry as it is today. The thing about Roblox is that it, in itself, is not a game. It was a created online platform that first came out in 2004 as DynaBlocks, and after a couple of years of beta testing, it was officially released as Roblox in 2006. The platform aimed to provide users and gamers with a sandbox environment where user creativity could be used, and guests and gamers could enjoy the results of these creative works.

Initially, the platform was quaint and straightforward, as the graphics were slightly behind the then-so-popular Minecraft despite sharing a voxel-based, blocky appearance. Minecraft was a world-building sandbox game that encouraged gamers to build their worlds within the main Minecraft overworld, providing players with realms and world areas to explore. Come to think of it, Roblox is similar to Minecraft, although both gaming platforms headed out in many different ways as the years progressed. It's also important to note that there are many Roblox games like Minecraft today.

A Progressive Growth


From 2004 to the present, Roblox has grown into an online community-based powerhouse of a platform as it continually attracts (or, should I humorously say, ensnares) an equivalently increasing crowd of people looking to pass their time online in one activity or another. Roblox, as compared to the other online gaming and social platforms when the pros and cons are listed, appears to have more pros on its side, and people of all ages can see that.

David Baszucki and his staff have been able to create a near-perfect synergy of a game-playing and creative online community that thrives in long-distance socialization with a win-win environment and situation in as much as possible way. In simple terms, almost everybody would enter the world of Roblox and come out with a laugh or a smile. With a daily active user base of around 65 million users a day (which was said to have decreased slightly at the end of the pandemic lockdowns), this would already indicate how popular the platform is.


Platform Activity and Flexibility


As mentioned, the Roblox platform can offer something for everyone of all ages. From the most immature child in the process of understanding how life goes on to the experienced, aged, and tired maestros of programming and digital art, Roblox has a place for everyone. Just look at the Roblox top charts and you'll agree.

Whether you are a hardcore FPS gaming vanguard who takes pride and joy in amassing your headcount of frags or a simple peace-loving girl who loves fairy tales, romance, and Candy Crush, Roblox will always have something for you. Regardless, most users and gamers find themselves between these extremes, and again, Roblox has something for everybody. Whether you are 10 or 70, if you both can agree and enjoy each other's company as you innocently explore the worlds of Roblox, then it would be foolish to stop you from doing so.

The diversity of the uses of the platform continually increases as well. Roblox is a multi-user, multi-genre, multi-electronic media, and even multi-whatever socialization and gaming platform. This is an early but apt description of the multiverse where everyone online can come together under a single platform. Who knows, with the platform’s steady growth, executives and board members of huge conglomerates may find themselves having their business meetings in Roblox.

For now, however, let's stick to the present and see why Roblox, in all its multi-faceted features, is continually changing how people play games. With the amount of gaming, digital landscape, and socialization experiences being churned out by the creative users of Roblox, the platform has become an array of experience choices (usually free) for everybody to peruse and enjoy. The keyword is "free," even if you opted for the platform's subscription feature, the choices are still free for you (and a little more).


A Community of People


Roblox is an online community today. Strangers, friends, teammates, co-workers, classmates, groups, couples, and whatever social huba-huba there is can meet and enjoy Roblox together. In my neighborhood alone, almost every kid has a smartphone (in one way or another), and when you see a bunch of them sitting together at a corner and ask them what's up, they reply in sync, “Roblox.” The kids are the majority of Roblox gamers, but many adults also frequent the platform. Some even meet their partners there and stroll the digital landscape, especially if they are far apart. Roblox especially connects everyone, and the potential of being able to do this is just being fully realized today.

Avenues of Opportunity


Roblox is a creative sandbox and content environment. What's more, the platform is heavily monetized. Roblox's more creative (and maybe older) users are the most able to take full advantage of this. Learning to make a game, creating it, and searching for the necessary digital assets (or creating them oneself) needs a lot of time, discipline, and maturity to pull it off successfully and beautifully. The most popular, creative, and profitable games in Roblox were not created by the kids who run all over the platform; they were made by professional software and game developers (both individual and companies). These people make money in Roblox, and this crowd is (again) continually growing.


Roblox is a bit easier to create than other contemporary commercial game engines like Unity and Unreal, and a readily available marketing platform is already in place for the creation to reach its desired target audience. This goes for created accessories and gaming assets as well. This is just the gaming part; many developers also focus on the social media and video part. Creating animated clips via Roblox and assembling them into a movie has become a thriving trade for many social and gaming influencers. YouTube is loaded with these and a gazillion of Roblox tutorials, commentaries, reviews, and more. We all do know that YouTube is monetized, so yes, either way, one could earn.

All these show the extent of Roblox's influence in today's gaming world. It's practically doing what platforms like Steam, Twitch, and Twitter X are. Roblox is growing and, in the process, letting its users and gamers profoundly grow with it. It may not be perfect, but a win-win for everyone will always be the best alternative in today's world.

title: 6 Scary Roblox Horror Games to Play with the Lights Off
image_title: RobloxGo - 6 Scary Roblox Horror Games to Play with the Lights Off
image_alt: RobloxGo - 6 Scary Roblox Horror Games to Play with the Lights Off - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Looking for a brand new scare - or simply revisiting past haunts this Halloween? Have a look at our list of Roblox Experiences to get a jump on.
content_html:
6 Scary Roblox Horror Games to Play with the Lights Off

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Looking for a brand new scare - or simply revisiting past haunts this Halloween? Have a look at our list of Roblox Experiences to get a jump on.

Halloween is fast approaching. While your household is getting its scary makeover, and the costumes are being prepared, why not complete the feel by playing a scary Roblox Experience? Check out the top 5 recommendations we have for you.

Cheese Escape


This one doesn’t require a lot of elaboration. You’re stuck in a labyrinth made of cheese, and your job is to find a way out of the maze. There will be keys to collect that allow you to progress further. Cheese Escape can be played solo or you can set up a custom room to invite your friends. This is best played with sounds on, as you will rely on audio cues to find out if you’re on track with everything.

JUDY


An abandoned theme park of labyrinthine construction, macabre design elements, and a moving doll of doom on the prowl. Only few games could match the scary ambiance of JUDY. This has been around since 2021. if the scenery doesn’t draw the fright into you, then the jump scares will be more than eager to pitch in. You’ll get the most out of this Experience when playing with friends.

The Asylum


Another horror exploration title makes this recommendation list. The Asylum doesn’t give you a lot of explanations, story-wise. You’re trapped in a strange compound and you’ll be encouraged to work your way out of sections and through obstacles. Watch out! There’s that probability of random game elements that are more than happy to not only scare you but to give you a complimentary game over. The usage of light and shadow provides an eerie effect of dread. Best played with the lights out and a good sound system.

The Rake


You must be thinking this is some gardening game that made it to the list. Not quite. Really. You’re thrown into a strange place where nightfall is in permanent mode. You’ll work your way through areas, finding all manner of items to help keep you alive. Where’s the ‘rake’, you ask? That’s where a creature with strange clawed appendages appears at random times to stalk, hunt you down, and end your playing session. Do you have what it takes to overcome The Rake?

Doors


Doors bring you a visual and audio scare-fest in the form of a hotel filled with creatures out to get you. The title gives you an idea of what to do. Each room will have a door that leads to the next room. You’ll work through 100 doors before you’re finally free of the infernal hotel. The difficulty ramps up once you get into the middle of the game, where your hunters have new tricks to either bring you out of hiding or chip your health until you drop.

Apeirophobia


There’s a reason mazes and labyrinths are part of the usual components in a horror game. You’re always on your toes when it comes to facing the dread of what lurks on the next turn. You also think of whether or not there’s an exit to begin with. This is what Apeirophobia capitalizes on. Plenty of horror games capitalize on the multiplayer experience – and this one is no exception. Nothing like running away from enemies you and your buds are pretty much helpless against.

There are plenty of other horror Experiences made by brilliant and dedicated Robloxians using loads of creativity. Whether you’re in for a trick or some treats, Roblox Go is the best place to browse.

title: Roblox vs Unity - Which Platform Reigns Supreme?
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox vs Unity - Which Platform Reigns Supreme?
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox vs Unity - Which Platform Reigns Supreme? - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: For some time now, continuing arguments abound about whether Roblox or Unity would be the better platform by which to make games. For the sake of enlightenment regarding the issue, let's take a look at some sensible and valid points.
content_html:
Roblox vs Unity - Which Platform Reigns Supreme?

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
For some time now, continuing arguments abound about whether Roblox or Unity would be the better platform by which to make games. For the sake of enlightenment regarding the issue, let's take a look at some sensible and valid points.

To begin with, both Roblox and Unity game engines are accessible, fairly easy to learn, and have huge support communities attached to them. Let’s closely examine the points that stack in favor of either of the two-game creation platforms.

The Roblox game engine was designed for beginners. It is a lot easier to learn and digest compared to that of Unity. Both have their specific ways of doing things, but the basics like map making, importing third-party assets and resources, and the primary world and game-building mechanics are similar and standard as far as 3D game engines go. To put things simply, you have to program (or give sets of instructions) to the game engine, along with the environment, characters, and objects you built or imported, to have a self-contained executable game. With all the pieces in place, it will be up to your programmable game engine to execute.


Game Programming


This brings us to the next factor of the equation to consider: the programming language that the engine knows and understands. The thing about programming today is that things are done modularly, like a jigsaw puzzle you have to put together. For the sake of discussion, game programs were written in one swoop back in the dawning of game development (70s to early 80s). This meant that the entire code, game engine, assets, objects, sound, and the rest that comprised the total game were fitted into a long list of instructions, which could fill up rims upon rims of printer paper.

The modularity was expressed in terms of subroutines, and when written in Assembler or Machine Code instead of BASIC to speed things up, disconcerting confusion hit the roof. You guys are so lucky today that coding is done in a modular way. Now, all you have to do is decide which computer language would be more comfortable for you.

Roblox uses LUA, one of the easiest programming languages to learn. The language reminds me of LOGO (Turtle Graphics Programming), where instructions are given in their simplest, straightforward form. The disadvantage, however, with languages like these is their simplicity and their limitation in providing instructions on what and how to do things. Again, this is why the game programmers of old went for Machine or Assembler, as instructions could be executed in a far more detailed and flexible way.

With how the Roblox game platform and system were built, LUA would no doubt be an ideal programming language for young and adult game development beginners alike, as its ease of use and learnability will make it an excellent user-friendly environment for the Roblox crowd.


Unity is a game engine that hasn't been shy in going toe-to-toe with Unreal or ID's game engines. Unity (believe it or not) is quite powerful and fabulous (if not perfect) in making stand-alone indie or AAA games. It uses C# for programming, and going back to my historical analogy, it's like using Assembler as compared to BASIC. C# is much harder to learn but more accessible than the dreaded C++. C is a language used for speed execution because it is close to Assembler and, as such, nitty-gritty.

Therefore, its speed, flexibility, and detail in creating and executing instructions can make games that rival Unreal in many ways. It's also a lot simpler to learn than Unreal or even Source, for that matter. However, it is not suggested for game development beginners unless you've been into programming for some time (years) already. However, if you’re starting up and feel that you have to follow closely in the footsteps of your game designer ancestors, by all means, be my guest.

Quality and Limitations


Now that we've cleared the coding reasons let's take a quick look at the game and graphics quality. For this, the round will always go to Unity. In reality, however, some games don't have the looks or the smooth moves (so to speak) but have the addictive and immersive quality to reel in millions of gamers. So, it depends on the game maker and their smarts to get the game through. Note that any Roblox game will always be limited by its platform, as you can only do as far as the platform lets you. This is a clear disadvantage compared to having much more freedom if you make the game with Unity.

If you're starting up, however, file it as something to consider when you have the experience to show in making games. Just grit and bear for now that a Roblox game will always look like a blocky Roblox game, but in a gaming platform where the usual character looks like a refugee from Minecraft, there isn't much to complain about.

Support and Resources


The most important thing when tackling game development is the availability of support and game resources. In that, Roblox wins the round! Whether it would be tutorial videos on the Roblox site or YouTube, there are myriad tutorials in almost every aspect of Roblox. Whether creating characters, mapping, LUA programming, or the dozens of Roblox games to join, they have it just for you. What’s more, many Roblox members are willing to share the needed info and tips with you. Just ask around, and somebody is bound to answer.

Unity has likewise a considerable support base, though it's a bit more general on how to use and design games with the engine. Unlike Roblox, which is tied to a platform with over a million users squeezing at each other like a can of sardines, Unity is an amalgamation of spread-out users willing to share their experiences and know-how with the game engine and places to upload your new game. It's much looser-knit than the sardines in a bursting-at-the-seams way Roblox can. So, if you're a beginner, being a sardine wouldn't be that bad.



Making It Worth The Effort


Finally, we go to making money. While it's true that many game developers start by being altruistic and putting out games that are free and fun for Dick and Jane, it's just not healthy to keep doing that. Even the gaming forefathers wrote rims and rims of BASIC code to earn a buck or two, and they sure did make way more than a buck or two. Should you finish your mega-immersive game with Unity, you can then indie-style upload it to sites like Steam, cross your programming fingers, and wait for the windfall.

You can also find a publisher willing to take your game in and take care of getting it out to global gamers. How the game will get to its target gamers will be up to you and your smarts and using the support venues and sites to get your play through. The profit may be a lot bigger depending on the site or publisher you decide to have it marketed with.

Roblox, on the other hand, is a one-stop shop. You learn LUA and make your game with the platform's engine.

title: What Roblox Games Have the Most Visits?
image_title: RobloxGo - What Roblox Games Have the Most Visits?
image_alt: RobloxGo - What Roblox Games Have the Most Visits? - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Answering your burning questions about Roblox - one question at a time!
content_html:
What Roblox Games Have the Most Visits?

October 9, 2023 by Aethyna
>
Answering your burning questions about Roblox - one question at a time!

RobloxGo Answers is a brand new series that we've decided to launch on RobloxGo to answer all of your burning questions about Roblox!

In today's edition of RobloxGo Answers, we'll answer the ultimate question in Roblox:

What Roblox games have the most visits?



Brookhaven


Starting off with one of the best, Brookhaven presents an immersive virtual world where players can explore, socialize, and unleash their creativity. Set in a picturesque suburban town, the game offers a blend of role-playing, customization, and interactive experiences. Players can design their own homes, engage in various activities, and connect with others in a sprawling community. The gameplay seamlessly fuses open-world exploration with the freedom to decorate and personalize your space. The creative possibilities are vast, ranging from interior design to social events, making each visit a unique adventure. With its diverse range of activities and the opportunity to express oneself through customization, "Brookhaven" delivers an encompassing experience.

Blox Fruits


Blox Fruits is a captivating Roblox game that immerses players in a dynamic pirate-themed world of adventure and combat. Set on various islands, the game invites players to become formidable pirates, engaging in quests, battles, and exploration. The gameplay combines open-world exploration with intense combat mechanics, allowing players to wield different abilities and weapons as they confront enemies and bosses. The thrill of mastering diverse fighting styles and uncovering hidden treasures adds depth to the experience. The game's action-packed combat, variety of abilities, and the excitement of discovering new islands make Blox Fruits an engaging and thrilling adventure.

Murder Mystery


Murder Mystery 2 is a gripping Roblox game that plunges players into a thrilling world of mystery and suspense. Set in various intriguing environments, the game assigns players one of three roles: innocent, sheriff, or murderer. As an innocent, you work to uncover the murderer's identity and stay safe, while the sheriff aims to protect innocents and eliminate the murderer. The murderer's goal is to eliminate everyone else while avoiding detection. This gameplay setup creates a captivating blend of deduction, strategy, and tense interactions. The game's creative maps and unpredictable scenarios contribute to the adrenaline-fueled experience, as players navigate the suspenseful atmosphere while trying to outwit their opponents.

Adopt Me


Adopt Me is a heartwarming virtual pet simulation game that lets players care for and raise a variety of adorable pets. The gameplay centers around adopting pets, customizing their living spaces, and embarking on various activities to nurture them. Players can explore a colorful world, trade pets, and partake in mini-games to earn rewards. The game's creativity shines through its wide range of pets, customizations, and interactive elements, fostering a sense of companionship and responsibility. The overall experience is one of joy and connection, as players build relationships with their pets.

Arm Wrestle Simulator


Last but not the least, Arm Wrestle Simulator is a fun and engaging game that lets players experience the excitement of arm wrestling battles. The gameplay revolves around challenging opponents to arm wrestling matches by rapidly clicking buttons to build up strength and strategically using power-ups to secure victory. The simplicity of the mechanics adds to the accessible and enjoyable nature of the game. The thrill of competing against friends or AI opponents in intense arm wrestling showdowns creates a lighthearted and competitive atmosphere.

Of course, the most visited Roblox games are constantly changing, and who knows? A breakout game may appear as well. Due to this, we've also included a link to the most visited Roblox games list: https://www.robloxgo.com/list/top_20_roblox_games

The Hunger Games Academy Adventures Is Now on Roblox

October 6, 2023 by Mikhail
>
Step into Hunger Games official Roblox experience in The Hunger Games Academy Adventures

The Hunger Games Academy Adventures has finally made its way to Roblox. Essentially, it is an experience where you dive into an academy where you train for the Hunger Games as read in the books and seen in the films. Classes have already begun on October 1st, and for players - or tributes - they'll step into the academy to strengthen themselves and increase their chances of winning in the games.

So, step right up, make yourself a tribute, take part in a deep roleplaying experience, and win countless rewards as you complete milestones. It's a tie-in with the new movie, a prequel, and which makes it a must for the franchise fans and Roblox lovers alike to dive into.

title: Littlest Pet Shop Relaunches with a Global Roblox Experience
image_title: RobloxGo - Littlest Pet Shop Relaunches with a Global Roblox Experience
image_alt: RobloxGo - Littlest Pet Shop Relaunches with a Global Roblox Experience - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: The Littlest Pet shop is back with an all-new digital experience on Roblox.
content_html:
Littlest Pet Shop Relaunches with a Global Roblox Experience

October 6, 2023 by Mikhail
>
The Littlest Pet shop is back with an all-new digital experience on Roblox.

LITTLEST PET SHOP, a toy brand by Hasbro, is one of the most recognizable toy brands in the world of retail. Not only will it make its way back to the shelves, but also in digital experience, like on Roblox.

Its return will be marked by a digital play experience, which will launch worldwide in December 2023. This is the fruit of the joint effort involving Basic Fun!, the Master Toy licensee for LITTLEST PET SHOP, Hasbro, and Suit Up Games, a video game studio well-versed in creating branded experiences for young audiences.

"We are thrilled to partner with Suit Up Games and Hasbro to bring LITTLEST PET SHOP to Roblox," exclaimed Maureen Dilger, Vice President of Global Brand Marketing of Basic Fun! "The iconic brand was one of the original toys to grow through its vibrant social media community. LPS is a natural fit for Roblox – the most popular immersive platform in the world for today's young people to connect."

Though it remains to be seen how the game will look like, it is widely speculated that it could become comparable to Adopt Me, one of the top games on the platform.

content_html:
Maybelline Introduces a Digital Makeup and Music Adventure on Roblox

October 6, 2023 by Mikhail
>
Maybelline New York treats Roblox players to Digital Makeup and Music Adventure on Roblox.

Maybelline New York isn't just known for its makeup that can glam you up in a hurry but also for digital experiences on Roblox.

Partnered with Splash, the beauty brand launched a 360-brand campaign that specifically targets the vibrant music community within Roblox. Players can obtain Maybelline's virtual makeup looks, play minigames, and listen to exclusive music to earn rewards and collect Maybelline cosmetics.

The "Makeup Your Mix" campaign by Maybelline extends an invitation to Roblox users to engage in immersive experiences, including the Maybelline New York lounge and the Graffiti Room. In these virtual spaces, players can experiment with Maybelline products, like Vinyl Ink, and Falsies Surreal Mascara, and use them in creating graffiti art.

In addition, the brand also partnered with DJ Kai, giving players the opportunity to remix her song "Fantasy" until September 28th.

short_description: Roblox's Adopt Me has teamed up with McDonald's!
content_html:
Adopt Me and McDonald’s Team Up for New Happy Meal Toys

October 6, 2023 by Mikhail
>
Roblox's Adopt Me has teamed up with McDonald's!

Adopt Me is one of the most popular Roblox games with millions of players. The behemoth fast-food chain McDonald's, has taken notice, and both have teamed up to produce a new line of Happy Meals for its fanbase, which is mainly composed of children.

In a nutshell, Adopt Me is a virtual pet game where players can adopt and raise a variety of animals, from normal cats and dogs to penguins and even dragons. So far, the Adopt Me Happy Meal rolled out in Austria, with other countries likely to follow suit after the current promotional period.

Some of the toys players can obtain from the Happy Meal include Crocodile, Bee, Cow, Raccoon, Zebra, Red Cardinal, or a DK Dinosaur book.

title: Mattel and Gamefam Unveil Barbie DreamHouse Tycoon on Roblox, Launching October 6
image_title: RobloxGo - Mattel and Gamefam Unveil Barbie DreamHouse Tycoon on Roblox, Launching October 6
image_alt: RobloxGo - Mattel and Gamefam Unveil Barbie DreamHouse Tycoon on Roblox, Launching October 6 - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Unleash your creativity in Barbie DreamHouse Tycoon and build your very own dream house.
content_html:
Mattel and Gamefam Unveil Barbie DreamHouse Tycoon on Roblox, Launching October 6

October 6, 2023 by Mikhail
>
Unleash your creativity in Barbie DreamHouse Tycoon and build your very own dream house.

Build the house of your dreams in Barbie DreamHouse Tycoon!

As the first-ever Barbie game on Roblox, players can construct a dreamhouse of up to four floors with a total of 30 rooms that may include a yoga studio, office, and walk-in closets. In the game, players can live out various careers and unleash their inner icon, enabling them to express themselves in a variety of methods. Thanks to numerous rooms and customization options, players can create their own virtual spaces.

"With so many fantastic iterations of Barbie over the years, this felt like the right time to give Barbie – one of the world’s best-selling toys and a fashion icon for more than six decades – the chance to find her feet on Roblox. As one of the most instantly recognizable brands in the world, we're so excited for Barbie’s Roblox debut and look forward to her connecting with an all-new community of fans," said Mike DeLaet, Global Head of Digital Gaming at Mattel.

Apart from building their dream house, players can also customize their avatars using unique fashion pieces.

title: Roblox Launches on Meta Quest VR Headsets
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox Launches on Meta Quest VR Headsets
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox Launches on Meta Quest VR Headsets - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: The blocky world of Roblox is making its way to Meta Quest VR.
content_html:
Roblox Launches on Meta Quest VR Headsets

September 29, 2023 by Mikhail
>
The blocky world of Roblox is making its way to Meta Quest VR.

Roblox is, once again, heading to another virtual reality platform.

The blocky online experience and game creation platform is making its way to Meta Quest VR. Players will be able to access it on Quest 2 and Quest Pro, while it will also become available on the newly announced Quest 3.

“Roblox is launching today,” said Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg during the Meta Connect keynote. “I’m really excited for this one. After taking a long time to optimize it for VR, it’s going to be a big deal.”

Announced back in July, this isn't the first time the game is on a VR platform. Gamers could use headsets like HTC Vive and Oculus Rift. However, compared to other platforms the Quest version will be easier to load and access since players will be able to obtain and load it on the Meta Quest Store.

title: KnowBe4 Launches Cybersecurity Game Hack-A-Cat on Roblox
image_title: RobloxGo - KnowBe4 Launches Cybersecurity Game Hack-A-Cat on Roblox
image_alt: RobloxGo - KnowBe4 Launches Cybersecurity Game Hack-A-Cat on Roblox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Take the role of either a cat or a mouse in Hack-A-Cat, a cybersecurity game by KnowBe4
content_html:
KnowBe4 Launches Cybersecurity Game Hack-A-Cat on Roblox

September 28, 2023 by Mikhail
>
Take the role of either a cat or a mouse in Hack-A-Cat, a cybersecurity game by KnowBe4

Cybersecurity threats are plenty in today's day and age, and it's vital for kids to learn and be safe from such threats.

This is one of the reasons why KnowBe4 launched its new cybersecurity game, Hack-A-Cat on Roblox. As its first foray into the popular gaming platform, up to four players will take the mantle of either a cat or a mouse to duke it out for tokens. For the felines to win, they need to ship out their tuna successfully, while for the mice they have to sabotage the cats' efforts by using real security hacking methods.

"We thought our new 'Hack-A-Cat' game was a unique opportunity to inspire interest in cybersecurity for a younger audience using Roblox," said the CEO of KnowBE4, Stu Sjouwerman.

Although it's more of a fun, lighthearted experience, it teaches players essential skills in cybersecurity including email safety, phishing, and more.
