content_html:
Walmart Discovered: The Roblox Shopping Experience Everyone’s Talking About

September 28, 2023 by Mikhail
>
Buy and sell Robux in Walmart's newly launched virtual experience.

Unhappy about not having enough places to go shopping in Roblox?

Well, Walmart recently debuted with a brand new virtual experience, Walmart Discovered. It lets players 13 and older discover virtual items and creators while also letting the said creators sell their items for Robux.

“As we began to craft this experience, we listened to our growing community on the platform and found that they were seeking easier ways to discover experiences and virtual items,” said William White, Walmart's Chief Marketing Officer.

“Through this new nomination system, Walmart Discovered will spotlight 300+ community creators, from digital fashion designers to experience developers, over the next four months,” he added in a press release.

Once users visit the world of Walmart Discovered, they can explore some storefronts with reimagined departments like Sports, Pets, Racing, and Beauty. Players can then shop for items to spruce up their avatars.

Players age 13 and older can explore Walmart Discovered on Roblox's website or on devices platforms that support the game, like PC, iOS, Android, and Xbox.

title: 5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Xbox
image_title: RobloxGo - 5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Xbox
image_alt: RobloxGo - 5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Xbox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Looking for something else to play on your Xbox without losing the feeling of Roblox? These recommendations may be what you're looking for.
content_html:
5 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Xbox

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Looking for something else to play on your Xbox without losing the feeling of Roblox? These recommendations may be what you're looking for.

Roblox has so much in terms of gameplay content. Its library of Experiences will take days for practically anyone to explore fully – even then you’re not sure if you’ve got every nook and cranny mapped. Sometimes, too many choices overwhelm even the most serious players. Sites such as Roblox Go can help narrow down what you need. There will be times when you may want to try something that is similar to an Experience, but not much.

Since you’ve gone as far as here, let’s find out what we have in mind as games that are like Roblox. This list refers to games for the Xbox platform, so mileage may vary if you’re using other systems.

My Time at Portia


If you’ve played Roblox simply to scratch the builder’s itch, then My Time at Portia can do that and more. Once you have the starting projects done, there’s a lot to go for. You can also do other segments while either waiting on a new building assignment or simply taking a break from construction. Fish, cook, tame animals, or simply explore the lands looking for goodies. There’s an interaction mechanic where you get to know more about your fellow Portians the more you pay attention, give presents, or simply talk to them. Building up relationships with NPCs also unlocks event sequences where you get to play more games with them. They won’t be as random as talking to other Robloxians, but these exchanges tend to be more fruitful.

LEGO Worlds


A building game inspired by real-world building blocks: what’s not to like? Think of it as a more interactive version of the famed building block toy sets. If you have been exposed to other LEGO video games before, this is definitely an easy pick-up, otherwise, simply playing the game will tutor you to everything you need to make a fulfilling experience. You can explore the different worlds, called ‘biomes’, using an assortment of vehicles – something that other builder games find it hard to compete with. In short, if you want to take a step back from hardcore building and want something with a few fun elements in between, LEGO Worlds can be the game for you.

ARK: Survival Evolved


It’s an open-world adventure where you can ride a dinosaur into the vast plains, hills, or wherever terrain you may be. There’s also the need to build your gear and essentials using everything you can get your hands on. After all, there’s the fun element of being constantly in danger and losing practically everything you’ve worked for so far because an aggressive dinosaur saw you as a target. You’ll eventually unlock new tech with every conquered world, and soon, you’ll be finding your defenseless primitive self as a far cry from the futuristic combat armor-wearing flying warrior you are now. Preparation is key to taking on whatever stands in your path. ARK: Survival Evolved demands a lot of grinding and training your giant combat lizards coming your way. You can also enter a PvP server if going ham and being hostile is your thing.

Terraria


This 2D sandbox adventure title has gone a long way from its initial 2011 release. If you’re a fan of old-school adventure RPGs where straying off the main story to uncover more extraordinary and more dangerous feats on the side is encouraged, then this game speaks to you. You’ll be exploring several worlds, each of them gated by requirements you’ll have to find out on your own. Imagine more than a decade’s worth of content you’ll be playing for hours on end. What’s great about this? There’s always something to create, somewhere to explore, and some creatures to test whatever weapon you’ve just crafted. There’s a reason Terraria has quite the following even after all these years.

Fortnite


What does a cartoon shooter battle royale have to do with Roblox? One is you have to learn how to work with other players – or learn what they do to take them out of the game early. This is quite the multiplayer-heavy title, so expect different shades of players every new match. There’s also a building aspect that you use even in the heat of battle. Whether you build platforms to get from one point to the destination or hunker down in a miniature fortress, that’s all up to you. There’s also the aesthetic feel where you can dress up as whoever or whatever, depending if the skins agree with you. For the online extrovert or the competitive types who play with like-minded people, Fortnite makes a good side game.

The above five games are more than able to keep you company while being out of Roblox. Just in case you’re looking for a cool Roblox Experience you may have missed out, Roblox Go is here to help.

title: 4 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Nintendo Switch
image_title: RobloxGo - 4 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Nintendo Switch
image_alt: RobloxGo - 4 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Nintendo Switch - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Nintendo Switch is home to some exceptional games and, in this article, we’ll be talking about 4 games that are just as good as Roblox and can be enjoyed on Switch.
content_html:
4 Games Like Roblox You Can Play on Nintendo Switch

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Nintendo Switch is home to some exceptional games and, in this article, we’ll be talking about 4 games that are just as good as Roblox and can be enjoyed on Switch.

The Nintendo Switch boasts a diverse library of games catering to various tastes and preferences. While RobloxGo maintains its position as a leader in online gaming, the Nintendo Switch also hosts titles that share similarities in creativity and multiplayer experiences. While none may fully replicate the Roblox experience, we have some games for you that offer unique and enjoyable alternatives for players seeking creative and social gameplay on this popular console, so without any further delay, let’s discuss the games.

Minecraft


Minecraft on the Nintendo Switch offers an exceptional gaming experience. Its sandbox-style gameplay, where players can build, explore, and survive in a blocky world, is immersive and endlessly creative. The portable nature of the Switch makes it perfect for on-the-go adventures or cooperative building sessions with friends. With frequent updates and a thriving community, Minecraft delivers an outstanding gaming experience that continues to captivate players of all ages.

Trove


Trove on the Nintendo Switch provides a lively and engaging experience. Its voxel-based world offers a delightful blend of exploration, combat, and building, making it a fun and accessible adventure. The game's colorful aesthetics and multiplayer features enhance the overall experience, making it a worthwhile choice for fans of sandbox and cooperative gameplay on the Switch.

Fortnite


Fortnite on the Nintendo Switch delivers fast-paced gameplay with dynamic combat and building mechanics. Its battle royale mode keeps players on their toes, battling to be the last one standing, while the creative mode allows for building impressive structures and participating in unique player-made experiences. The overall experience is exhilarating, offering a combination of strategy, skill, and creativity that has captivated millions of players worldwide.

Fae Farm


Fae Farm on the Nintendo Switch offers a charming and relaxing gameplay experience. With its focus on farming, players can cultivate their own magical crops, tend to adorable creatures, and explore a whimsical world. The farming aspect is at the core of the game, providing a satisfying and meditative activity. The overall experience is a delightful mix of creativity, tranquility, and fantasy, making Fae Farm a soothing and enjoyable choice for fans of farming simulation games on the Nintendo Switch.

All in all, there are tons of games for players to enjoy on the Nintendo Switch. While Roblox remains the gold standard, these alternatives provide a rich and diverse landscape for players seeking creative sandbox gameplay and vibrant player communities. Ultimately, the gaming world is richer when there are multiple avenues for players to explore their creativity and connect with others, and each of these games contributes to that richness.

short_description: A high-end racing game truly never disappoints and, we’re here to introduce you to a truly exhilarating racing game called Midnight Chasers that’ll satisfy your need for speed.
content_html:
Midnight Chasers - The Fast-Paced Roblox Racing Game You’ll Love

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
A high-end racing game truly never disappoints and, we’re here to introduce you to a truly exhilarating racing game called Midnight Chasers that’ll satisfy your need for speed.

Midnight Chasers: Highway Racers is an adrenaline-pumping racing game that takes the genre to new heights. Set against the backdrop of neon-lit cityscapes and winding highways, this game offers an exhilarating experience for gamers of all levels. What sets Midnight Chasers apart is its seamless blend of stunning graphics, realistic physics, and an array of customizable high-performance vehicles, allowing players to live out their wildest racing fantasies. With a variety of game modes, from intense street races to daring heists, it offers endless hours of entertainment. Whether you're a seasoned racing enthusiast or a casual gamer, Midnight Chasers: Highway Racers promises heart-pounding action.

The Gameplay and Racing Mechanics


Midnight Chasers: Highway Racers boasts an immersive gameplay experience with a rich variety of racing mechanics that keep players on the edge of their seats. At its core, the game offers a selection of meticulously designed race tracks, each with its own unique challenges and environments. From sleek urban highways to treacherous mountain roads, the game's tracks offer diverse settings that demand different strategies and skills.

The racing mechanics in Midnight Chasers are finely tuned to provide a realistic feel, making it crucial to master vehicle handling and precision. Players can choose from a wide range of cars, from nimble sports cars to powerful muscle machines and sleek, exotic supercars. Each vehicle has distinct attributes, encouraging players to experiment and find the perfect match for their racing style.

Moreover, Midnight Chasers offers an array of game modes, including traditional circuit races, thrilling street races, and intense heists where players must outrun law enforcement. The game's AI opponents are challenging and adaptive, ensuring that every race is a test of skill and strategy.

To keep things fresh, the game regularly updates with new cars, tracks, and customization options, adding longevity and excitement to the experience. Whether you're competing against friends in multiplayer mode or tackling the career mode solo, Midnight Chasers: Highway Racers offers a dynamic and exhilarating racing experience that will keep you hooked for hours on end.

The Visuals


Midnight Chasers: Highway Racers dazzles players with its breathtaking visuals. The game's graphics are a masterpiece, featuring vibrant neon-lit cityscapes, meticulously detailed cars, and stunning weather effects that bring races to life. From the reflection of city lights on wet streets to the dynamic day-night cycle, the attention to visual detail immerses players in a captivating and cinematic racing experience.

Each race track is a visual spectacle, with diverse landscapes and environments that showcase the game's exceptional graphics engine. Midnight Chasers sets a new standard for visual excellence in the world of racing games, making every race a feast for the eyes.

Overall


All things considered, Midnight Chasers: Highway Racers is a racing game that stands out for its heart-pounding gameplay, realistic mechanics, and stunning visuals. With a diverse range of cars, tracks, and game modes, it offers an electrifying and immersive racing experience for players of all levels.

short_description: Enjoy this exhilarating pirate adventure that brings the world of One Piece to life, offering players a chance to set sail on their own epic journey in search of treasure and adventure.
content_html:
Rock Fruit - The One Piece-Inspired Roblox Game Fans Are Obsessed With

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Enjoy this exhilarating pirate adventure that brings the world of One Piece to life, offering players a chance to set sail on their own epic journey in search of treasure and adventure.

Rock Fruit, the captivating RobloxGo game, is a thrilling homage to the beloved One Piece anime and manga series. Set in a vast and immersive world, players can embark on epic adventures, assemble their pirate crews, and hunt for elusive treasures, all while encountering iconic characters and experiencing the spirit of Luffy and his crew firsthand. With its rich storytelling, engaging gameplay, and faithful homage to the source material, Rock Fruit promises an exciting and immersive pirate experience for fans and newcomers alike.

The Ultimate Pirate Adventure


At its core, Rock Fruit is an open-world adventure where you can set sail as your very own pirate captain. You'll start your journey with a humble ship and a crew of ragtag characters, gradually growing in strength and influence as you explore the expansive map. The game offers a sense of freedom, allowing you to navigate through various islands, each brimming with secrets, quests, and challenges.

As you explore, you'll encounter iconic One Piece characters, friend and foe, who will aid or hinder your progress. The quests and missions are richly woven into the One Piece lore, providing a satisfying narrative backdrop for your adventures. Whether you're battling formidable enemies, solving puzzles, or unearthing hidden treasures, every aspect of the game is designed to immerse you in the world of pirates.

A standout feature is the Devil Fruits, which grant unique abilities and powers to players, adding an exciting layer of strategy and diversity to the gameplay. From stretching your body like rubber to controlling fire or water, these Devil Fruits empower you to customize your playstyle and overcome various challenges.

Rock Fruit's multiplayer mode further enhances the experience by allowing you to team up with friends or fellow pirates, forming alliances and embarking on epic quests together. This social element adds depth and camaraderie to the game, fostering a sense of community among players.

Visually Pleasant


In addition to the immersive gameplay, Rock Fruit excels in its attention to detail, recreating the vibrant and dynamic One Piece universe. The visuals are reminiscent of the anime's art style, and the sound design captures the essence of the series, immersing players in the world of pirates and adventure.

All in all


In conclusion, Rock Fruit delivers an engaging and authentic One Piece-inspired experience on the Roblox platform. With its open-world exploration, quests, iconic characters, Devil Fruits, and multiplayer interactions, the game offers a comprehensive and exciting adventure for fans of the series and gamers alike. It's a captivating journey where you can live out your pirate dreams, uncover hidden treasures, and navigate the high seas just like your favorite Straw Hat pirates. So, hoist the Jolly Roger and set sail for adventure in the world of Rock Fruit!

title: Is Loomian Legacy the Best Pocket Monster Game on Roblox?
image_title: RobloxGo - Is Loomian Legacy the Best Pocket Monster Game on Roblox?
image_alt: RobloxGo - Is Loomian Legacy the Best Pocket Monster Game on Roblox? - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: It’s among the greats but, is Looman Legacy the best pocket monster game on Roblox? That’s the questions that we’ll be answering today.
content_html:
Is Loomian Legacy the Best Pocket Monster Game on Roblox?

October 30, 2025 by abdullah
>
It’s among the greats but, is Looman Legacy the best pocket monster game on Roblox? That’s the questions that we’ll be answering today.

If you’ve dabbled in Roblox, you’ve probably heard of Loomian Legacy. It’s one of those games that feels like a hidden gem but is also well-loved by those who know it. The game brings you into a world where catching, training, and battling creatures - Loomians - is at the heart of everything. Yeah, we know it sounds similar to Pokémon but it’s not. In this article, we’ll be discussing whether or not Loomian Legacy is the best Pocket Monster game on Roblox.

Loomian Legacy: Catch, train, and battle

There’s nothing too complex about the game. You catch Loominas. Then you train them. And then you make them battle. The battles are turn-based, so you have time to think. Strategy plays a big role, especially when it comes to picking moves and knowing which Loomians to send into battle. The creatures you collect have different types, abilities, and evolution stages. The advantage? Well, you can enhance the team depending on the scenario. Plus, every time you evolve a Loomian, it’s like a mini-victory. You watch your little creature turn into something more powerful, ready to take on bigger challenges.

Features that LOOM large

Features-wise, there isn’t much that the game lacks. There’s detail in the game world and replay-ability is top-notch. Then there’s the multiplayer mode for a more competitive audience. Not to forget, the trading system adds a unique depth to the overall experience. The game keeps evolving too. New regions, new Loomians, and constant updates mean the adventure doesn’t really stop. There’s always something to look forward to, whether you’re hunting for rare Loomians or diving deeper into the game’s storyline.

Is Adopt Me a fair rival?

If we’re talking about popular games on Roblox, Adopt Me often gets thrown into the conversation. And why not? It’s a game that millions play, where collecting pets and building a dream home is the goal. But is it really a competitor when it comes to being a pocket monster game? Not quite. Adopt Me is fun in its own way. You get to collect pets, yes, and there’s a trading system that makes it feel a bit like a creature collection game. But that’s where the similarities end. Adopt Me isn’t about battles or training. It’s about taking care of your pets, decorating homes, and playing in a more laid-back environment. Sure, the pets in Adopt Me are cute, but they don’t have the same depth as the Loomians in Loomian Legacy. If you’re in the mood for something relaxing and social, Adopt Me might be your game. But if you’re looking for a game where your creatures evolve, where battles are strategic, and where the gameplay constantly pushes you to get better, Loomian Legacy wins hands down. Adopt Me is more like a virtual pet simulator, while Loomian Legacy is a full-blown pocket monster adventure.

So, which is the best?

Loomian Legacy sure does have an edge over its counterpart. It’s not just about collecting creatures; it’s about strategy, growth, and a game that keeps evolving with you. You’re not just a player; you’re a trainer, a battler, and a part of a world that feels immersive. Adopt Me has its charm, no doubt. It’s one of those games you can pick up for a quick, stress-free session. But when it comes to creature battles, training, and the full adventure experience, Loomian Legacy stands above. It’s the depth of gameplay and the sense of progression that gives Loomian Legacy the edge. For anyone looking for that pocket monster feel, this game is the one to beat.

title: Felix the Reaper Returns in Roblox Rhythm Rumbler
image_title: RobloxGo - Felix the Reaper Returns in Roblox Rhythm Rumbler
image_alt: RobloxGo - Felix the Reaper Returns in Roblox Rhythm Rumbler - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Strut your stuff and boogie on down to the Dance of Death.
content_html:
Felix the Reaper Returns in Roblox Rhythm Rumbler

September 13, 2023 by Aethyna
>
Strut your stuff and boogie on down to the Dance of Death.

Skullbeat, a new PvP rhythm action game from Danish tag team, Kong Orange and Chop Chop Games, is now available on Roblox!

Announced in San Francisco during the Roblox Developer Conference (RDC) keynote presentation, Skullbeat is the second game in the “Felix the Reaper” franchise, transporting its dancing agent of death to a completely new setting, platform, and genre.

In Skullbeat, up to five users will put their rhythmic prowess to the test, throwing shapes, unleashing power-ups, and collecting points in the ultimate dance of death. Featuring a host of songs and stages, you’ll need more than perfect timing to beat your fellow duelling dancers. One part ballet, one part battle, each round will see users pelt their opponents with various distractions, from a blinding flashbang and confusing confetti, to a freeze ray that will stop you dead in your tracks. Accessible exclusively via Roblox, users can socialise and unlock prizes within Skullbeat’s stylish, high-fidelity nightclub between each musical multiplayer showdown.

Following 2019’s stylish single-player puzzle game, Felix the Reaper, Skullbeat seemed like a natural way to expand the Felix universe, Kong Orange CEO, Esben Kjær Ravn, explains:

“Going full-on multiplayer in a game inspired by the Danse Macabre and that colourful art history has been a hand-in-glove experience to us.”

“As a game developer, I feel quite accomplished and fortunate to have been able to make a second instalment in this franchise. It’s a clear testament to the grit and tenacity that roars beneath the hood of any good game studio in my mind, and now we can share that with the world.”

Fellow Danish developer, Chop Chop Games, has also been working to bring the rhythm battler to life.

“Working on Skullbeat has been a blast,” said Chop Chop Games CEO, Dario Rahimic. “As a big rhythm game fan, I've always wanted to bring a fresh twist to the genre, and I think Roblox has been a great place for that. The Roblox community is very embracing of new things and has throughout the alpha given us great feedback and helped us improve the game a ton.”

“Felix the Reaper is an awesome IP to work with, and I hope this groovy spin on the Danse Macabre does it justice.”

title: The Funniest Roblox Misspellings Players Keep Making
image_title: RobloxGo - The Funniest Roblox Misspellings Players Keep Making
image_alt: RobloxGo - The Funniest Roblox Misspellings Players Keep Making - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: From "Robloc" to "Robox", here are the three most common misspellings of Roblox!
content_html:
The Funniest Roblox Misspellings Players Keep Making

September 12, 2023 by Aethyna
>
From "Robloc" to "Robox", here are the three most common misspellings of Roblox!

Roblox is a massive game with an equally, if not more, massive following. With a community as big and widely varied as it has, plus the fact that many children play it, it is not surprising to know that Roblox has been called many other “names” while it was being searched online.

Although not as high-profile as the one done by President Trump back in 2018 when he sent the misspelled word, “covfefe” into the world (and we still have no idea what he really wanted to type, though "coverage" is the most likely word!), let us check out three of the most common misspellings of your favorite game, Roblox.

Taking the top spot is “Robloc” which honestly still sounds like “Roblox”. It could be an easily made misspelling, especially since the letter “c” is right beside the letter “x” on a standard Qwerty keyboard, and you were in a rush when you typed it. In fact, many seasoned keyboard users make this same mistake from time to time.

The second on the list is “Robox”. Considering how similar a box is to a block, which is the root word that “blox” is based off on, it’s also unsurprising that this misspelling is common enough to make our list. It could be an honest mistake made by many a newcomer to the game, or it is just possible that many people missed the poor letter “L” when they are searching for Roblox on the internet. There, there, “L”… we still remember you over here.

Last but not least, rounding up our top 3 list is the misspelled word, “Roblo”. The person typing this is oh-so-close to hitting the jackpot - aren’t we all? - of typing it right but may have been too eager to play that the final letter isn’t really typed in yet before the Enter key is hit on the search bar. This just proves how passionate the community at Roblox is about the platform, albeit in a more subtle way.

So, all in all, here are the three most common misspellings of the game, Roblox, that our data have mustered up and some possible explanations that may go with them. Hope this has been a fun read for you, and as always, stay tuned to RobloxGo to learn more exciting news and events about your favorite game!

title: Classic Rocket Arena - The Roblox Game That Lets You Blast Off
image_title: RobloxGo - Classic Rocket Arena - The Roblox Game That Lets You Blast Off
image_alt: RobloxGo - Classic Rocket Arena - The Roblox Game That Lets You Blast Off - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Rocket Arena is deemed as a classic for several reasons and, in this article, we’ll be reviewing the game for those who’re going to start playing this game.
content_html:
Classic Rocket Arena - The Roblox Game That Lets You Blast Off

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Rocket Arena is deemed as a classic for several reasons and, in this article, we’ll be reviewing the game for those who’re going to start playing this game.

Introducing the Game


Rocket Arena is an exhilarating online multiplayer game set in the vibrant and explosive world of Crater, where players engage in thrilling rocket-powered battles. In this fast-paced title, you'll step into the shoes of unique characters, each armed with their own specialized rockets and abilities. The goal? Blast opponents off the floating islands while avoiding getting launched yourself. With its emphasis on skill-based combat, Rocket Arena offers an accessible yet deeply competitive experience. Whether you're teaming up with friends in various game modes or honing your rocket-riding skills in solo play, Rocket Arena promises dynamic gameplay, colorful environments, and endless opportunities for strategic rocket mayhem.

Gameplay that never ceases to Amaze


Rocket Arena features a dynamic and fast-paced gameplay experience centered around rocket-powered combat. The core combat mechanics revolve around launching rockets. Rockets are your primary weapon in Rocket Arena. Players wield various rocket launchers, each with its own unique projectile behavior, from homing rockets to splash-damage explosives. Precise aiming and timing are crucial to mastering these weapons. The game boasts a diverse cast of characters, known as "Blasters," each with their own distinct abilities and playstyles. These abilities add strategic depth to battles, allowing for diverse tactics and team synergy.

Rocket Arena takes full advantage of its rocket-powered theme, allowing players to perform impressive aerial maneuvers. You can rocket jump, dodge, and soar through the sky, creating opportunities for both offense and evasion. Instead of traditional health bars, Rocket Arena introduces a Blast Meter system. The more you get hit, the higher your Blast Meter fills. When it reaches its limit, you'll be susceptible to getting knocked out of the arena. Skillful evasive moves and precise rocket shots are essential to staying in the fight.

Rocket Arena offers a variety of game modes, including team-based modes like Knockout and Rocketball, as well as free-for-all battles. Each mode introduces unique objectives and strategies, ensuring there's always something new to experience. Collaboration with teammates is crucial to victory in Rocket Arena. Communication and coordination are vital for combining Blasters' abilities and executing well-timed attacks to outsmart opponents.

Visually Pleasing


Rocket Arena boasts visually stunning and vibrant aesthetics that perfectly complement its action-packed gameplay. Set in the whimsical world of Crater, the game offers a kaleidoscope of colorful environments, each filled with intricate details and dynamic elements. From lush, floating islands to sprawling cityscapes, Rocket Arena's graphics draw players into its imaginative universe. The characters, or "Blasters," are meticulously designed, showcasing a wide range of distinct styles and personalities.

The game features colorful and imaginative maps set in the fantastical world of Crater. These environments are not just visually appealing but also play a role in battles, with dynamic elements that can affect combat scenarios.

All in all


In conclusion, Rocket Arena combines thrilling rocket-powered combat with visually captivating landscapes to deliver an exciting and dynamic gaming experience. With its unique gameplay mechanics, diverse roster of characters, and a variety of engaging game modes, Rocket Arena offers both casual and competitive players a chance to engage in fast-paced battles that demand skill, strategy, and teamwork.

content_html:
Experience Peroxide, the Bleach-Inspired Roblox Game Everyone’s Playing

September 7, 2023 by Mikhail
>
Peroxide is one of the hottest up-and-coming Roblox games today, and it features your favorite Bleach characters and classes!

Are you still hungover on the newest Bleach Thousand Year Blood War arc? Well, we don't blame you because it was an absolute blast. Without diving deep into spoilers, we were treated to some of the most epic fights in the Bleach universe, and finally, we've gotten good looks at the quincies led by Yhwach. Moreover, iconic characters from the manga, like the explosive Bambietta and Bazz-B, have finally been animated. The series is still ongoing, and we're closely approaching the climax. But, if you want to immerse yourself in Bleach further, you have a fantastic option on Roblox.

Peroxide is undoubtedly one of the best anime games on Roblox. Based on the world of Bleach, you'll play as a character in one of the three factions: Soul Reaper, Quincy, and Arrancar. It acts like a traditional RPG where you perform quests, level up, and take on raid bosses like Aizen and Ulquiorra. Whether you're a Bleach fan or otherwise, this game will give you an action-packed, sword-slashing, and hollow-bashing experience.

So, if you want to live the life of a Bleach character, then Peroxide is undoubtedly a must-have.

title: 5 Games Like Roblox to Play on PlayStation
image_title: RobloxGo - 5 Games Like Roblox to Play on PlayStation
image_alt: RobloxGo - 5 Games Like Roblox to Play on PlayStation - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Do you like to play Roblox but only have a PlayStation? Well, don’t worry as here are 5 Games like Roblox you can enjoy on your console.
content_html:
5 Games Like Roblox to Play on PlayStation

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Do you like to play Roblox but only have a PlayStation? Well, don’t worry as here are 5 Games like Roblox you can enjoy on your console.

Come enjoy these 5 games that you can play with mechanics, gameplay, and graphics just like Roblox. You can explore different concepts featured in these titles and you can enjoy their unique features and discover what their world has to offer just like the numerous entries in RobloxGo. So come and take a gander, check out which ones you like to play and experience.

1. Minecraft



Go and create your own world out of various materials that you can mine, gather, and collect in order to make them into different items altogether. Minecraftfeatures a system where you can go be free to do anything that you want and explore the wilds to location you decide to set your base. You are also going to meet creatures all around so better keep a watchful eye. It is set in 3D and it has a great set of pixel art graphics with cool music and sound effects for an awesome gaming experience.

2. LEGO Worlds



Another game for you to check out is LEGO Worlds where you get to live your fantasy of playing with Lego on your Playstation. Get to build your ideal world for you to make your bases, cities, and areas based on your design and imagination, all in the signature Lego look. It features an awesome set of 3D graphics for you to enjoy and fully have some fun.

3. Sheltered



Build your own bunker and survive the post-apocalyptic world of Sheltered. The goal is to make it out alive alongside four family members as there is no coming back if they get killed. The game lets you make the decisions on the design of your bunker and the crafting of items as well. You are going to need your best in managing your resources and characters to complete your goals.

4. Terraria



Enjoy a fun game where you get to mine and gather resources, craft your own items, build your bases, meet different NPCs, and fight it out against aliens, creatures of the night, and other beings all in one title. Terraria is a 2D RPG with pixel-style art where you get to play a character in a world full of mystery and danger. You can create different item sets and take on various enemies while venturing out in the wild. It depends on how you want to establish your own bases and keep your NPCs safe against attacks at night.

5. Fortnite



Shoot your way to victory with this awesome first-person shooting, base-building game of Fortnite. Enjoy smooth animations and fluid transitions as you compete for different maps to defeat the enemy and grab the win. You can also put your imagination to the test as you build structures that can give you an advantage in the match. Have fun shooting and crafting on their various available modes.

To sum it all up, these are 5 awesome games that you can play on your Playstation if you are looking for titles which has a similarity with Roblox. They feature world-building, pixelated art, and fighting against monsters of their world or other players online. So come and give it a try now – see which ones you like best and get ready to have some fun!

Catch Legendary Pokémon in Rayquaza Brick Bronze Reborn on Roblox

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Planning on playing the renowned Pokémon Brick Bronze on RobloxGo? Here’s a detailed review of the game to help you get familiar.

A Brief Introduction of the Game


Step into the enchanting world of Pokémon Brick Bronze, a captivating RobloxGo game that brings the beloved Pokémon universe to life. With its unique blend of gameplay mechanics, captivating visuals, and immersive experiences, this game has garnered a dedicated fan base. In this in-depth review, let's delve into the game's mechanics, visuals, and overall experience.

A Legendary Pokémon Adventure


Pokémon Brick Bronze offers a rich storyline with engaging quests and challenges that mimic the classic Pokémon RPGs. Embark on a journey to catch, train, and battle Pokémon across a vast virtual landscape. There are many quests and adventures for players to enjoy, and the overall experience is fun, thanks to the content variety. Like traditional Pokémon games, players can catch various Pokémon species, train them, and form a team of six to compete in battles. The game’s combat and battles are also its highlight and set it apart from other games. Engaging in turn-based battles emphasizes strategy, as players must choose the right moves and tactics to defeat opponents.

You can even participate in gym battles and tournaments for a more competitive experience. If you’re in the mood, you can test your skills in Gym battles and participate in tournaments to earn badges and rise in the ranks, and all of this ensures there’s never a dull moment as you dive into the game.

Raising the Bar when it comes to Visuals


Pokémon Brick Bronze adopts a visually appealing art style that pays homage to the Pokémon franchise while fitting seamlessly within the RobloxGo universe. The game boasts a range of environments, from lush forests to bustling cities, each with its own unique design and charm. The attention to detail in Pokémon models showcases the developers' dedication to creating a faithful representation of these creatures within the RobloxGo platform. In conclusion, the visual experience you’ll enjoy in this game is as good as any other Pokémon game out there.

Overall, a masterpiece


Pokémon Brick Bronze successfully captures the essence of exploring a Pokémon world, offering players the thrill of encountering and capturing creatures in a virtual setting. The game's online multiplayer aspect allows players to interact with fellow trainers, trade Pokémon, and engage in battles, fostering a sense of camaraderie. The game strikes a balance between nostalgia for classic Pokémon games and the novelty of experiencing them in a new, virtual format.

Pokémon Brick Bronze in RobloxGo offers an immersive experience that captures the essence of the Pokémon universe while providing a unique twist through the RobloxGo platform. With its engaging gameplay, captivating visuals, and ongoing updates, the game delivers an enjoyable experience that appeals to both Pokémon fans and RobloxGo enthusiasts.

title: 5 Most Visited Roblox Games of 2023
image_title: RobloxGo - 5 Most Visited Roblox Games of 2023
image_alt: RobloxGo - 5 Most Visited Roblox Games of 2023 - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Roblox means endless creativity and fun and, in this article, we’ll be discussing 5 of the most visited Roblox games that are a cut above the rest.
content_html:
5 Most Visited Roblox Games of 2023

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Roblox means endless creativity and fun and, in this article, we’ll be discussing 5 of the most visited Roblox games that are a cut above the rest.

RobloxGo boasts an extensive and diverse array of games, catering to a wide range of interests and preferences within its virtual universe. From simulations and role-playing adventures to action-packed shooters and creative sandboxes, Roblox offers a colossal roster of experiences crafted by both amateur and seasoned game developers. In this article, we'll delve into five of the most visited and engaging games that epitomize the platform's versatility and showcase the creative potential of its community. These games stand as prime examples of Roblox's ability to captivate players across different genres and provide a glimpse into the impressive breadth of entertainment the platform has to offer.

Brookhaven



Starting off with one of the best, Brookhaven presents an immersive virtual world where players can explore, socialize, and unleash their creativity. Set in a picturesque suburban town, the game offers a blend of role-playing, customization, and interactive experiences. Players can design their own homes, engage in various activities, and connect with others in a sprawling community. The gameplay seamlessly fuses open-world exploration with the freedom to decorate and personalize your space. The creative possibilities are vast, ranging from interior design to social events, making each visit a unique adventure. With its diverse range of activities and the opportunity to express oneself through customization, "Brookhaven" delivers an encompassing experience.

Blox Fruits



Blox Fruits is a captivating Roblox game that immerses players in a dynamic pirate-themed world of adventure and combat. Set on various islands, the game invites players to become formidable pirates, engaging in quests, battles, and exploration. The gameplay combines open-world exploration with intense combat mechanics, allowing players to wield different abilities and weapons as they confront enemies and bosses. The thrill of mastering diverse fighting styles and uncovering hidden treasures adds depth to the experience. The game's action-packed combat, variety of abilities, and the excitement of discovering new islands make Blox Fruits an engaging and thrilling adventure.

Murder Mystery



Murder Mystery 2 is a gripping Roblox game that plunges players into a thrilling world of mystery and suspense. Set in various intriguing environments, the game assigns players one of three roles: innocent, sheriff, or murderer. As an innocent, you work to uncover the murderer's identity and stay safe, while the sheriff aims to protect innocents and eliminate the murderer. The murderer's goal is to eliminate everyone else while avoiding detection. This gameplay setup creates a captivating blend of deduction, strategy, and tense interactions. The game's creative maps and unpredictable scenarios contribute to the adrenaline-fueled experience, as players navigate the suspenseful atmosphere while trying to outwit their opponents.

Adopt Me



Adopt Me is a heartwarming virtual pet simulation game that lets players care for and raise a variety of adorable pets. The gameplay centers around adopting pets, customizing their living spaces, and embarking on various activities to nurture them. Players can explore a colorful world, trade pets, and partake in mini-games to earn rewards. The game's creativity shines through its wide range of pets, customizations, and interactive elements, fostering a sense of companionship and responsibility. The overall experience is one of joy and connection, as players build relationships with their pets.

Arm Wrestle Simulator



Last but not the least, Arm Wrestle Simulator is a fun and engaging game that lets players experience the excitement of arm wrestling battles. The gameplay revolves around challenging opponents to arm wrestling matches by rapidly clicking buttons to build up strength and strategically using power-ups to secure victory. The simplicity of the mechanics adds to the accessible and enjoyable nature of the game. The thrill of competing against friends or AI opponents in intense arm wrestling showdowns creates a lighthearted and competitive atmosphere.

Overall, there’s no shortage of games on RobloxGo and the games mentioned above are not just creative, but they’re really fun to play and that’s why they’re the most visited games.

title: The History of Roblox - From 2006 to Today
image_title: RobloxGo - The History of Roblox - From 2006 to Today
image_alt: RobloxGo - The History of Roblox - From 2006 to Today - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: The Roblox gaming platform is still and very much currently active and growing today. It has surpassed the survival rate of most gaming platforms and doesn’t look to be slowing down anytime soon. Let’s take a quick peek at how this amazing gaming platform came to be.
content_html:
The History of Roblox - From 2006 to Today

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
The Roblox gaming platform is still and very much currently active and growing today. It has surpassed the survival rate of most gaming platforms and doesn’t look to be slowing down anytime soon. Let’s take a quick peek at how this amazing gaming platform came to be.

The Roblox platform is probably one of the longest-living online gaming and building platforms today. Also, if you count its first introduction in 1989, when it was still a general-purpose physics simulator called Interactive Physics, by a research and development company called Knowledge Revolution, what became Roblox has come a long way. The company was founded and run by David Baszucki, later joined by (the late) Erik Cassel and in 1997 by Keith Lucas. Knowledge Revolution, however, was bought by the MSC Software Corporation for a whooping sum of $20 million in 1999. David and Erik left the company in 2004 to found the Roblox Corporation and were soon joined by other employees of MSC Software.


Based on their past development experience, David and Eric started formally developing the game and (eventually) platform that would be Roblox today as early as 2003. Finalizing it by 2004, the online gaming platform was first called GoBlocks and DinoBlocks. At this point, the game was at its beta stage and, compared to what we have today, still relatively crude in its construction. Nevertheless, it was able to get across to its initial users the purpose of the platform itself: to build worlds, explore, and play in them. By 2006, the game came out of beta and was officially launched. Roblox was born.


The main feature of the game was the way it looked. Roblox was based on blocks. Everything was initially made out of blocks: the characters, the environment, and the objects that the game could manipulate and build upon. Roblox was confused with a LEGO game due to its similar look and feel. Regardless, Roblox was an online multi-player platform where online users of all ages could join, build, and explore. With this, the Roblox team continued to improve and supercharge the platform that by 2007, Roblox had to be COPPA compliant with the sheer number of kids joining the game.

By 2011, the gaming platform was populated by gamers and users alike. To this, the first Roblox convention, the ROBLOX Rally 2011, was held in San Francisco. 2011 was also the year that Minecraft was launched, and the game's popularity did give Roblox stiff competition. Roblox user events were likewise held in the following years, with the ROBLOX Game Conference in 2012 and the ROBLOX BLOXcon events in 2013. These events brought significant attention to the platform as fans continued to support the game as the years went by. In 2013, Roblox was made available to mobile devices.



Sadly, the same year, co-founder Erik Cassel passed away after a difficult struggle with cancer. Erik has done a lot to make Roblox what it is today and was sorely missed. Many developments were slowly evolving the platform into a better and more exciting environment, as the advancement in its graphics presentation, a sleek world development system and editor, and an active and ever-growing community where builders could invite players to visit and experience their worlds, and a thriving Roblox economy which utilized the monetization of content like character gear, features, development tools, and the builder worlds themselves with the game's real cash convertible currency, the Robux.


Today, Roblox sports an excellent AI-assisted building map and world editor. With the number of assets available for use (free or otherwise), Roblox game developers find it much easier to build their worlds. Using LUA programming for the game command scripts implemented to drive the builder maps provides developers with a far easier way than the more complicated programming methods employed by complex game engines like Unity and Unreal.

With all the new developments implemented into the platform today, like a vast array of character creation options, its AI-assisted world-building, and the myriad of features that have kept gamers and fans coming back for more, especially during the pandemic years when the platform had around 32 Million daily active users. Roblox looks like it is going to keep on going into the future. A sad feature of the game today is the absence of BuilderMan, who used to greet everyone and get them up and started with the game. With all the changes continually happening on the platform for good or for bad, the dude was able to accomplish his goal from the very beginning. He got a lot of users to build, build, and build.

title: Roblox vs Among Us - Which Game Wins the Showdown?
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox vs Among Us - Which Game Wins the Showdown?
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox vs Among Us - Which Game Wins the Showdown? - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: When it comes to social deduction games, Among Us takes pride in being one of the titles to bring this tabletop mystery to mainstream gaming. What does Roblox have to say about it?
content_html:
Roblox vs Among Us - Which Game Wins the Showdown?

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
When it comes to social deduction games, Among Us takes pride in being one of the titles to bring this tabletop mystery to mainstream gaming. What does Roblox have to say about it?

Do you think you’re reading the article title wrong? Not really. On one hand, you have Innersloth’s social deduction online multiplayer game. What’s on the other side? The Roblox Corporation’s online gaming platform is made for both players and game makers.

It doesn’t take a lot to figure out that this is going to be an apples-to-oranges scenario. Let’s assume you’re new to either. Why don’t we dig a little further to know what to expect of the two? Don’t worry; there won’t be too much deep-diving into each game’s nitty-gritty.

Let’s get a few little details out of the way, though. You can play Among Us or Roblox across several platforms and there are even some Roblox games based on Among Us. Whether you have a mobile phone that meets the needed specs or a decked-out PC, you’ll have no problem hitting the download button. Among Us, and plenty of Roblox games, have social functions built in. It won’t hurt to type a few words and have a chat with both friends and strangers.


Among Us reached the height of popularity around 2020. The game was one of the few outlets people had access to at the time of the pandemic. It still has a following in the forms that are beyond gameplay, such as animated movies and other forms of fan art. Few multiplayer games could provide a level of fun and excitement, such as trusting a bunch of strangers to cooperate with you while being on the lookout for Imposters with the mission to delete your very existence. You look for tasks and restore the sectors of the facility you and other Crewmates are trapped in. There’s also the part where you’ll be on the lookout for saboteurs hiding in the midst.

Roblox caters to the more popular end of the gaming spectrum. Players can choose from a plethora of custom-made games called Experiences. You can get an idea of what awaits you by reading the summary. Fishing out more context is easy: just read what the players have to say about the game through their reviews.

Each experience promises to be different from the rest. There’s a game for just about any theme you have in mind. Let the search engine surprise you, or just scroll on the home screen to find out what the community says are the best titles around. You can play using a controller, your trusty keyboard and mouse tandem, or touch controls. Most games allow you to customize a character using assets the game creator provides; then, you can explore to your heart’s content.


Roblox’s vast library of custom content means you’ll be running into personalized versions of social deduction games. Don’t be surprised if you see voxel versions of the Crewmates in full 3D. This adds a new fun factor when it comes to staying alive – and figuring out who among your group is planning to remove everybody else. Of course, some stalwarts swear by the original way to play as an Amogus. You can express your commitment to the mystery multiplayer game by learning how to code in Roblox and create your spiritual successor of Crewmates and Impostors.

title: OperaGX - The Ultimate Browser for Gamers and Roblox Fans
image_title: RobloxGo - OperaGX - The Ultimate Browser for Gamers and Roblox Fans
image_alt: RobloxGo - OperaGX - The Ultimate Browser for Gamers and Roblox Fans - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Let’s find out why OperaGX is known as the browser for gamers!
content_html:
OperaGX - The Ultimate Browser for Gamers and Roblox Fans

November 2, 2025 by Aethyna
>
Let’s find out why OperaGX is known as the browser for gamers!

The Opera web browser, which was developed by Norwegian software company Opera Software and was publicly released in 1996, may not be a household name when it comes to web browsers, but it is used by around 3% of the browser market share worldwide, which translates to around 155.4 million people out of a total of 5.18 billion internet users worldwide... that’s a whole lot of people.

Available for almost all current operating systems, including the mobile platform, Opera decided to make the switch from using its proprietary Presto layout engine, which had received many awards for its ease of use and very useful features, to using the Chromium engine in 2013, thanks to a strong partnership with Google.

That being said, the current browser market is a very competitive one, ranging from the pervasiveness of Google products, including its web browser, Google Chrome, in our lives to the convenient, in-built nature of Microsoft’s Edge in Microsoft Windows, the operating system (OS) that dominated 70% of the market share when it comes to computer OS. Unsurprisingly, Opera finds itself going up against goliaths who have massive funds and resources. It needs to come up with something new - something that an increasingly-connected world needs - and fast!

This is where Opera Software came up with the idea of a dedicated Gaming Browser. Named the “OperaGX”, this gaming browser isn’t just for browsing the internet, but it is also optimized in such a way that gamers can load just about any browser game quickly and enjoy a great gaming experience. The browser has a GX Corner panel that advertises all newly available games, as well as where you can buy them (only official distributors of the games; legit ones) at a nice discount. The games you see are exclusively tailored to your liking based on your browsing patterns, so you won’t see deals for a racing game if you don’t like or play racing games.

Not to mention, for players who like to keep on top of things, there’s also a Daily News section that offers a dedicated stream of gaming-related news. If you enjoy live streaming your plays or if you enjoy watching others play games, you’ll be happy to know that the OperaGX comes with a Twitch panel as well. The panel makes it easy for you to browse the channels you follow and receive notifications whenever your favorite streamer starts streaming. You can even set a game as your OperaGX browser's background if you want!

As useful as the other features are, the best part about using OperaGX is its GX Control option. The feature that truly sets it apart from your run-of-the-mill browsers, this control option functions as a CPU and RAM limiter, allowing you to set how much RAM and CPU resources your browser use. This is incredibly useful, especially if you, like many of us do, tend to run other apps in addition to the browser. This way, the browser wouldn’t just hog all of your computer’s resources, leaving you with little to nothing to do other stuff with… I’m looking at you, Chrome!

Of course, the browser also has a cool, sleek design that any gamer would instantly fall in love with. It has a minimalist layout that looks similar to a console gaming layout and is easy to navigate. The browser is fully customizable, allowing gamers to easily tweak the look and feel of their OperaGX browsers via the Easy Setup feature, essentially customizing the browser into what they want it to look like. There are many themes to choose from as well.

Gamers who use Razer’s Chroma RGB lighting would be delighted to know that the browser has Razer Chroma integration too. This allows them to duplicate the chosen colors on any Chroma-enabled accessories they may have onto their OperaGX browser. There’s no need to set anything manually!


Plus, if you’re a fan of Roblox, which you likely do since you’re reading this on RobloxGo - the community site for Roblox, you can also get some amazing freebies for the Roblox game, Arsenal, by heading over theOperaGX x Arsenal collaboration webpage on OperaGX. Simply follow the instructions on screen once you do that and you should be able to claim a bundle of cool cosmetics for your Roblox avatar, including weapon skins, a new melee weapon, snazzy effects, and even a brand-new character skin.

So, all in all, the OperaGX has everything a gamer needs for his/her gaming purposes on the browser, whether it is a sleek design that’s entirely customizable or a system that’s optimized for browser gaming. This is exactly why the OperaGX is known as the browser for gamers. OperaGX is completely free to download, so if you game on the browser often, why not give it a try? It might just be the right browser for you, and once you go OperaGX, you’ll never turn back!

short_description: Clicker games have been really popular recently and, in this article, we’ll be picking out some of the best and most-played clicker games that are available on Roblox.
content_html:
5 Best Clicker Games on Roblox

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Clicker games have been really popular recently and, in this article, we’ll be picking out some of the best and most-played clicker games that are available on Roblox.

The craze of clicker games on Roblox is upon us, and, RobloxGo is the platform for us to enjoy them. On Roblox, the Clicker genre has found a creative space to flourish, with several engaging titles capturing players' attention. These games offer a delightful mix of addictive clicking mechanics, creative upgrades, and a dash of strategic decision-making.

From farming simulations where you can grow and sell crops with each click to city-building games where your clicks expand and improve your cityscape, the Clicker games on Roblox are not only a relaxing way to pass the time but also provide a satisfying sense of growth and accomplishment. Whether you're a fan of the genre or new to it, the clicker games we’re about to mention will be worth your while.

Clicker Simulator


Clicker Simulator is an engaging and vibrant Clicker game that encapsulates the essence of the genre. In this game, players are tasked with clicking on spring-themed eggs to collect resources, which can then be used to upgrade and enhance their egg-clicking capabilities. The gameplay is both simple and addictive, offering a satisfying loop of clicking, collecting, and upgrading. As you progress, you'll unlock new eggs with unique designs and bonuses, adding a layer of variety and excitement. The cheerful visuals and the joy of watching your egg collection grow make for an enjoyable experience.

Race Clicker


Race Clicker on Roblox offers an exciting twist to the Clicker genre by introducing racing elements into the mix. The gameplay seamlessly combines the addictive clicking mechanic with the thrill of racing, creating a unique and engaging experience. As you click rapidly, your car gains speed, and strategic upgrades further enhance your performance. The competitive nature of racing against other players adds an element of challenge and excitement. The game's dynamic visuals and the rush of crossing the finish line make for a captivating experience.

Anime Racing Clicker


Anime Racing Clicker brings a delightful fusion of anime aesthetics and racing mechanics to the Roblox platform. This game combines the addictive nature of Clicker gameplay with the excitement of anime-inspired racing. Players click to accelerate their anime-themed vehicles, competing against opponents on vibrant tracks. Upgrades and boosts can be acquired through clicking, enhancing your racing prowess. The captivating blend of anime visuals, intense competition, and incremental progression creates an experience that's both visually appealing and engaging.

Clicker Mining Simulator


Clicker Mining Simulator offers a captivating twist to the Clicker genre with its mining-focused gameplay. In this game, players click to mine resources and gather valuable ores from the depths of the earth. As you click, your mining prowess improves, leading to more efficient resource collection. The game introduces a sense of strategy as you decide which upgrades to prioritize for optimal mining results. The satisfaction of watching your mining operation expand and evolve adds an element of progression to the experience.

Anime Clicker Fight



Anime Clicker Fight brings an exciting fusion of anime aesthetics and battle mechanics to the world of Roblox. Players engage in battles by clicking to attack opponents and unleash powerful moves. The more you click, the stronger your attacks become, leading to satisfyingly dynamic fights. As you progress, you can recruit new characters and level them up, adding a strategic layer to the experience. The game's visually appealing anime art style, coupled with the thrill of battles driven by your clicks, creates an immersive and action-packed atmosphere.

All in all, RobloxGo is packed with clicker games, and the best ones are mentioned above if you’re planning to try some.

title: Meet OperaGX: Redefining Browser Gaming for Roblox Players
image_title: RobloxGo - Meet OperaGX: Redefining Browser Gaming for Roblox Players
image_alt: RobloxGo - Meet OperaGX: Redefining Browser Gaming for Roblox Players - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Find out why OperaGX is hailed as the best browser for gaming!
content_html:
Meet OperaGX: Redefining Browser Gaming for Roblox Players

August 17, 2023 by Aethyna
>
Find out why OperaGX is hailed as the best browser for gaming!

The Opera web browser, which was developed by Norwegian software company Opera Software and was publicly released in 1996, may not be a household name when it comes to web browsers, but it is used by around 3% of the browser market share worldwide, which translates to around 155.4 million people out of a total of 5.18 billion internet users worldwide... that’s a whole lot of people.

Available for almost all current operating systems, including the mobile platform, Opera decided to make the switch from using its proprietary Presto layout engine, which had received many awards for its ease of use and convenient features, to using the Chromium engine in 2013, thanks to a strong partnership with Google.

That being said, the current browser market is a very competitive one, ranging from the pervasiveness of Google products, including its web browser, Google Chrome, in our lives to the convenient, in-built nature of Microsoft’s Edge in Microsoft Windows, the operating system (OS) that dominated 70% of the market share when it comes to computer OS. Unsurprisingly, Opera finds itself going up against goliaths who have massive funds and resources. It needs to come up with something new - something that an increasingly connected world needs - and fast!

This is where Opera Software came up with the idea of a dedicated Gaming Browser. Named the “OperaGX”, this gaming browser isn’t just for browsing the internet, but it is also optimized in such a way that gamers can load just about any browser game quickly and enjoy a great gaming experience. The browser has a GX Corner panel that advertises all newly available games, as well as where you can buy them (only official distributors of the games; legit ones) at a nice discount. The games you see are exclusively tailored to your liking based on your browsing patterns, so you won’t see deals for a racing game if you don’t like or play racing games.

Not to mention, for players who like to keep on top of things, there’s also a Daily News section that offers a dedicated stream of gaming-related news. If you enjoy live streaming your plays or if you enjoy watching others play games, you’ll be happy to know that the OperaGX comes with a Twitch panel as well. The panel makes it easy for you to browse the channels you follow and receive notifications whenever your favorite streamer starts streaming. You can even set a game as your OperaGX browser's background if you want!

As useful as the other features are, the best part about using OperaGX is its GX Control option. The feature that truly sets it apart from your run-of-the-mill browsers, this control option functions as a CPU and RAM limiter, allowing you to set how much RAM and CPU resources your browser use. This is incredibly useful, especially if you, like many of us do, tend to run other apps besides the browser. This way, the browser wouldn’t just hog all of your computer’s resources, leaving you with little to nothing to do other stuff with… I’m looking at you, Chrome!

Of course, the browser also has a cool, sleek design that any gamer would instantly fall in love with. It has a minimalist layout that looks similar to a console gaming layout and is easy to navigate. The browser is fully customizable, allowing gamers to easily tweak the look and feel of their OperaGX browsers via the Easy Setup feature, essentially customizing the browser into what they want it to look like. There are many themes to choose from as well.

Gamers who use Razer’s Chroma RGB lighting would be delighted to know that the browser has Razer Chroma integration too. This allows them to duplicate the chosen colors on any Chroma-enabled accessories they may have onto their OperaGX browser. There’s no need to set anything manually!

Plus, if you’re a fan of Roblox, which you likely do since you’re reading this on RobloxGo - the community site for Roblox, you can also get some amazing freebies for the Roblox game, Arsenal, by heading over the OperaGX x Arsenal collaboration webpage on OperaGX. Simply follow the instructions on screen once you do that and you should be able to claim a bundle of cool cosmetics for your Roblox avatar, including weapon skins, a new melee weapon, snazzy effects, and even a brand-new character skin.

So, all in all, the OperaGX has everything a gamer needs for his/her gaming purposes on the browser, whether it is a sleek design that’s entirely customizable or a system optimized for browser gaming. This is precisely why the OperaGX is known as the browser for gamers. OperaGX is completely free to download, so if you game on the browser often, why not give it a try? It might just be the right browser for you, and once you go OperaGX, you’ll never turn back!

Latest Roblox Promo Codes for August 2023

August 14, 2023 by Aethyna
>
Don't miss out on all these amazing goodies - claim them before they are gone!

If you're looking for all the latest Roblox promo codes for August 2023, you've come to the right place! Claiming these codes will grant you some amazing free accessories and items to customize your Roblox avatar, making all your friends go green with envy! Plus, we made it simple for you to redeem these codes, complete with step-by-step instructions that you can easily follow.

So, you don't have to be flushed with Robux to deck out your Roblox character with all the best items and clothes, just redeem these codes every month, and you'll have more than enough items to mix and match to get the ideal look!

Latest Roblox Promo Codes List for August 2023


General redemption
● SPIDERCOLA - Spider Cola shoulder accessory
● TWEETROBLOX - The Bird Says shoulder accessory

Promo codes for Island of Move for August 2023
● DIY - Kinetic Staff back accessory
● GETMOVING - Speedy Shades face accessory
● SETTINGTHESTAGE - Build it Backpack back accessory
● STRIKEAPOSE - Hustle Hat (hat) accessory
● VICTORYLAP - Cardio Cans hat accessory
● WORLDALIVE - Crystalline Companion shoulder accessory

Promo codes for Mansion of Wonder for August 2023
● BOARDWALK - Ring of Flames waist accessory
● FXARTIST - Artist Backpack back accessory
● GLIMMER - Head Slime hat accessory
● PARTICLEWIZARD - Tomes of the Magus shoulder accessory
● THINGSGOBOOM - Ghostly Aura waist accessory

How to redeem Roblox promo codes


General redemption process
For codes that aren't associated with any game, you just need to head over to https://www.roblox.com/promocodes after logging into your Roblox account.

How to redeem promo codes for Roblox games?
For game-linked codes, you'll need to redeem them within the games respectively. Often, it's as easy as simply pulling up the menu by pressing the E button and entering the codes, or even clicking on some Redeem Code button that will appear alongside the Play Now button of the game, but sometimes, you'll need to find the right NPC in the game to redeem your promo codes.

● How to redeem promo codes for Island of Move?
1. Launch the Island of Move on Roblox
2. You'll be prompted to "Play Game". Right underneath it, you should see the Redeem Code button. Click on it.
3. The promo code redemption screen will pop up. Enter the codes provided and click the Blue checkmark to confirm the redemption.
4. Check your Roblox Inventory to make sure the codes have been properly redeemed.

● How to redeem promo codes for Mansion of Wonder?
1. Launch the Mansion of Wonder on Roblox
2. Look for and follow the sign directing you to the "Swag Booth".
3. Talk to the red fox to open up the code redemption screen. Enter the codes provided, and you're done!
4. Check your Roblox Inventory to make sure the codes have been properly redeemed.


Make sure to check back in next month on RobloxGo to get a new list of Roblox promo codes to redeem for free!

title: How Roblox Is Powering the Indie Gaming Revolution

short_description: Over the years the old and blocky Roblox platform has grown to gargantuan proportions. Let's take a look at how this can help up-and-coming Indie game developers.
content_html:
How Roblox Is Powering the Indie Gaming Revolution

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Over the years the old and blocky Roblox platform has grown to gargantuan proportions. As it continues to grow, Roblox has continued to support its users by providing them with a platform where they can now create and earn from their creations (should they choose to do so). Let's take a look at how this can help up-and-coming Indie game developers.

Roblox has been around for a very long time. The gaming platform, which was initially made out of blocks, began way back in 2002. Back then, it was more like an experiment in creating a virtual creator site or space online. Roblox was a running simulation site where a block-like interactive environment could be put together and used by both visitors and creators alike. At first, it was more of a building activity site in which gaming was added gradually as the years progressed.

Today, however, Roblox has become a far cry from what it was like in the early 2Ks and the 2010s, as the creative functionality of the platform (although still blocky) has gone beyond comparison to the earlier versions of itself. Also, with the current advancements in PC technology, graphics has come a long way from its old blocky start.

Roblox, at the current date, sports a compelling game and map editor and an easy way to develop a game with minimal knowledge in coding. Roblox uses LUA compared to the C++ or C# language standard with other 3D game engines. Although compared to such titans as Unreal and Unity in limitations and capabilities, the Roblox game engine can hold its ground as a more user-friendly, easy-to-use game development environment. Roblox also has the backing of a vast user and gaming community. It is said to have the most support tutorials and documentation to help anyone interested in making good use of its game engine.


In this regard, Roblox is probably the easiest (if not the best) way of getting into game development with minimal skill and know-how. In recent years, due to its ever-growing popularity and the continually growing number of users, the Roblox platform began to implement and encourage user developers to create gaming content for other users to play. Roblox has adopted something similar to Steam by publishing, marketing, and selling Roblox games created by Roblox account holders. As of this year, approximately 40 million Roblox games (known as experiences) are available, with an estimated 43 million platform users daily. This is how big Roblox has become.


Due to this, Roblox has been encouraging more and more would-be game developers to begin their journey into Indie game making. Developers who upload their games on Roblox earn via the platform's Engagement-Based Payout (EBP) feature, which will depend on how much a Roblox Premium member will spend playing your game. Many have already earned through Roblox's experience platform. Although the Roblox commission on each game is a bit high, Roblox is still an excellent place to start a career in Indie game development. Not only is its current AI-enhanced game development system (editor) easier to learn, but a developer can use more than enough resources and assets to make a game. The developers can create their content to use and add to their games.


Many game developers use Roblox as a springboard or stepping stone for their more advanced and elaborate projects. They would modify and port their Roblox creations to a more powerful game engine and sell the game as an Indie on the other online platforms. An example is the game "Vibrant Venture," which started as a Roblox game, was then ported over to Unity by its developer and finally marketed on Steam. Other games have gone this path, with some maintaining the old original game on Roblox and selling a modified version on another platform. Regardless, the amount of time spent learning to make and develop a fully functional game via Roblox is not wasted. Aside from learning/mastering the process of making a game, having a platform to distribute and sell the game makes up for more than enough compared to starting from nothing.

Regardless, the Roblox community is a vast and bustling place to be. Being able to display and present your creativity by having others experience it is not bad for a beginning game developer. The feedback and advice one can get from others trying out your game can significantly help make it a far better experience.

Game development in Roblox lets a developer go through the entire experience of making a game, from creating a game map, searching or creating the game assets, writing or creating the scripts for the game logic, customizing the characters, making a game movie, and so on. These will be learned skills that would be invaluable in other gaming projects, be it with Roblox or another gaming platform. For an up-and-coming Indie developer, making and selling a game on Roblox will be an excellent move.
