title: Best Games Like Roblox to Play Right Now
image_title: RobloxGo - Best Games Like Roblox to Play Right Now
image_alt: RobloxGo - Best Games Like Roblox to Play Right Now - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Roblox sure has set the standard high when it comes to this particular genre and, we’ll be discussing a few games that are similar to Roblox and you might like.
content_html:
Best Games Like Roblox to Play Right Now

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Roblox sure has set the standard high when it comes to this particular genre and, we’ll be discussing a few games that are similar to Roblox and you might like.

Roblox has achieved worldwide fame due to its unique combination of a user-generated gaming platform and a social hub. It empowers players to design and create virtual worlds using the platform's intuitive building tools, fostering creativity and collaboration.

Additionally, the wide variety of games created by players for players spans numerous genres and appeals to a broad audience. With its accessible nature and supportive community, Roblox has become a hub for social interaction, providing endless opportunities for players to connect, play, and explore together. In this article, we’ll introduce you to a few games similar to Roblox.

Second Life


Second Life is an amazing 3D virtual place to do whatever you want in, mirroring the real world in many ways but giving you the freedom to do anything you want. You begin by creating your avatar, and from there, you can explore the world. As you travel around, you will be able to meet lots of people, often at clubs or in open public spaces. Meeting people and making friends is a huge part of any virtual world, and Second Life gives many opportunities to do so. The visuals are also stunning, making this game a masterpiece.

Animal Jam


Animal Jam is an enchanting and immersive virtual world for kids that centers around the animal kingdom. The gameplay revolves around creating and customizing adorable animal avatars, exploring the vast and vibrant lands of Jamaa, and completing educational activities and mini-games. The game features a safe and monitored environment, ensuring a positive and child-friendly experience. The visuals are colorful and charming, appealing to its young audience. Players can also adopt and care for virtual pets, adding to the interactive and nurturing aspect of the game.

Animal Jam offers a delightful educational experience for children, promoting creativity, friendship, and learning in a secure online environment.

Wizard 101


Wizard 101 is a fascinating horse game that blends magical adventures with spell-casting and horse-riding elements. The gameplay allows players to create their wizard avatars, attend a magical school, and embark on quests to save the mystical world of the Spiral. As players progress, they collect spells, magical items, and, notably, magical horses that can be ridden through various landscapes.

Moreover, the game offers an engaging and immersive experience with its diverse quests, strategic spell battles, and captivating storyline. The visuals are colorful, whimsical, and highly appealing, adding to the game's charm. Overall, Wizard101 provides an enchanting and entertaining experience, attracting players of all ages who appreciate the blend of magical wizardry and equestrian adventures.

Star Stable


Star Stable is a captivating horse game that immerses players in a magical world of horseback riding and adventure. The gameplay centers around players becoming Star Stable's hero, unlocking mysteries, and exploring the mystical island of Jorvik on horseback. With its compelling storyline and diverse quests, players forge strong bonds with their virtual horses and participate in various equestrian competitions. The game offers a vast open-world experience with stunning visuals and beautiful landscapes to explore. Star Stable provides horse lovers and adventure seekers thrilling and interactive journey f

IMVU


IMVU is an immersive virtual game that offers a unique social and interactive experience. The gameplay revolves around creating personalized avatars, dressing them up with a wide range of fashionable items, and connecting with other players in a virtual 3D chat environment. The game's features include the ability to design and decorate virtual spaces, participate in virtual parties, and engage in a variety of user-generated activities. The overall experience is engaging and social, as players can make new friends, express their creativity, and explore a vibrant virtual world.

Rail Nation


Rail Nation is a stunning virtual game that puts players in charge of managing their own railway company. The gameplay involves building and expanding a railway network, transporting goods, and competing against other players to become the most successful rail tycoon. With its strategic elements and time management mechanics, players must make critical decisions to optimize routes, upgrade trains, and maximize profits. The game's features include realistic train models, city development, and cooperation with other players through alliances. The overall experience is both challenging and rewarding.

Overall, Roblox is in a league of its own, but if you’re looking for some similar games to Roblox, the ones we’ve mentioned above are fantastic alternatives.

title: Roblox on PlayStation - Can You Play It Yet?
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox on PlayStation - Can You Play It Yet?
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox on PlayStation - Can You Play It Yet? - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Last year, Sony expressed its doubts about Roblox in PlayStation's child-dominant gaming crowd. The gaming community has wondered if that stance has changed. Is there a possibility of Roblox finally getting an announcement of a coming PlayStation release?
content_html:
Roblox on PlayStation - Can You Play It Yet?

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Last year, Sony expressed its doubts about Roblox in PlayStation's child-dominant gaming crowd. The gaming community has wondered if that stance has changed. Is there a possibility of Roblox finally getting an announcement of a coming PlayStation release?

You must have read the rumors and leaks from multiple articles about talks on getting Roblox to PlayStation platforms. This has been going around since early 2022. A number of gaming articles have shown PlayStation CEO Jim Ryan having doubts about bringing Roblox to the platform. What he said to investors in 2022 is often quoted as:

“Historically, because of the large number of children that play on the PlayStation, we have been very careful with regards to opening them up to anything that could potentially exploit them…”

This was ended with a somewhat hopeful tone:

“Over the last couple of years, however, we have reviewed those policies and relaxed a little on this. We have been conservative for too long, and now we are currently engaging with people at Roblox. We hope that the situation will change.”

More than a year has passed, and still no Roblox on PlayStation. Plenty of workarounds are being introduced to add the famous game to the consoles. So far, what we are getting is a sudden surge of articles reviving the hype. Maybe it’s about time to bring this discussion back to the fore. The question is pretty much the same since last year: why should Roblox be on PlayStation, and what’s in it for you?

There is little doubt that Roblox has one of the most active, if not the busiest, user base of any game at present. In 2023, Epic Games CEO Tim Sweeney states that Roblox has around 250 million active monthly users: more than Minecraft’s (100 million) and Fortnite’s (70 million) player bases combined. The 17 and older crowd is getting a major boost in numbers with these gamers making up 38% of the community. That part of the population is rising, and there are no signs of it slowing down soon.

If you’re into creating Experiences, getting Roblox on PlayStation products means you’ll need one less platform to use when making your next potential big hit. Creating and publishing aren’t slowed down because you’re using a controller to manipulate assets and edit the game world. Cross out the need to buy a new machine strictly for Roblox. You can get the job done with your trusty home console. Coding might be another topic, but what’s stopping you from connecting a keyboard to enter characters in the Developer Console? PlayStation 4 and 5 systems have keyboard and mouse support.

You can play Roblox with a controller just as well as you can using your keyboard and mouse or a touchscreen. Most controls for playing an Experience are almost intuitive. All the basic actions plus moving around are learned as simple as trying each button out. You’re pretty much well-set for gaming in a few minutes of trying it out. Some of the more complex games allow button mapping to adjust the gameplay according to the best layout you’re most comfortable with. If kids on mobile devices find little trouble getting around, then you with a controller won’t have too much fuss about it. In case that doesn’t work out, then swap that joystick with a keyboard and mouse.

Having Roblox on PlayStation devices is definitely a win if you’re big into interactive games with plenty of worlds and even more players. It’s also a win on Sony’s end if they can capture a fraction of that Robux-spending customer base.

content_html:
Secret Neighbor, the Hello Neighbor Roblox Spinoff, Is Out Now

June 12, 2023 by Mikhail
>
Secret Neighbor is the Roblox spinoff of the popular Hello Neighbor franchise developed by tinyBuildGAMES. Step into your neighbor's house and uncover the secrets hidden within.

Roblox is undoubtedly one of the hottest games today, enabling players to create games and various experiences. Some official developers have even ventured forward, creating spinoffs of their mainline titles. One of these developers is tinyBuildGAMES, the studio behind the popular Hello Neighbor franchise.

They recently released the Roblox version of Hello Neighbor. It's a multiplayer horror social game that challenges you and other players to explore and uncover the secrets hidden within your neighbor's house. You'll team up with five different players to unlock the basement door. Though this sounds relatively straightforward, it isn't: there are numerous puzzles to solve and doors to open before getting to the basement. Moreover, you're not alone since you'll have to deal with a traitor in your midst who will try to lay traps and disrupt you to sabotage your mission.

Suitable for all ages, the game is now available on all platforms with Roblox - PC, Android, and iOS. So, dive into the neighbor's home in Secret Neighbor with your friends. Who knows, you might discover a bunch of different secrets!

content_html:
5 Coolest Roblox Showcases You Need to See

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
Come and get to experience a wonderful adventure from the coolest-looking showcases in Roblox. These are all for you to see and explore the creativity that its developers would want you to enjoy.

A showcase in Roblox is a game or scenario created by the user that features highly detailed content, from its landscape to its building designs and more. It is where you can find great works of art that take significant time to make and complete. In turn, these showcases demonstrate the skills and dedication the creators have put into their projects. So come and let us dive deep into these cool showcases and see what they offer.

1. Forgotten Memories



Forgotten Memories, created by Legoman654, features a role-playing environment where you can immerse yourself in a post-apocalyptic world to explore. The vivid details provide insight into the creator's views and imagination, depicting fallen cities and civilizations, allowing nature to reclaim the lands. The expansive area will enable you to roam freely with your friends, and you can even use emotes to make your avatar strike cool poses and perform funny movements.

2. Afternoon Glow



If you seek a calming and relaxing experience after a stressful day, Afternoon Glow is perfect for you. It offers a soothing first-person view where you can pause, observe, and listen to the music, allowing tranquility to envelop you. You will have the opportunity to experience the warmth and peacefulness of the "Afternoon Glow" created by Whwh25.

3. Rituals



HIERO_GLYPH presents an incredible, meticulously crafted, and eerie experience in Rituals. This showcase is perfect for gathering your friends and exploring together, utilizing your avatars to navigate the environment. Feel free to climb statues or walls to uncover every hidden corner and intricate detail this showcase offers visitors.

4. Orion



Embark on an exploration of the city Orion, meticulously crafted by Joseph155, and witness its captivating vistas. Using a user-friendly interface, you can guide your avatar through the city, freely running, moving, and jumping within the game. This showcase offers a third-person camera view, allowing you to rotate it to your preference for a comprehensive look at your surroundings.

5. Wyvern Inn



Step into the past and travel back to old times with Urbanize's captivating experience, Wyvern Inn. This showcase presents an inn located beside the coastline, inviting you to explore its offerings. The background music enhances the theme, adding depth and increasing immersion for visitors. It's a wonderful place to meet up with friends, enjoy the experience, and savor their presence.

To sum it all up, these are five of the coolest showcases you can find in Roblox. There are various ways that you can play these experiences by using your computer or even your smartphone, but just be sure that you have a high-spec device so you can enjoy the content fully, as it will push it to the limit. So come try them out now and see which ones are your favorites!

title: What Really Happened to the Roblox Forums
image_title: RobloxGo - What Really Happened to the Roblox Forums
image_alt: RobloxGo - What Really Happened to the Roblox Forums - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: The ultimate fate of the official Roblox community hangout - plus where you can find fellow Robloxians at present.
content_html:
What Really Happened to the Roblox Forums

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
The ultimate fate of the official Roblox community hangout - plus where you can find fellow Robloxians at present.

Text-based discussions have been on the rave since the forums’ launch in 2004. The forums used to boast a large and active community with several avenues where you could talk about Roblox. There was also an off-topic subforum for people wanting a conversation about something other than the game. This is standard fare among users of the time, where you can read up on many tips and tricks shared by players. The forums took on a culture of their own, often revering the most dedicated of contributors and even making memorabilia out of the most popular topics of the time.


Forum culture typically involves a user hanging around a few sub-forums most of the time while occasionally exploring less-frequented areas. The Roblox community during the forums era has had a lot to talk about – the more than 20 subcategories at its peak should give you a hint about it. Too many active subforums mean a demand for a powerful moderation team. Eventually, attempts to streamline the forums were made by merging similar subforums and removing unnecessary or least-populated ones.

Moderation gaps were eventually found during the later years of the Roblox Forums, causing a flood of trolls and forum raiders. This caused much trouble in the community, worsened by the lack of timely moderator interventions. These events led to the Roblox Forums’ closure in December 2017. What was once the official haven for scripters, traders, clan members, and practically anyone who enjoyed hanging out with the Roblox community ended after 13 years.

New online forums and communities



Are you a newly-minted Robloxian or a returning player who needs to get up to speed with what’s new on Roblox? Not all is doom and gloom when it comes to communities. There are many unofficial online gathering places to choose from for your interaction needs. One of the closest that comes to mind is robloxforum.com. There is a good selection of subforums for everything Roblox-related, plus other out-of-game ideas you might want to share with users.

The Roblox Subreddit is another way to get your fix of game-related content. You get an active community that answers almost any question about the game. Just remember to read the community rules and, of course – have a Reddit account handy. Discord users can join the Roblox server. Chat, watch streams, and hang out with other players in real time. Discord rules apply, and make sure to read server rules before you start interacting.

You can get in touch with the development team through the dev forum. Take note of the conditions you must fulfill before fully utilizing the site. There are a lot of threads and topics to gorge through even if you’re simply logging in reading. Roblox Groups is a great option in case you want a smaller group of people to work with and you have no plans of encountering too much community drama.

Sometimes, enjoying a game is a matter of being with a community of like-minded individuals. There’s absolutely no problem with going solo and choosing your kind of game from Roblox’s ever-expanding features and tools. In the future, you might even want to grow out of simply playing someone else’s Experiences and venture into the world of custom servers.

title: Explore the Mission: Mars Experience from Boston’s Museum of Science on Roblox
image_title: RobloxGo - Explore the Mission: Mars Experience from Boston’s Museum of Science on Roblox
image_alt: RobloxGo - Explore the Mission: Mars Experience from Boston’s Museum of Science on Roblox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Explore the mysterious planet Mars as one of the very first brave pioneers to have set foot on the red planet in this mind-blowing Roblox experience, Mission: Mars! New update coming May 3rd!
content_html:
Explore the Mission: Mars Experience from Boston’s Museum of Science on Roblox

May 1, 2023 by Aethyna
>
Explore the mysterious planet Mars as one of the very first brave pioneers to have set foot on the red planet in this mind-blowing Roblox experience, Mission: Mars! New update coming May 3rd!

Have you ever wondered what would it be like if you’re one of the very first pioneer astronauts who set foot on Mars? Well, if this is something you’d like to experience, Boston’s Museum of Science has launched a new Roblox experience called Mission: Mars that you can dive right into!

Launched back on Jan 31st this year, Mission: Mars is developed in collaboration with Filament Games to offer high-quality, entertaining, and educational experience (or “edutainment” as some may call it) to Roblox players, giving them an unprecedented look into being among the first pioneers on the red planet. Not only will you be able to explore every inch of the authentically-recreated planet in your customizable Mars survival suit, but you’ll also get to dive into some pretty cool engineering projects such as designing and customizing your very Mars rover!

Of course, unlike Matt Damon in The Martian, you won’t be alone on Mars nor will you be forced to survive on only potatoes. Instead, the game expects you to work together with your friends to help each other survive the harsh Martian environments, completing crucial missions sent by HQ, including searching for water ice, rescuing fellow explorers, and collecting samples on the planet, while earning badges and new cosmetic unlocks along the way. There’s a main hub that is filled with all sorts of fun facts and information where you can learn more about Mars as well.

To make sure that everything in the game is as realistic as possible, the developers even made an effort to use data that was kindly provided by the National Space Agency (NASA), along with aeronautical sciences and planetary knowledge provided by the Museum of Science, to develop the Roblox experience, Mission: Mars.

The experience actually goes hand-in-hand with what Roblox is promoting via its Roblox Community Fund (RCF) under its Roblox Education initiative. In fact, Mission: Mars is the first Roblox experience to have launched since receiving grants from the fund.

If Mission: Mars is the kind of quality Roblox experience that we can expect from recipients of the fund, we truly can’t wait to see what else we’ll be getting from the other RCF grantees, including a collaboration between FIRST and Filament Games to create a new virtual robotics game based on RoboCo, and a series of STEM-related educational learning experiences developed Project Lead The Way (PLTW)!

Of course, Mission: Mars isn’t merely a showcase – it gets pretty constant updates with brand-new missions to enjoy and new stuff to do! In fact, the next one’s due on May 3rd, so if you’re interested check out the Roblox experience, make sure to hop in once the latest update is rolled out!

title: Experience the NHL Metaverse in Roblox with NHL Blast
image_title: RobloxGo - Experience the NHL Metaverse in Roblox with NHL Blast
image_alt: RobloxGo - Experience the NHL Metaverse in Roblox with NHL Blast - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: In line with its goal of reaching out to a younger audience, NHL launches NHL Blast on Roblox.
content_html:
Experience the NHL Metaverse in Roblox with NHL Blast

May 8, 2023 by Mikhail
>
In line with its goal of reaching out to a younger audience, NHL launches NHL Blast on Roblox.

The NHL is launching the NHL Blast on Roblox, an online metaverse where players can play hockey-inspired games and wear team jerseys.

The experience will be available on mobile, PC, and Xbox and will come with a plethora of features, including:

- 5v5 hockey experience set in obstacle-filled environments with skating and shooting mechanics that copy actual NHL players.

- Players can wear NHL jerseys with customizable numbers and names

- The Upper Deck Selfie Station, where users can take pictures of their avatars in poses featured in NHL trading cards.

NHL Blast was developed by Swedish studio The Gang, a developer that focuses on creating experiences for the metaverse.

"It will allow hockey fans and the Roblox community to hang out and play in a new online space that features many elements of NHL fandom," said David Lehanski, NHL executive vice president of business development and innovation, in an interview with ESPN.

content_html:
Razer Launches Roblox Edition Accessories with In-Game Items

May 8, 2023 by Mikhail
>
These Roblox Edition Razer accessories and peripherals will enhance your gaming experience and give you in-game rewards.

Continuing its tradition of partnering with video game makers, Razer recently joined hands with Roblox to release a line of Roblox-themed peripherals that also come with in-game items. So yes, not only will you explore immersive Roblox worlds using Razer accessories, but you will also do so while wearing them.

The limited-edition Razer Roblox Collection consists of several items. One of these is the Razer Blackwidow V3 Mechanical Keyboard, which will give you Razer Cyber Wings. Also in the fray is the popular and highly-touted Orochi V2 will hand over an in-game Razer backpack. Finally, the Razer Barracuda X, one of the brand's best headphones, will net you a cyberhelm.

Given these are Razer products, they are quite pricey. The keyboard and mouse cost $90 and $180, respectively, while the headset goes for $130. Nevertheless, having these accessories around will let you show off and make your character look unique in the various worlds of Roblox.

title: Roblox’s Latest Update Is Incompatible with Linux When Run Using Wine
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox’s Latest Update Is Incompatible with Linux When Run Using Wine
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox’s Latest Update Is Incompatible with Linux When Run Using Wine - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Roblox blocks the use of Wine due to security and compatibility concerns but is working on "fixing existing issues."
content_html:
Roblox’s Latest Update Is Incompatible with Linux When Run Using Wine

May 8, 2023 by Mikhail
>
Roblox blocks the use of Wine due to security and compatibility concerns but is working on "fixing existing issues."

Playing Roblox on Linux using the Wine compatibility layer seems to be coming to an end.

The new version of the game is in the testing phase, but players quickly noticed it doesn't seem to work with the Wine compatibility layer, which is capable of running Windows apps on Linux. One of the developers mentioned that the block is intentional due to a plethora of concerns:

"Unfortunately, this block was intentional. With the Windows 64-bit client launch, we made the conscious decision to block the use of Wine. We came to this decision due to a combination of security and compatibility concerns. As a Linux user, I am sure you understand the challenges of the Windows ecosystem. Wine is not officially supported, but we are committed to working towards compatibility where possible. Unfortunately, I cannot provide a specific timeline for this support. However, I assure you that it remains a priority for our team."

Currently, the Roblox team is performing testing to find and sort out issues, with another staff member saying, "We are not trying to punish the use of Wine," and later adding, "Wine remains a priority for our team, and we are certainly not deaf to the voices of our community."

As of today, there is no set timeline for when Roblox will become compatible with Wine, but we hope it will be soon.

title: Toya - The Studio Making Games for Girls on Roblox
image_title: RobloxGo - Toya - The Studio Making Games for Girls on Roblox
image_alt: RobloxGo - Toya - The Studio Making Games for Girls on Roblox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: The game development industry has always been dominated by men. This is, unfortunately, true in Roblox as well. However, Toya is here to break some stereotypes and to show young girls what they are capable of!
content_html:
Toya - The Studio Making Games for Girls on Roblox

November 2, 2025 by Aethyna
>
The game development industry has always been dominated by men. This is, unfortunately, true in Roblox as well. However, Toya is here to break some stereotypes and to show young girls what they are capable of!

Roblox is one of the most popular online games among children in America and all around the globe, with over 30 million active users daily and 220 million active players every month. Although the pandemic and lockdowns have definitely contributed to the massive growth they have had over the past 2 years, their growth isn’t just a one-off thing. Even now as countries open up and people are finally filling up the streets again, their numbers continue to grow at a steady pace.

Without a doubt, their success can be attributed to the many right business decisions they have made over the years, from acquiring Loom.ai, a company specializing in real-time facial animation technology for 3D avatars using deep learning, computer vision, and VFX, to embracing the vision of creating a metaverse around its players.

However, one of the most important decisions they have made is pouring millions into developing their talented users/developers and providing them with every possible tool they may need to create new games since Roblox is a platform that relies pretty heavily on independent users/developers to create fun games and experiences for their player base after all.


Over time, game startups and small indie game studios started to see the value of creating games on Roblox and they climbed aboard. One of them is Toya, an Israeli game studio based in Tel Aviv that is comprised of mostly women (80% to be precise).

They have noticed the lack of diversity when it comes to game development, which has always been predominantly male-dominated even in Roblox, and they aim to change that. They want to become the kind of role models that the young female players in Roblox could look up to, and most importantly, they want to create free games that girls and young women on Roblox (a significant 44% of them) can truly enjoy. After all, not everyone plays Roblox just for its shooter games!

According to Toya’s cofounder and CEO, Anat Shperling, “We want to have more female characters, female avatars, and games that go beyond pink and beyond dress up and makeup”.

“We believe that the variety of representation and increasing the visibility of female characters. Both girls and boys need to be exposed to an equal world also when playing,” she told the reporter from VentureBeat.


Their message apparently resonated with the female player base in Roblox, specifically between the ages of 7 and 14 years old, with two of their four prototypes released back in 2019, namely My Farm and My Cat Box, hitting the top charts, garnering over 25 million and 8 million visits respectively. As a result, they have caught the eye of IP owner, ZAGTOON, and ended up securing the rights to produce the very first official Roblox game based on the popular kids’ adventure TV series, Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir – Miraculous RP: Ladybug & Cat Noir, in collaboration with Zag Games (ZAGTOON’s gaming division).


To date, Toya has launched a total of 7 games on Roblox, with more games to come. In fact, in an interview with VentureBeat last year, Shperling revealed that they are currently working on several new projects, some of which are based on original intellectual property. We definitely can’t wait to see what else they have to offer!

title: 4 Roblox Army Games to Play on Memorial Day
image_title: RobloxGo - 4 Roblox Army Games to Play on Memorial Day
image_alt: RobloxGo - 4 Roblox Army Games to Play on Memorial Day - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: While Memorial Day honors fallen heroes, military-themed games can add a layer of strategy and learning to your pre-holiday cookout so let’s explore a few military games on RobloxGo.
content_html:
4 Roblox Army Games to Play on Memorial Day

November 2, 2025 by Other Contributors
>
While Memorial Day honors fallen heroes, military-themed games can add a layer of strategy and learning to your pre-holiday cookout so let’s explore a few military games on RobloxGo.

Gear up for Memorial Day with a blast from the barracks! Military-themed games aren't just about action; they can build teamwork, strategy skills, and even spark conversations about service and sacrifice. As Memorial Day approaches, why not honor the brave with some virtual salutes? Roblox offers a massive arsenal of military-themed games, perfect for squad-based fun or strategic solo missions. From historical battles to modern warfare, we're deploying a guide to a few of the best military experiences Roblox has to offer. So, grab your gear and get ready.

Skirmish


Skirmish throws you into bite-sized battles perfect for a quick fix. Choose your team and class, soldier, sniper, or grenadier, each with unique strengths. Matches are fast-paced with a focus on objective-based combat. Capture points, defend zones, or eliminate the enemy team – teamwork is key to victory. Combat is a frantic spray of bullets and explosions. While aiming can feel loose, the colorful maps and constant action make for a purely chaotic and undeniably fun experience. If you're looking for a quick shot of adrenaline-pumping action, Skirmish delivers a satisfying punch.

Criminal vs SWAT


Criminal vs SWAT offers a classic team deathmatch with a twist: choose your side! Become a law-enforcing SWAT officer or a cunning criminal. Each side boasts a unique arsenal – criminals wield pistols, shotguns, and rocket launchers, while SWAT packs heat with assault rifles, snipers, and even grenades. Combat is frantic and chaotic, with bullets whizzing through destructible environments. The variety in weapons and objectives keeps things interesting. While the graphics are blocky and the experience might feel a tad repetitive after a while, Criminals vs SWAT provides a solid dose of shooting fun.

Noob Army Tycoon


In Noob Army Tycoon, forget building a lemonade stand – you're building an army of noobs! This quirky tycoon flips the script. Here, you amass an army of goofy noobs to conquer strategic points on a map. Combat is lighthearted and automated – noobs simply march and attack. But the strategy comes in choosing the right upgrades and completing wacky "Super Noob" quests that unlock powerful units and abilities. While the graphics are simple, the joy comes from watching your noob horde overwhelm the enemy in a wave of blue and yellow.

War Simulator


War Simulator takes you on a whirlwind tour of history's battlefields. Traverse eras from World War II to the future, unlocking a massive arsenal as you go. Combat itself is a wave-based defense against enemy soldiers. Strategize your approach by upgrading weapons, armor, and even special perks. While the shooting mechanics are simple, the joy comes from mowing down enemies and progressing through distinct historical periods. War Simulator offers a fun, casual experience for history buffs and shooter fans alike.

All said and done, these Roblox games offer a thrilling blend of action, strategy, and even a touch of history. Whether you crave chaotic shootouts, tactical objective-based battles, or the satisfaction of building an unstoppable army, there's a military-themed Roblox experience waiting to salute your sense of fun.

title: Chipotle Launches Chipotle Burrito Builder on Roblox
image_title: RobloxGo - Chipotle Launches Chipotle Burrito Builder on Roblox
image_alt: RobloxGo - Chipotle Launches Chipotle Burrito Builder on Roblox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Let's look into the general features of this fun and exciting burrito-rolling Experience brought to us by Chipotle.
content_html:
Chipotle Launches Chipotle Burrito Builder on Roblox

November 2, 2025 by JamesVince
>
Let's look into the general features of this fun and exciting burrito-rolling Experience brought to us by Chipotle.

Who said assembling a burrito can’t be fun and rewarding? Chipotle Burrito Builder is something everyone is going to love playing. Don’t forget to grab a good, filling roll after finishing a fun game. So you’re taken back to 1993: the year when the first Chipotle restaurant was opened. You get to don the service crew uniform and report for your first day on the job. It’s also National Burrito Day, so expect you’re going to have to bring your best game – even if you’re just learning the ropes. The “Burrito Builder” aspect is you going to mix and match different ingredients to create a burrito wrap and serve it to customers. The challenge is you’re given an empty piece of pita bread that is run on a conveyor belt. You also have to pay attention to what your customer wants in the burrito. You have a selection of grains, proteins, vegetables, and spices to mix and match according to your diner’s choices.

Gameplay is mostly a point-and-click affair. The pita moves fast enough to provide top-notch customer service while giving you enough time to sort out and find all the needed ingredients. The preparation doesn’t stop there. Burritos move faster with every 5 complete orders. This means your click and drag skills need to be quicker and more precise, but you get more Burrito Bucks this way. You can serve as many customers until you decide to stop laying or until you mess up an order. Your burrito-making speed and how well you have followed through the buyer’s instructions affect the final payout of the day. Watch out for achievement rewards. You get various themed avatar items from clothes to accessories. There’s even a Burrito Buddy companion you unlock after completing some tasks. There’s another game you can play inside the Chipotle Experience. There’s a delivery mini-game where you’ll move around the game world with the task of delivering all customer orders in 5 minutes. The game world may look big, but you can navigate all over town easily. There are 5 locations you can find out in two ways. You can either open your map to reveal what your customers’ houses look like or you can run around and find golden lights on the neighborhood’s doorsteps. View your map to find out if you have sent those burritos to all locations. You can also wait for a prompt to appear to report back to the restaurant to claim your rewards.

A third mode that you can use is to become a Chipotle customer. You can buy burritos using earned Burrito Bucks. These wonderful wraps have game-improving effects like additional build speed or a temporary boost in earned Burrito Bucks. Simply go to the cashier and buy the burrito that works best for you. It’s nice to learn the possible combinations you can come up with in rolling your most satisfying burrito. The rewards you earn in this Experience are yours to keep. They’re also found nowhere else in Roblox. If you are done with your burrito-rolling shift, why don’t you play longer by checking out our recommended Roblox cooking games?

Unleash Your Creativity in Roblox’s Innovation Tycoon Event

August 3, 2023 by Aethyna
>
Power up your imagination with these 3 specially hand-picked tycoon games for a chance to win exclusive event items!

Participate in this exciting Innovation Tycoon event today, complete the required objectives in the three selected tycoon games and win yourself exclusive prizes, namely an Innovator's Hat, a Robux Blaster or a cool-looking Experimental Jetpack!

To win these prizes, all you have to do is to complete these objectives:

1. Theme Park Tycoon Build the new Phase-Turbine Roller Coaster in your theme park in Theme Park Tycoon and make $2000 from it.

2. Retail Tycoon Sell at least 100 bags of Compy Foods's premium CompyChyp Energy Potato Chips to customers in Retail Tycoon.

3. Miner's Haven Work your mining magic in Miner's Haven to turn Iron into High Quality Steel by building a High Quality Steel Refinery. Once you have collected enough High Quality Steel, sell at least $10,000 worth of them to the Traveling Merchant to claim a new virtual item for your avatar.

However, you'll have to be quick – you only have until the 21th of March 2017 to collect all the required resources and redeem your exclusive prizes!
